tech_0118_hydrogen-for-high-temperature-.technology_status_summary_en: Hydrogen can be used to provide high temperature heat for ancillary processes, such as finishing processes (ex. rolling), material pre-heating, etc., and to replace the small amount of natural gas used in electric arc furnaces.
tech_0118_hydrogen-for-high-temperature-.market_dynamics_summary_en: This reduction method could lower the CO2 emissions of steel. However, it has no effect on the emission-intensive iron reduction step.
tech_0118_hydrogen-for-high-temperature-.description: Hydrogen can be used to provide high temperature heat for ancillary processes, such as finishing processes (ex. rolling), material pre-heating, etc., and to replace the small amount of natural gas used in electric arc furnaces.
tech_0118_hydrogen-for-high-temperature-.NZErationale: This reduction method could lower the CO2 emissions of steel. However, it has no effect on the emission-intensive iron reduction step.
tech_0118_hydrogen-for-high-temperature-.id: Industry > Iron and steel > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Hydrogen for high-temperature heat for ancillary steelmaking processes
tech_0118_hydrogen-for-high-temperature-.id_zh: 工業 > 鋼鐵 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 以氫氣供應煉鋼輔助製程所需的高溫熱能

tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.technology_name: Electrolytic hydrogen partially replacing injected coal (blast furnace)
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.technology_name_zh: 以電解氫部分取代高爐噴吹煤
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.sector_zh: 能源來源轉換與電氣化
sector: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.sector_en: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.technology_status_summary_zh: 氫氣可在一定程度上應用於高爐。高爐是目前占主導地位的原生鋼生產技術，主要依賴煤炭及由煤製成的焦炭。以氫氣取代部分噴吹煤，可降低煤炭需求。
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 以氫氣部分取代煤炭，有助於降低高爐排放，包括既有運轉中的高爐。不過，氫氣無法取代高爐所需的全部煤炭，因此此方案只能實現部分減排。
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.technology_status_summary_en: Hydrogen can be used to some extent in blast furnaces, the current dominant primary steel-making technology that relies primarily on coal and coke (which is derived from coal). Hydrogen can replace a portion of injected coal, thus reducing the need for coal.
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.market_dynamics_summary_en: Partial replacement of hydrogen can help lower emissions from blast furnaces, including those already in operation. However, hydrogen is not able to replace all coal needs in the blast furnaces, and therefore this option only partially reduce emissions.
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.description: Hydrogen can be used to some extent in blast furnaces, the current dominant primary steel-making technology that relies primarily on coal and coke (which is derived from coal). Hydrogen can replace a portion of injected coal, thus reducing the need for coal.
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.NZErationale: Partial replacement of hydrogen can help lower emissions from blast furnaces, including those already in operation. However, hydrogen is not able to replace all coal needs in the blast furnaces, and therefore this option only partially reduce emissions.
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.id: Industry > Iron and steel > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Electrolytic hydrogen partially replacing injected coal (blast furnace)
tech_0119_electrolytic-hydrogen-partiall.id_zh: 工業 > 鋼鐵 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 以電解氫部分取代高爐噴吹煤

tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.technology_name: Plasma torches for iron ore pelletisation
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.technology_name_zh: 用於鐵礦石球團製造的電漿炬
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.sector_zh: 能源來源轉換與電氣化
sector: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.sector_en: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.technology_status_summary_zh: 電漿炬可望應用於多種工業製程，以提供高溫熱能；在鐵礦石球團製造爐中，則可用於提供電氣化高溫熱能。
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 隨著氫基直接還原鐵（H₂-DRI）煉鋼技術興起，鐵礦石球團製造的重要性可能進一步提高，但電漿炬應用於此製程仍處於早期發展階段。
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.technology_status_summary_en: Plasma torches have the potential to be used in many industrial applications to provide high temperature heat. In iron ore pelletisation furnaces these could be used to provide electrified heat.
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.market_dynamics_summary_en: While pelletisation might become more important with the rise of H2 DRI based steelmaking, this is an early stage technology.
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.description: Plasma torches have the potential to be used in many industrial applications to provide high temperature heat. In iron ore pelletisation furnaces these could be used to provide electrified heat.
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.NZErationale: While pelletisation might become more important with the rise of H2 DRI based steelmaking, this is an early stage technology.
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.id: Industry > Iron and steel > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Plasma torches for iron ore pelletisation
tech_0120_plasma-torches-for-iron-ore-pe.id_zh: 工業 > 鋼鐵 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 用於鐵礦石球團製造的電漿炬

tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.technology_name: Upgraded biomass partially replacing injected coal (blast furnace)
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.technology_name_zh: 升級生質料部分取代高爐噴吹煤
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.sector_zh: 能源來源轉換與電氣化
sector: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.sector_en: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.technology_status_summary_zh: 巴西已在高爐中商業化應用生質料噴吹，將其作為還原劑。然而，並非所有生質料均適合直接噴吹；由於木炭的抗壓強度低於焦炭，部分生質料須搭配規模較小、效率較低的高爐。另一條成熟度較低的技術路線，是在無氧環境下以 200°C 至 400°C 加熱生質料，透過焙燒或熱裂解將其轉化或升級為類煤材料。所得的「生質煤」較原始生質料更接近煤的性質，可在標準高爐中部分取代噴吹煤。
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 生質料可望降低高爐排放，但無法完全取代標準高爐所需的煤與焦炭。此外，永續生質料的供應限制，也將限制此技術選項的整體應用潛力。
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.technology_status_summary_en: Biomass injection into blast furnaces is already applied commercially in Brazil, as it can be used as a reductant. However, not all types of biomass are suitable for direct injection, and some types require small-scale, less efficient blast furnaces due to the lower compressive strength of charcoal compared to coke. A less mature technology route is the conversion or upgrading of biomass to a coal-like material through torrefaction or pyrolysis, in which biomass is heated to temperate in the range of 200 °C to 400 °C in the absence of oxygen. The 'bio-coal' has characteristics more similar to coal than the original biomass. Such bio-coal can be used in standard blast furnaces to replace a portion of injected coal.
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.market_dynamics_summary_en: Biomass has potential to reduce emissions from blast furnaces, but cannot fully replace the coal and coke needs of the standard blast furnace. Furthermore, limitations of sustainable biomass availability will put an upper limit on the potential for this option.
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.description: Biomass injection into blast furnaces is already applied commercially in Brazil, as it can be used as a reductant. However, not all types of biomass are suitable for direct injection, and some types require small-scale, less efficient blast furnaces due to the lower compressive strength of charcoal compared to coke. A less mature technology route is the conversion or upgrading of biomass to a coal-like material through torrefaction or pyrolysis, in which biomass is heated to temperate in the range of 200 °C to 400 °C in the absence of oxygen. The 'bio-coal' has characteristics more similar to coal than the original biomass. Such bio-coal can be used in standard blast furnaces to replace a portion of injected coal.
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.NZErationale: Biomass has potential to reduce emissions from blast furnaces, but cannot fully replace the coal and coke needs of the standard blast furnace. Furthermore, limitations of sustainable biomass availability will put an upper limit on the potential for this option.
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.id: Industry > Iron and steel > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Upgraded biomass partially replacing injected coal (blast furnace)
tech_0121_upgraded-biomass-partially-rep.id_zh: 工業 > 鋼鐵 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 升級生質料部分取代高爐噴吹煤

tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.technology_status_summary_zh: 在壓榨部以機械方式多脫除 1% 的水分，可使後續乾燥所需能耗至少降低 3%。創新機械脫水技術包括超音波輔助脫水、真空控制壓榨、脈衝脫水、置換壓榨、鋼帶壓榨及氣流輔助成形等。
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 脫水技術可帶來顯著的能源效率提升。
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.technology_status_summary_en: Removing 1% more water in the press section (mechanical dewatering) results in at least 3% reduction of required drying energy. Innovative mechanical dewatering technologies may include ultrasound-assisted dewatering, vacuum controlled pressing, impulse dewatering, displacement pressing, steel belts and air-assisted forming.
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.market_dynamics_summary_en: Dewatering can bring significant energy efficiency gains.
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.description: Removing 1% more water in the press section (mechanical dewatering) results in at least 3% reduction of required drying energy. Innovative mechanical dewatering technologies may include ultrasound-assisted dewatering, vacuum controlled pressing, impulse dewatering, displacement pressing, steel belts and air-assisted forming.
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.NZErationale: Dewatering can bring significant energy efficiency gains.
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Innovative mechanical dewatering technologies
tech_0122_innovative-mechanical-dewateri.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 創新機械脫水技術

tech_0123_mild-repulping-technologies-pu.technology_status_summary_zh: 再製漿時，會將回收用乾紙漿或廢紙分散於水中，使纖維彼此分離。採用較溫和的技術可望降低再製漿製程的能耗及纖維損傷，進而降低保水值與乾燥能耗，並可能減少纖維流失。
tech_0123_mild-repulping-technologies-pu.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 具有良好的能源效率提升潛力。
tech_0123_mild-repulping-technologies-pu.technology_status_summary_en: During repulping, dry pulp or paper for recycling is dispersed in water to isolate the individual fibres. Milder technologies may lead to energy savings in the repulping process and reduce fibre damage thus reducing water retention value and drying energy. Moreover, it may decrease fibre losses.
tech_0123_mild-repulping-technologies-pu.description: During repulping, dry pulp or paper for recycling is dispersed in water to isolate the individual fibres. Milder technologies may lead to energy savings in the repulping process and reduce fibre damage thus reducing water retention value and drying energy. Moreover, it may decrease fibre losses.
tech_0123_mild-repulping-technologies-pu.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Mild repulping technologies (pulping)
tech_0123_mild-repulping-technologies-pu.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 溫和再製漿技術（製漿）

tech_0124_compression-refining.technology_status_summary_zh: 纖維打漿是增加纖維黏結表面積、提升紙張強度的關鍵製程。然而，打漿也會造成纖維損傷，因而降低脫水效率並提高紙張的保水值。壓縮式打漿可降低剪切力，減少纖維損傷並提升能源效率。
tech_0124_compression-refining.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 具有良好的能源效率提升潛力。
tech_0124_compression-refining.technology_status_summary_en: Fibre refining is a key operation to create sufficient fibre surface area for bonding, thus increasing the strength of paper. However, refining also damages the fibres, thereby reducing dewatering efficiency and increasing the water retention value of paper. By reducing the shear forces through compression refining the fibre damage is reduced and energy efficiency is improved.
tech_0124_compression-refining.description: Fibre refining is a key operation to create sufficient fibre surface area for bonding, thus increasing the strength of paper. However, refining also damages the fibres, thereby reducing dewatering efficiency and increasing the water retention value of paper. By reducing the shear forces through compression refining the fibre damage is reduced and energy efficiency is improved.
tech_0124_compression-refining.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Compression refining
tech_0124_compression-refining.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 壓縮式打漿

tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.technology_status_summary_zh: 深共熔溶劑是由兩種成分組成的液態混合物，具有異常低的凝固點及高木質素溶解度，因此可能適合作為新型製漿溶劑。相較於傳統化學製漿製程，使用深共熔溶劑所需的製漿能耗可望大幅降低，因為其能在低溫及常壓下生產紙漿。其作用方式是將木材分離為木質素、半纖維素及纖維素。
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術可望使製漿排放降低 80%。雖然目前技術成熟度（TRL）仍低，但若能持續發展，可望成為降低排放的良好選項，並使產業採用更高比例的生質原料，其中大部分可來自造紙業副產物。
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.technology_status_summary_en: A deep eutectic solvent is a liquid mixture of two components that has an unusually low freezing point and have high lignin solubility, which could make them suitable as novel pulping solvents. Their use could have significantly lower energy needs for pulping compared to traditional chemical pulping processes, as they enable pulp production at low temperatures and atmospheric pressure. They function by dissolving wood into lignin, hemicellulose and cellulose.
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.market_dynamics_summary_en: The technology could reduce pulping emissions by 80%. While still at a low TRL, if development proceeds they could provide a good option to reduce emissions and enable the industry to run on an even higher share of biomass (largely paper-industry byproducts).
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.description: A deep eutectic solvent is a liquid mixture of two components that has an unusually low freezing point and have high lignin solubility, which could make them suitable as novel pulping solvents. Their use could have significantly lower energy needs for pulping compared to traditional chemical pulping processes, as they enable pulp production at low temperatures and atmospheric pressure. They function by dissolving wood into lignin, hemicellulose and cellulose.
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.NZErationale: The technology could reduce pulping emissions by 80%. While still at a low TRL, if development proceeds they could provide a good option to reduce emissions and enable the industry to run on an even higher share of biomass (largely paper-industry byproducts).
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Deep eutectic solvent (pulping)
tech_0125_deep-eutectic-solvent-pulping.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 深共熔溶劑製漿

tech_0126_paper-making-without-water.technology_status_summary_zh: 造紙所需能源中有 70% 用於乾燥供熱；若能在製程中完全不用水，便可省去乾燥程序。主要挑戰是在不損傷纖維的情況下，使纖維彼此黏結，並對回收用紙漿或廢紙進行乾式解纖。其一，紙張強度來自脫水過程中形成的氫鍵；其二，乾紙漿或廢紙在再製漿時，通常需加水才能溫和地破壞這些氫鍵。
tech_0126_paper-making-without-water.technology_status_summary_en: 70% of the energy need for paper-making is the use of heat for drying. When water could be eliminated there is no need for drying. The challenge is to obtain inter-fibre bonding and also dry defibration of pulp or paper for recycling without damaging the fibre. This is challenging, firstly, as paper owes its strength to hydrogen bonds that are formed during the removal of water, and secondly, as during repulping of dry pulp or paper for recycling the hydrogen bonds are normally mildly broken upon the addition of water.
tech_0126_paper-making-without-water.description: 70% of the energy need for paper-making is the use of heat for drying. When water could be eliminated there is no need for drying. The challenge is to obtain inter-fibre bonding and also dry defibration of pulp or paper for recycling without damaging the fibre. This is challenging, firstly, as paper owes its strength to hydrogen bonds that are formed during the removal of water, and secondly, as during repulping of dry pulp or paper for recycling the hydrogen bonds are normally mildly broken upon the addition of water.
tech_0126_paper-making-without-water.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Paper making without water
tech_0126_paper-making-without-water.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 無水造紙

tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.technology_name: Reduction of water in size press
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.technology_name_zh: 降低施膠壓榨製程用水量
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.technology_status_summary_zh: 目前，紙張在施膠前已先經乾燥，之後又於施膠製程中重新加濕，因此需要進行第二次乾燥。若能降低施膠劑的含水量，同時維持低黏度，即可大幅降低第二次乾燥階段的能源消耗。
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 具有提升能源效率的潛力。
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.technology_status_summary_en: Currently, sized paper products are dried before being rewetted in the size process, thus requiring a second drying step. Decreasing water content in the sizing agent (while obtaining low viscosity) would significantly reduce energy consumption from the second drying phase.
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.description: Currently, sized paper products are dried before being rewetted in the size process, thus requiring a second drying step. Decreasing water content in the sizing agent (while obtaining low viscosity) would significantly reduce energy consumption from the second drying phase.
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Reduction of water in size press
tech_0127_reduction-of-water-in-size-pre.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 降低施膠壓榨製程用水量

tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.technology_status_summary_zh: 超臨界二氧化碳具有近似液體的特性，因此在「萃取乾燥」製程中，可用來取代蒸汽加熱烘缸。
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 具有提升能源效率的潛力，但此技術的發展成熟度仍不及其他替代方案。
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.technology_status_summary_en: Liquid-like characteristics of supercritical CO2 allow for substitution of steam-heated cylinders with supercritical CO2 in the "extraction drying" process.
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.market_dynamics_summary_en: Energy efficiency gains potential, but the technology is not as advanced as other alternatives.
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.description: Liquid-like characteristics of supercritical CO2 allow for substitution of steam-heated cylinders with supercritical CO2 in the "extraction drying" process.
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.NZErationale: Energy efficiency gains potential, but the technology is not as advanced as other alternatives.
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Supercritical CO2 drying
tech_0128_supercritical-co2-drying.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 超臨界二氧化碳乾燥

tech_0129_superheated-steam-drying.technology_status_summary_zh: 在無空氣的純蒸汽環境中進行乾燥，可回收全部熱能，供後續製程使用。此技術的挑戰是整合蒸汽冷凝系統與濕紙／水蒸氣系統，因此需要先進的蒸汽淨化技術，以及防止蒸汽由系統洩漏的解決方案。
tech_0129_superheated-steam-drying.technology_status_summary_en: Drying in only steam (air-free) environment enables total recovery of thermal energy, to be used in subsequent processes. The challenge is to combine the steam-condensation system with wet paper/water vapour system, requiring advanced steam cleaning technologies and solutions to prevent steam leakage from the system
tech_0129_superheated-steam-drying.description: Drying in only steam (air-free) environment enables total recovery of thermal energy, to be used in subsequent processes. The challenge is to combine the steam-condensation system with wet paper/water vapour system, requiring advanced steam cleaning technologies and solutions to prevent steam leakage from the system
tech_0129_superheated-steam-drying.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Superheated steam drying
tech_0129_superheated-steam-drying.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 過熱蒸汽乾燥

tech_0130_water-removal-without-evaporat.technology_status_summary_zh: 乾燥過程主要透過蒸發去除水分；若能避免此一相變過程，即可大幅節省能源。利用電滲透等電場作用除水，可望節省高達 90% 的乾燥能耗。
tech_0130_water-removal-without-evaporat.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 具有高度的能源效率提升潛力。
tech_0130_water-removal-without-evaporat.technology_status_summary_en: The main mechanism for water removal during drying is evaporation. Avoiding this phase change would lead to significant energy savings. Using electric forces like electro-osmosis could lead to up to 90% saving of drying energy.
tech_0130_water-removal-without-evaporat.description: The main mechanism for water removal during drying is evaporation. Avoiding this phase change would lead to significant energy savings. Using electric forces like electro-osmosis could lead to up to 90% saving of drying energy.
tech_0130_water-removal-without-evaporat.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Water removal without evaporation
tech_0130_water-removal-without-evaporat.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 非蒸發式除水

tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.technology_name_zh: 配備二氧化碳捕捉設備的鍋爐
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.technology_status_summary_zh: 碳捕捉與封存（CCS）可望應用於紙漿造紙業，捕捉蒸汽鍋爐及其他輔助單元所排放的二氧化碳。由於紙漿造紙業使用大量生質能，因此具備發展生質能源碳捕捉與封存（BECCS）的高度潛力，可藉此抵換其他二氧化碳排放。
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 紙漿造紙業是各產業中生質能使用占比最高的產業之一，因此採用生質能源碳捕捉與封存（BECCS），不僅可降低直接排放，也可抵換部分其他排放。
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.technology_status_summary_en: CCS can potentially be applied in the pulp and paper sector to capture emissions from the boilers used for producing steam, along with emissions streams from other ancillary units. As significant amounts of bioenergy are used by the pulp and paper industry, there is a high capacity for BECCS to be performed in this industry, allowing for offsets against other CO2 emissions.
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.market_dynamics_summary_en: The paper sector has one of the highest share of bioenergy consumption among industries. So using BECCS would be an opportunity to lower direct emissions, and offset some others.
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.description: CCS can potentially be applied in the pulp and paper sector to capture emissions from the boilers used for producing steam, along with emissions streams from other ancillary units. As significant amounts of bioenergy are used by the pulp and paper industry, there is a high capacity for BECCS to be performed in this industry, allowing for offsets against other CO2 emissions.
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.NZErationale: The paper sector has one of the highest share of bioenergy consumption among industries. So using BECCS would be an opportunity to lower direct emissions, and offset some others.
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Other production techniques > Boilers fitted with CO2 capture
tech_0131_boilers-fitted-with-co2-captur.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 其他生產技術 > 配備二氧化碳捕捉設備的鍋爐

tech_0132_electric-air-heating.sector_zh: 能源來源轉換與電氣化
sector: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.sector_en: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.technology_status_summary_zh: 傳統上，紙漿使用由化石燃料產生的過熱蒸汽進行乾燥。若改用電阻加熱空氣，即可使用再生電力，進而降低相關排放。此外，龐大的用電需求可透過電力控制器進行管理，以減少對電網負載的干擾。
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若使用再生電力，可大幅降低紙張生產的二氧化碳排放。
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.technology_status_summary_en: Traditionally, pulp is dried using superheated steam generated from fossil fuel sources. However, using resistive heating to warm air means that renewable electricity can be used, thus reducing associated emissions. Additionally, the significant power demand can be managed by power controllers to minimise load disruption on electricity grid.
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.market_dynamics_summary_en: If electricity is sourced from renewable sources, this could greatly reduce the CO2 emissions of paper production.
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.description: Traditionally, pulp is dried using superheated steam generated from fossil fuel sources. However, using resistive heating to warm air means that renewable electricity can be used, thus reducing associated emissions. Additionally, the significant power demand can be managed by power controllers to minimise load disruption on electricity grid.
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.NZErationale: If electricity is sourced from renewable sources, this could greatly reduce the CO2 emissions of paper production.
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Electric air heating
tech_0132_electric-air-heating.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 電熱式空氣加熱

tech_0133_electric-boiler.sector_zh: 能源來源轉換與電氣化
sector: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0133_electric-boiler.sector_en: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0133_electric-boiler.technology_status_summary_zh: 以電力取代化石燃料，產生乾燥製程所需的蒸汽。適用於多種產業的電鍋爐已達商業化階段，許多紙漿廠與造紙廠正考慮採用。
tech_0133_electric-boiler.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若使用再生電力，可大幅降低紙張生產的二氧化碳排放。
tech_0133_electric-boiler.technology_status_summary_en: Producing steam for drying with electricity instead of using fossil fuels. Electric boilers applicable to multiple industries have reached commercialisation, and are being considered by many pulp and paper mills.
tech_0133_electric-boiler.market_dynamics_summary_en: If electricity is sourced from renewable sources, this could greatly reduce the CO2 emissions of paper production.
tech_0133_electric-boiler.description: Producing steam for drying with electricity instead of using fossil fuels. Electric boilers applicable to multiple industries have reached commercialisation, and are being considered by many pulp and paper mills.
tech_0133_electric-boiler.NZErationale: If electricity is sourced from renewable sources, this could greatly reduce the CO2 emissions of paper production.
tech_0133_electric-boiler.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Electric boiler
tech_0133_electric-boiler.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 電鍋爐

tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.technology_name: Heat pumps in the pulp and papper industry
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.technology_name_zh: 紙漿造紙業的熱泵應用
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.sector_zh: 能源來源轉換與電氣化
sector: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.sector_en: Shift in energy sources and electrification
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.technology_status_summary_zh: 若要在造紙業永續應用高溫熱泵，除須採用專用熱泵外，也須調整造紙製程，包括降低乾燥罩內的空氣含量，以提高露點及熱泵熱源溫度；並降低初始蒸汽壓力，再透過後續蒸汽壓縮步驟，達到各乾燥部所需的較高蒸汽壓力。
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若使用再生電力，可大幅降低紙張生產的二氧化碳排放。
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.technology_status_summary_en: Sustainable application of high temperature heat pumps in the paper industry requires both dedicated heat pumps and adaptation of the paper-making process: lower air content in the drying hood (to increase dewpoint and thus heat pump source) and lower starting pressures for steam (+ subsequent steam compression steps for the higher steam pressures needed in the different drying sections).
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.market_dynamics_summary_en: If electricity is sourced from renewable sources, this could greatly reduce the CO2 emissions of paper production.
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.description: Sustainable application of high temperature heat pumps in the paper industry requires both dedicated heat pumps and adaptation of the paper-making process: lower air content in the drying hood (to increase dewpoint and thus heat pump source) and lower starting pressures for steam (+ subsequent steam compression steps for the higher steam pressures needed in the different drying sections).
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.NZErationale: If electricity is sourced from renewable sources, this could greatly reduce the CO2 emissions of paper production.
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Shift in energy sources and electrification > Heat pumps in the pulp and papper industry
tech_0134_heat-pumps-in-the-pulp-and-pap.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 能源來源轉換與電氣化 > 紙漿造紙業的熱泵應用

tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.sector_zh: 資源循環（將廢棄物轉化為化學品與生質能）
sector: Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy)
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.sector_en: Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy)
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.technology_status_summary_zh: 此製程利用超臨界狀態的水，裂解廢塑膠中的碳鍵，使聚合物分解為碳鏈較短的碳氫化合物。
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 黑液氣化具有生產碳中和燃料的相當潛力。然而，迄今相關專案面臨不少重大挑戰，且氣化成本可能限制此技術的普及。
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.technology_status_summary_en: The process uses water under supercritical conditions to crack carbon bonds within end-of-life plastic, thus breaking down polymers into shorter chain hydrocarbons.
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.market_dynamics_summary_en: Black liquor gasification has reasonable potential to produce carbon neutral fuels. However, projects to date have faced considerable challenges, and gasification costs may limit the uptake of this technology.
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.description: The process uses water under supercritical conditions to crack carbon bonds within end-of-life plastic, thus breaking down polymers into shorter chain hydrocarbons.
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.NZErationale: Black liquor gasification has reasonable potential to produce carbon neutral fuels. However, projects to date have faced considerable challenges, and gasification costs may limit the uptake of this technology.
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy) > Black liquor gasification and valorisation
tech_0135_black-liquor-gasification-and-.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 資源循環（將廢棄物轉化為化學品與生質能） > 黑液氣化與加值利用

tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.technology_name_zh: 木質素萃取—有機溶劑法
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.sector_zh: 資源循環（將廢棄物轉化為化學品與生質能）
sector: Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy)
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.sector_en: Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy)
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.technology_status_summary_zh: 從木漿中分離木質素，可將木質素用於化學品等新型工業產品，或作為鍋爐及石灰窯的生質燃料。溶劑製漿法是目前正在探索的方法之一。
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術可為其他應用提供額外的生質原料來源；由於永續生質原料的供應潛力存在上限，因此可能具有相當價值。然而，此技術並不會直接降低紙漿造紙業的排放。
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.technology_status_summary_en: Isolating lignin from wood pulp could enable use of lignin for new industrial products, such as chemicals, or for use as a biofuel in boilers or lime kilns. Solvent-based pulping is one of the methods under exploration.
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.market_dynamics_summary_en: The technology can provide additional sources of biomass for use in other applications, which could be valuable given that there is an upper limit on the potential for sustainable biomass. However, this technology does not directly reduce pulp and paper industry emissions.
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.description: Isolating lignin from wood pulp could enable use of lignin for new industrial products, such as chemicals, or for use as a biofuel in boilers or lime kilns. Solvent-based pulping is one of the methods under exploration.
tech_0136_lignin-extraction-organic-solv.NZErationale: The technology can provide additional sources of biomass for use in other applications, which could be valuable given that there is an upper limit on the potential for sustainable biomass. However, this technology does not directly reduce pulp and paper industry emissions.

tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.sector_zh: 資源循環（將廢棄物轉化為化學品與生質能）
sector: Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy)
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.sector_en: Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy)
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.technology_status_summary_zh: 熱裂解是在無氧環境下加熱生質原料，使其分解為生質油與生物炭。紙漿與造紙製程產生的副產物流，可依其不同含水量採用熱裂解處理。
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 造紙業產生的生物廢棄物已有相當比例由業者自行利用。若搭配製程電氣化與能源效率提升，此方法可使多餘的生質能輸出至其他多元應用。
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.technology_status_summary_en: In pyrolysis, biomass is heated in the absence of oxygen and decomposes into bio-oil and biochar. The side streams of pulp and paper processing can be subject to pyrolysis depending on the various levels of water content.
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.market_dynamics_summary_en: A good portion of the bio-waste produced in the paper sector is self-consumed. If combined with electrification and energy efficiency gains, such method could allow to export excess bioenergy for diverse applications.
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.description: In pyrolysis, biomass is heated in the absence of oxygen and decomposes into bio-oil and biochar. The side streams of pulp and paper processing can be subject to pyrolysis depending on the various levels of water content.
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.NZErationale: A good portion of the bio-waste produced in the paper sector is self-consumed. If combined with electrification and energy efficiency gains, such method could allow to export excess bioenergy for diverse applications.
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.id: Industry > Pulp and paper > Recycling (waste product conversion to chemicals and bioenergy) > Pyrolysis of by-product streams
tech_0138_pyrolysis-of-by-product-stream.id_zh: 工業 > 紙漿與造紙 > 資源循環（將廢棄物轉化為化學品與生質能） > 副產物流熱裂解

tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.technology_status_summary_zh: 此爐具以厭氧消化產生的沼氣作為再生燃料。消化程序可在兼具儲氣功能的袋式或槽式消化器中進行。厭氧消化是擴大清潔烹飪普及率的重要技術。
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較於傳統烹飪爐具，使用沼氣可降低碳排放；相較於固體燃料，則可改善室內空氣品質。輕型袋式沼氣爐具的成本可能低於其他消化器系統。
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.technology_status_summary_en:
Renewable based stove - fuelled with biogas from anaerobic digestion.
The digestion can take place in a bag or tank which also stores the gas.
Anaerobic digestion is an important technology to spread access to clean cooking.
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_en: Compared to traditional food stoves, biogas reduces carbon emissions, and compared to use of solid fuels, improves indoor air quality. Light bag stoves may have lower costs compared to other digesters.
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.description:
Renewable based stove - fuelled with biogas from anaerobic digestion.
The digestion can take place in a bag or tank which also stores the gas.
Anaerobic digestion is an important technology to spread access to clean cooking.
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.NZErationale: Compared to traditional food stoves, biogas reduces carbon emissions, and compared to use of solid fuels, improves indoor air quality. Light bag stoves may have lower costs compared to other digesters.
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.id: Buildings > Cooking technologies > Biofuels > Anaerobic digester cooking
tech_0139_anaerobic-digester-cooking.id_zh: 建築 > 烹飪技術 > 生質燃料 > 厭氧消化沼氣爐具

tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.technology_status_summary_zh: 此類爐具又稱火箭爐，屬於燃料效率較高的爐具，可使生質燃料在隔熱良好的垂直煙道內燃燒。
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此類高燃料效率爐具價格可負擔且易於規模化推廣；相較於明火烹飪或低效率固體燃料爐具，可帶來多項健康效益。
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.technology_status_summary_en: Also called rocket stoves, these are fuel-efficient stoves which use biomass, combusting into a well-insulated vertical chimney.
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.market_dynamics_summary_en: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves.
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.description: Also called rocket stoves, these are fuel-efficient stoves which use biomass, combusting into a well-insulated vertical chimney.
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.NZErationale: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves.
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.id: Buildings > Cooking technologies > Biofuels > Improved biomass cooking stove
tech_0140_improved-biomass-cooking-stove.id_zh: 建築 > 烹飪技術 > 生質燃料 > 改良式生質燃料爐具

tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.technology_status_summary_zh: 生質氣化爐具將木材、作物殘餘物等固體生質原料氣化為可燃氣體，再用於烹飪。相較於直接燃燒固體生質原料，此製程更為潔淨且效率更高。
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此類高燃料效率爐具價格可負擔且易於規模化推廣；相較於明火烹飪或低效率固體燃料爐具，可帶來多項健康效益。
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.technology_status_summary_en: A biomass gasification stove gasifies solid biomass, such as wood or crop residues, into a combustible gas which is then used for cooking. This process is cleaner and more efficient than burning the solid biomass directly.
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.market_dynamics_summary_en: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves.
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.description: A biomass gasification stove gasifies solid biomass, such as wood or crop residues, into a combustible gas which is then used for cooking. This process is cleaner and more efficient than burning the solid biomass directly.
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.NZErationale: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves.
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.id: Buildings > Cooking technologies > Biofuels > Biomass gasification stove
tech_0141_biomass-gasification-stove.id_zh: 建築 > 烹飪技術 > 生質燃料 > 生質氣化爐具

tech_0142_electric-stove.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 不會對室內空氣品質造成影響。
tech_0142_electric-stove.technology_status_summary_en: Vitroceramic or hot plate stove with an integrated electric resistance providing heat for cooking.
tech_0142_electric-stove.market_dynamics_summary_en: No impact on indoor air quality.
tech_0142_electric-stove.description: Vitroceramic or hot plate stove with an integrated electric resistance providing heat for cooking.
tech_0142_electric-stove.NZErationale: No impact on indoor air quality.

tech_0143_induction-cooking.technology_status_summary_zh: 利用電磁感應原理加熱鍋具的烹飪設備。
tech_0143_induction-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 無論鍋具尺寸大小皆具有高效率，且不會對室內空氣品質造成影響。
tech_0143_induction-cooking.technology_status_summary_en: Cooking equipment which relies on the principle of magnetic induction.
tech_0143_induction-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_en: High efficiency,  regardless of the cookware size. No impact on indoor air quality.
tech_0143_induction-cooking.description: Cooking equipment which relies on the principle of magnetic induction.
tech_0143_induction-cooking.NZErationale: High efficiency,  regardless of the cookware size. No impact on indoor air quality.

tech_0144_hydrogen-cooking.technology_status_summary_zh: 以氫氣作為熱源進行烹飪。
tech_0144_hydrogen-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在高度依賴燃氣烹飪的城市，氫氣可望取代化石燃氣。此外，氫氣可在其他能源基礎設施不足的地區離網生產，因此也有助於擴大清潔烹飪的普及。
tech_0144_hydrogen-cooking.technology_status_summary_en: Cooking with hydrogen as the source of heat.
tech_0144_hydrogen-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Could act as a replacement of fossil gas in cities that rely heavily on gas for cooking.
Also provides access to clean cooking since hydrogen can be produced off-grid in areas with low access to other energy infrastructure.
tech_0144_hydrogen-cooking.description: Cooking with hydrogen as the source of heat.
tech_0144_hydrogen-cooking.NZErationale:
Could act as a replacement of fossil gas in cities that rely heavily on gas for cooking.
Also provides access to clean cooking since hydrogen can be produced off-grid in areas with low access to other energy infrastructure.

initiatives.description: Kinetic7 portable stove aims to renew the cooking in Africa with stove generating hydrogen on the spot with water and solar batteries
Bosch will install hydrogen hobs in 300 homes as a part of the H100 Fife project
Empa has developed a stove which is fuelled by Hydrogen.
The HyCookers consortium has developed freestanding cookers and a hob that run on hydrogen.
Coosha Impact Venture launches project to deploy hydrogen based appliances for cooking and cooling in Namibia.

tech_0145_lpg-stove.technology_status_summary_zh: 以液化石油氣（LPG）為燃料的烹飪爐具。
tech_0145_lpg-stove.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此類高燃料效率爐具價格可負擔且易於規模化推廣；相較於明火烹飪或低效率固體燃料爐具，可帶來多項健康效益。
tech_0145_lpg-stove.technology_status_summary_en: Cooking stove fuelled by Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG).
tech_0145_lpg-stove.market_dynamics_summary_en: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves
tech_0145_lpg-stove.description: Cooking stove fuelled by Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG).
tech_0145_lpg-stove.NZErationale: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves

initiatives.description: World LPG Association has a ' Cooking For Life' campaign that wants to transition one billion people from cooking with traditional and dirty fuels to cleaner-burning LPG by 2030.
The Global LPG Partnership aims to assist developing countries into developing availability and use of LPG to negate the negative impacts of cooking with solid fuels.

tech_0146_solar-cooking.technology_status_summary_zh: 此類再生能源爐具利用鏡面反射裝置匯聚太陽能，並將其轉換為烹飪所需熱能。
tech_0146_solar-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此類高燃料效率爐具價格可負擔且易於規模化推廣；相較於明火烹飪或低效率固體燃料爐具，可帶來多項健康效益。然而，其烹飪時間較傳統爐具長，可能需要搭配輔助設備。
tech_0146_solar-cooking.technology_status_summary_en: Renewable-based stove that captures and converts solar energy into heat by means of a mirrored surface.
tech_0146_solar-cooking.market_dynamics_summary_en: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves. Higher time compared to traditional cookstoves, might require auxiliary devices.
tech_0146_solar-cooking.description: Renewable-based stove that captures and converts solar energy into heat by means of a mirrored surface.
tech_0146_solar-cooking.NZErationale: Affordable and scalable fuel-efficient cookstoves that can provide several health benefits compared to open fire cooking or inefficient solid cooking stoves. Higher time compared to traditional cookstoves, might require auxiliary devices.

tech_0147_smart-meter.technology_status_summary_zh: 智慧電表是一種電子裝置，可每小時或更頻繁地記錄用電量，並至少每日向電力公司回傳一次資料。智慧電表具備雙向通訊功能，可將時間電價資訊傳送至住宅端，或將需量反應指令傳送至用電設備。
tech_0147_smart-meter.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 智慧電表可透過多種負載控制機制，促成更具動態性的需量反應，例如將即時電價傳送至智慧家電，並控制特定設備的開啟或關閉。
tech_0147_smart-meter.technology_status_summary_en: Smart meters are electronic devices that record electricity consumption on a hourly basis or more frequently, and report at least daily to utilities. Smart meters are capable of two-way communication, sending time-based pricing information toward the home or demand response commands to devices.
tech_0147_smart-meter.market_dynamics_summary_en: Smart meters can facilitate more dynamic demand response through a number of load control mechanisms, e.g. sending real-time prices to smart appliances and switching on/off some devices.
tech_0147_smart-meter.description: Smart meters are electronic devices that record electricity consumption on a hourly basis or more frequently, and report at least daily to utilities. Smart meters are capable of two-way communication, sending time-based pricing information toward the home or demand response commands to devices.
tech_0147_smart-meter.NZErationale: Smart meters can facilitate more dynamic demand response through a number of load control mechanisms, e.g. sending real-time prices to smart appliances and switching on/off some devices.

initiatives.description: Europe's smart meter penetration has reached 56% in 2022 with around 172 million units by the end of 2022. Optimistic expectations for 2027 indicated that penetration could increase to 74%, driven by large roll-outs in the UK, Poland, and Germany.
Indias National Smart Grid Mission tracks the deployment of smart meters in India. As of October 2025, over 43 million have been deployed. With the goal to deploy 250 million by 2026
Smart meter penetration in the United States reaches 82%
Asia-Pacific now home to 0.9 billion connected electricity meters

tech_0147_smart-meter.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Smart meter
tech_0147_smart-meter.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 智慧電表

tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.technology_status_summary_zh: 直流（DC）微電網整合太陽光電（PV）直流發電與電池儲能，可直接供電給經調整的直流負載，例如電動車充電、照明及暖通空調（HVAC），無須進行直流／交流轉換，因而提升效率。若增設交流／直流轉換器，亦可連接電網及供電給一般交流負載。
tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 太陽光電模組產生的直流電轉換為適合長距離輸送的交流電時，會產生 4% 至 8% 的損失；而交流電供應電器前，通常又須轉換回直流電。因此，在微電網內就地生產及消費電力以避免輸電損失的前提下，全直流系統可帶來能源效率效益。
tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.technology_status_summary_en: Direct Current (DC) Microgrids combine DC power generation from photovoltaic (PV) sources with battery energy storage and can directly power adapted DC loads (e.g. EV charging, lighting, HVAC) without DC/AC conversion, thus making efficiency gains. With additional AC/DC convertors, they can be connected to the grid and/or power common AC loads.
tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.market_dynamics_summary_en: As the conversion from direct current (produced by PV cells) to alternating current (to transport electricity on a long-distance) generates a loss of 4-8%, and that alternating current needs to be converted back to direct current to power appliances, 100% DC systems are a source of efficiency gains, under the assumptions that electricity is produced and consumed locally in microgrids to avoid transport losses.
tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.description: Direct Current (DC) Microgrids combine DC power generation from photovoltaic (PV) sources with battery energy storage and can directly power adapted DC loads (e.g. EV charging, lighting, HVAC) without DC/AC conversion, thus making efficiency gains. With additional AC/DC convertors, they can be connected to the grid and/or power common AC loads.
tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.NZErationale: As the conversion from direct current (produced by PV cells) to alternating current (to transport electricity on a long-distance) generates a loss of 4-8%, and that alternating current needs to be converted back to direct current to power appliances, 100% DC systems are a source of efficiency gains, under the assumptions that electricity is produced and consumed locally in microgrids to avoid transport losses.

initiatives.description: DC Systems is a global company headquartered in Netherlands was acquired in 2021 by Schneider Electric. They have a number of projects testing the feasibility of DC microgrids, with one being a 700 V DC grid in Eaton, Netherlands.
Nexans and Current/OS Foundation promotes the adoption of active DC microgrids

Current/OS is an open partnership dedicated to ensuring reliable and sustainable hybrid AC/DC power distribution in buildings and installations. Over 100 partners have joined, featuring more than 10 large scale demonstrators
Multiple alliances have been launced to standardize and establish DC technology in buildigs

tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Direct current buildings system
tech_0148_direct-current-buildings-syste.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 建築直流供電系統

tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.technology_name: Gamification devices for buildings energy demand management
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.technology_name_zh: 建築能源需求管理遊戲化裝置
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.technology_status_summary_zh: 遊戲化運用遊戲元素與遊戲設計技巧，旨在提高用戶參與需求管理方案的意願，例如需量反應與能源效率方案。
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 可依使用者需求提供客製化的熱舒適環境。
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.technology_status_summary_en: Using game elements and game design techniques, gamification aims to improve customer participation in demand management programmes (e.g. demand response, energy efficiency).
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.market_dynamics_summary_en: Thermal comfort tailored to consumer's need.
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.description: Using game elements and game design techniques, gamification aims to improve customer participation in demand management programmes (e.g. demand response, energy efficiency).
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.NZErationale: Thermal comfort tailored to consumer's need.

initiatives.description: The PARENT project stands for PARticipatory platform for sustainable ENergy managemenT. The aim of the project is to provide communities with the technology and support to help reduce energy consumption in their homes and to investigate ways in which communities can work towards more sustainable life styles. It is an ongoing three year project with pilot studies in Brussels, Amsterdam and Bergen.
Synergi.so lets users in Finland earn rewards by optimising their electricity usage

tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Gamification devices for buildings energy demand management
tech_0149_gamification-devices-for-build.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 建築能源需求管理遊戲化裝置

tech_0150_active-control-systems.technology_status_summary_zh: 主動控制系統可控制用電設備，以避免電網壅塞並提升整體電力系統的彈性。控制作業可由用戶自行執行，也可透過自動化需量反應，由電力系統操作單位向用戶發送需量反應訊號。
tech_0150_active-control-systems.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 運用用電需求的彈性，同時為用戶創造經濟效益。
tech_0150_active-control-systems.technology_status_summary_en: Active control systems to operate equipment avoiding grid congestions, enhancing flexibility at the system level. Control can be handled directly by the consumer independently, or through automated demand response where instead the system operator broadcasts a demand-response signal to the consumer.
tech_0150_active-control-systems.market_dynamics_summary_en: Employing flexibility of electricity demand while delivering financial benefits to consumers.
tech_0150_active-control-systems.description: Active control systems to operate equipment avoiding grid congestions, enhancing flexibility at the system level. Control can be handled directly by the consumer independently, or through automated demand response where instead the system operator broadcasts a demand-response signal to the consumer.
tech_0150_active-control-systems.NZErationale: Employing flexibility of electricity demand while delivering financial benefits to consumers.

initiatives.description: Viessmann, a cooling and ventilation company, and transmission operator, TenneT, started a project in 2020 called ViFlex to test how heat pumps can contribute to the provision of a stable electrical system. Trials are being run across Europe, but namely in Eastern Germany. The flexibility arises from the possibility of the grid operator asking Viessmann's to limit the energy consumption of cooperating customers to reduce peak demand.
The OpenADR Alliance aims to standardise, automate, and simplify Demand Response by creating a common language which demand response participants could use to mutually exchange information.
Tata Power's 1000 customer trial of automated demand management in Mumvai and New Delhi

tech_0150_active-control-systems.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Active control systems
tech_0150_active-control-systems.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 主動控制系統

tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.technology_name_zh: 建築整合型太陽光電系統
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.technology_status_summary_zh: 太陽光電系統，例如模組、太陽能電池或其他光電產品，可整合於建築外殼。目前主要有兩類相互競爭的技術：以結晶矽製成的厚晶型產品，以及將光電活性材料設置於玻璃或金屬基板上的薄膜型產品。
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術具有高度發電潛力，在有利於太陽光電發展的法規環境下，也具有高度成本競爭力。在 2050 年淨零排放情境中，太陽光電與風力發電到 2030 年將供應約 40% 的建築用電。
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.technology_status_summary_en: Photovoltaic systems (e.g. panels, cells or any other product) are integrated in the building skin. Two technologies are in competition: thick crystal products (made from crystalline silicon) and thin-film products (where an active photovoltaic material is placed on a glass or metal substrate).
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.market_dynamics_summary_en: High electricity generation potential and high cost-competitiveness under PV-friendly regulations. In the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario, solar PV and wind supply about 40% of building electricity use by 2030.
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.description: Photovoltaic systems (e.g. panels, cells or any other product) are integrated in the building skin. Two technologies are in competition: thick crystal products (made from crystalline silicon) and thin-film products (where an active photovoltaic material is placed on a glass or metal substrate).
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.NZErationale: High electricity generation potential and high cost-competitiveness under PV-friendly regulations. In the Net Zero Emissions by 2050 Scenario, solar PV and wind supply about 40% of building electricity use by 2030.

initiatives.description: Solar tiles with a peak power of 737 kWp make up the roof of the Umwelt Arena AG in Switzerland.

tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Building integrated photovoltaic systems
tech_0151_building-integrated-photovolta.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 建築整合型太陽光電系統

tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.technology_name_zh: 分時電價電表控制開關
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.technology_status_summary_zh: 此控制開關連接電表，可依分時電價（TOU）方案，在離峰電價時段自動開啟設備。
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 分時電價（TOU，許多情況採固定時段費率）可鼓勵用戶將用電負載移轉至離峰時段。儲熱式電暖器或熱水器等設備可連接電表，自動開啟或關閉，藉此降低尖峰需求及用戶電費。
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.technology_status_summary_en: Switch connected to an electricity meter turning on in periods of off-peak tariffs (under a time-of-use (TOU) pricing scheme).
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.market_dynamics_summary_en: Time of Use (TOU) tariffs (static in many cases) give an incentive for customers to shift their load to off-peak hours. Devices such as storage heaters or water heaters can be connected to the meter to automatically turn on/off, reducing peak demand and reducing electricity bills for consumers.
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.description: Switch connected to an electricity meter turning on in periods of off-peak tariffs (under a time-of-use (TOU) pricing scheme).
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.NZErationale: Time of Use (TOU) tariffs (static in many cases) give an incentive for customers to shift their load to off-peak hours. Devices such as storage heaters or water heaters can be connected to the meter to automatically turn on/off, reducing peak demand and reducing electricity bills for consumers.

initiatives.description:
In Great Britain, the vast majority of customers with storage heaters (1.7m) are on ToU tariffs, such as Economy 7, and have their meter controlled by radio teleswitch devices. Over 1.3m of them are on 'static' switching schedules, but around 200,000 meters are 'dynamically' controlled, with switching schedules changing on a daily basis.
Smart meters are expected to take over in the future. Some other countries (United States, New Zealand, etc) also have other load management schemes, sometimes incentive-based.
India launches efforts on smart metering and Time of Day electricity tariffs to increase flexibility in electricity grid and manage growing demand and deployment of renewables.

tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Interval-time of use meter
tech_0152_interval-time-of-use-meter.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 分時電價電表控制開關

tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.technology_status_summary_zh: 可程式化溫控器可依使用者的室內溫控偏好，完整設定暖通空調（HVAC）系統的運轉時程。智慧型溫控器的功能遠超過傳統溫控器所採用的簡易排程，還可納入自我學習演算法、預測式建築控制、個別使用者控制及溫度分區控制。
tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 視建築需求及氣候條件而定，智慧型溫控器可使供暖與冷房需求降低 20% 至 40%；但其提供的多種服務也可能引發反彈效應，反而增加能源使用。
tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.technology_status_summary_en: Programmable thermostat allowing full control schedules for HVAC operation, based on the user's climate control preferences. A smart thermostat goes far beyond relying on a simple schedule that traditional thermostats might rely on, and can include self-learning algorithms, predictive building controls, occupant level controls, and thermal zoning.
tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.market_dynamics_summary_en: Smart thermostats can reduce heating and cooling demand by 20% to 40% depending on building needs and climate conditions, but could also increase energy use from the rebound effect of the multiple services it can provide.
tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.description: Programmable thermostat allowing full control schedules for HVAC operation, based on the user's climate control preferences. A smart thermostat goes far beyond relying on a simple schedule that traditional thermostats might rely on, and can include self-learning algorithms, predictive building controls, occupant level controls, and thermal zoning.
tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.NZErationale: Smart thermostats can reduce heating and cooling demand by 20% to 40% depending on building needs and climate conditions, but could also increase energy use from the rebound effect of the multiple services it can provide.

initiatives.description: A project on "The Smart Thermostat with Heating Power Adjustment" supported by the European Union.
IEA USERS TCP

tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Programmable thermostat
tech_0153_programmable-thermostat.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 可程式化溫控器

tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.technology_status_summary_zh: 此系統是中央鍋爐或區域供熱迴路，與各公寓供暖及熱水系統之間的介面，可透過水力控制讓建築使用者調節溫度；相較於恆溫控制，可維持更穩定的溫度。
tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術的普及程度取決於集中供熱系統的分布情形；相較於傳統系統，可提供更穩定的溫度控制。
tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.technology_status_summary_en: Interface between a central boiler or district heat circuit and the heating and hot water system of individual apartments, which also deliver temperature control to the building occupants by hydraulic control providing a more stable temperature compared to thermostatic control.
tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.market_dynamics_summary_en: Diffusion is dependent on the distribution of centralised heating systems; provides more stable temperature control when compared to traditional systems.
tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.description: Interface between a central boiler or district heat circuit and the heating and hot water system of individual apartments, which also deliver temperature control to the building occupants by hydraulic control providing a more stable temperature compared to thermostatic control.
tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.NZErationale: Diffusion is dependent on the distribution of centralised heating systems; provides more stable temperature control when compared to traditional systems.

initiatives.description: Vital Energi won a contract worth £4.2 M to transform three 1950s-built estates in Shoreditch, East London. They were able to replace inefficient gas and oil fired boilers with a council-owned combined heat and power plant. Vital Energi's hydraulic interface units were used in the project.

tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Building energy management systems > Proportional hydraulic control for buildings
tech_0154_proportional-hydraulic-control.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 建築比例式水力控制

tech_0155_building-energy-management-sof.technology_status_summary_zh: 建築能源管理軟體是用於監測、控制及最佳化建築能源使用的軟體。其形式多元，從最佳化單棟建築內單一鍋爐或熱泵運轉的簡易程式，到用於管理多棟建築的企業級軟體皆包括在內。
tech_0155_building-energy-management-sof.technology_status_summary_en: Building energy management software refers to software used to monitor, control and optimize the energy consumption of buildings. They come in different variations, from simple programs that optimizes the operation of a single boiler or heat pump in a building, to enterprise software used to manage multiple buildings.
tech_0155_building-energy-management-sof.description: Building energy management software refers to software used to monitor, control and optimize the energy consumption of buildings. They come in different variations, from simple programs that optimizes the operation of a single boiler or heat pump in a building, to enterprise software used to manage multiple buildings.

initiatives.description: French multinational Schneider Electric announced in 2024 that its Wiser Home app provides AI-optimised energy management of two of the biggest power loads in the home – water heaters and electric vehicle chargers, reducing energy bills through automated load management and predictive energy consumption scheduling. The AI-powered feature analyses user habits and preferences, real-time weather forecasts, tariff data, power contract limits and solar production capability to optimise energy savings by shifting power loads in the home.

The new heat pump from UK-based company Wondrwall, released in 2024, uses an AI-powered home energy management system (HEMS), that learns the thermal performance of the home, typical energy use and user preferences in order to adapt flow temperatures and heating schedules based on occupancy and user behaviours. Trials undertaken by Wondrwall, in collaboration with the Department of Energy Security and Net Zero found that, in an average new-build home in the United Kingdom, Wondrwall reduced energy bills by 87% when compared to the same home with just the heat pump alone.

In early 2025, the Centre for Computational Technologies in India introduced a new software leveraging Agentic AI that enables automated decision-making in complex building simulations, including the assignation of smart defaults for materials, designs and HVAC baseline systems based on selected region energy code and climate zone.

Dabbels AI-based software reduced energy consumption in Berlins Treptower building with 33%.
The software has been used in at least 10 other and led to similar energy savings.

tech_0155_building-energy-management-sof.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 建築能源管理系統 > 建築能源管理軟體

tech_0156_fibre-optic-daylighting.technology_status_summary_zh: 此技術結合光纖與太陽光集光器，將自然光傳送至白天通常不易採光的區域，又稱「遠端光源照明」。
tech_0156_fibre-optic-daylighting.technology_status_summary_en: Fibre optics combined with solar light collectors to transmit daylight in zones usually hard to light in the day, also called "remote source lighting".
tech_0156_fibre-optic-daylighting.description: Fibre optics combined with solar light collectors to transmit daylight in zones usually hard to light in the day, also called "remote source lighting".
tech_0156_fibre-optic-daylighting.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Lighting technologies and control systems > Fibre-optic daylighting
tech_0156_fibre-optic-daylighting.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 照明技術與控制系統 > 光纖自然採光

tech_0157_lighting-control-system.technology_status_summary_zh: 先進的自然採光系統整合多種控制方式，可避免在不需要時開啟 LED 照明，以最佳化 LED 系統的使用，並能依自然光照度調整電力輸入。
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 可依自然光調整輸出功率，並在室內無人時自動關閉的 LED 照明，有助於降低照明用電；依人員行為及建築使用情形等因素，可節省 20% 至 40%。
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.technology_status_summary_en: Advanced daylighting systems include a wide variety of controls to optimise the use of LED systems by avoiding their use when it is not necessary. They are also able to adjust electrical input depending on natural daylight.
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.market_dynamics_summary_en: LEDs whose power can adjust to natural daylight and turn off when nobody is in a room will help reduce electricity use for lighting (by 20 to 40% depending on people's behaviour, building usage, etc).
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.description: Advanced daylighting systems include a wide variety of controls to optimise the use of LED systems by avoiding their use when it is not necessary. They are also able to adjust electrical input depending on natural daylight.
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.NZErationale: LEDs whose power can adjust to natural daylight and turn off when nobody is in a room will help reduce electricity use for lighting (by 20 to 40% depending on people's behaviour, building usage, etc).
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Lighting technologies and control systems > Lighting control system
tech_0157_lighting-control-system.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 照明技術與控制系統 > 照明控制系統

tech_0158_conventional-led.technology_status_summary_zh: 發光二極體（LED）採用固態照明技術，可產生具方向性的單色光；相較於傳統白熾燈泡或省電燈泡，具有極高效率及更長的使用壽命。若要產生白光，LED 可採用螢光粉轉換，或紅、綠、藍三色（RGB）混光系統。
tech_0158_conventional-led.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較於其他照明技術，LED 具有高效率及使用壽命長的優勢，且其成本已開始具備與傳統照明競爭的能力。
tech_0158_conventional-led.technology_status_summary_en: Light-emitting diodes (LED) use solid state technology to produce a directional and monochromatic light at very high efficiency and long lifetimes compared to traditional incandescent or compact fluorescent light bulbs. To create white light, LED can either use phosphor conversion or (red, green and blue) RGB systems.
tech_0158_conventional-led.market_dynamics_summary_en: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting, and already starting to be cost-competitive with traditional lighting.
tech_0158_conventional-led.description: Light-emitting diodes (LED) use solid state technology to produce a directional and monochromatic light at very high efficiency and long lifetimes compared to traditional incandescent or compact fluorescent light bulbs. To create white light, LED can either use phosphor conversion or (red, green and blue) RGB systems.
tech_0158_conventional-led.NZErationale: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting, and already starting to be cost-competitive with traditional lighting.
tech_0158_conventional-led.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Lighting technologies and control systems > Conventional LED
tech_0158_conventional-led.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 照明技術與控制系統 > 傳統型 LED

tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.technology_status_summary_zh: 直流照明是指以直流電（DC）驅動的發光二極體（LED），可直接連接直流電網，省去使用傳統交流電網時所需的交流轉直流電力轉換。
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 可直接連接太陽光電系統。
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.technology_status_summary_en: Direct current lighting refers to light-emitting diodes (LED) run on direct current (DC) and able to be connected directly to a DC grid to avoid the AC/DC conversion required with the traditional AC grid.
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.market_dynamics_summary_en: Possibility to link them directly to PV systems.
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.description: Direct current lighting refers to light-emitting diodes (LED) run on direct current (DC) and able to be connected directly to a DC grid to avoid the AC/DC conversion required with the traditional AC grid.
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.NZErationale: Possibility to link them directly to PV systems.

initiatives.description: CityTec is involved in a direct current lighting system of a business park.
ATX LED offers dc lighting as a commercial product, present all across the US
Cence offer dc lighting as commercial product with several case studies

tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Lighting technologies and control systems > Direct current lighting
tech_0159_direct-current-lighting.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 照明技術與控制系統 > 直流照明

tech_0160_organic-led.technology_status_summary_zh: 有機發光二極體（OLED）是一種固態照明技術，能以高效率產生漫射光源，非常適合用於照明及顯示器。OLED 也可製作於可撓式基板上，便於整合至家具與建築構件中。OLED 分為小分子型及聚合物型（PLED）兩類，目前多數 OLED 採用小分子型。
tech_0160_organic-led.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較於其他照明技術，具有高效率及使用壽命長的優勢。
tech_0160_organic-led.technology_status_summary_en: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLED) are a solid state technology that produce a diffuse light source at high efficiency, making them ideal for use in lighting and displays. They can also be produced on flexible substrates, allowing incorporation into furniture and architecture. There are two types of OLEDs, small-molecular and polymer (PLED). The majority of OLEDs today use the small-molecular subtype.
tech_0160_organic-led.market_dynamics_summary_en: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting.
tech_0160_organic-led.description: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLED) are a solid state technology that produce a diffuse light source at high efficiency, making them ideal for use in lighting and displays. They can also be produced on flexible substrates, allowing incorporation into furniture and architecture. There are two types of OLEDs, small-molecular and polymer (PLED). The majority of OLEDs today use the small-molecular subtype.
tech_0160_organic-led.NZErationale: High efficiency and long lifetime compared to alternative lighting.

initiatives.description: Samsung Display builds $1.8 billion OLED plant in Vietnam

tech_0160_organic-led.id: Buildings > Operations and equipment > Lighting technologies and control systems > Organic LED
tech_0160_organic-led.id_zh: 建築 > 營運與設備 > 照明技術與控制系統 > 有機發光二極體

tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.technology_status_summary_zh: 設計工具可協助建築設計人員在新建或既有建築翻修的設計階段，評估不同技術組合的整體影響。此類工具可同時管理更多替代方案，協助找出最佳設計解決方案，並可用於最佳化材料選擇、幾何造型及建築座向等，以提升建築熱性能與採光表現。
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 是整合多項技術、使建築效能達到最佳化所必需的工具。
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.technology_status_summary_en: Design tools to support building designers in estimating the combined impact of the different technologies during the design phase of a new building or of a building renovation. Such tools allow management of a greater number of alternatives in finding optimal design solutions. Design tools can be used to optimise material choices,  geometry, building orientation for thermal and lighting performance, amongst other things.
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.market_dynamics_summary_en: Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.description: Design tools to support building designers in estimating the combined impact of the different technologies during the design phase of a new building or of a building renovation. Such tools allow management of a greater number of alternatives in finding optimal design solutions. Design tools can be used to optimise material choices,  geometry, building orientation for thermal and lighting performance, amongst other things.
tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.NZErationale: Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.

initiatives.description: MIT Sustainable Design Lab have developed a number of building energy modelling packages, with their key piece of software tackling urban building energy modelling to develop an understanding of the retrofit potential of urban areas.
EnergyPlus is a whole building energy simulation program, developed buy the US DoE, that engineers, architects, and researchers use to model both energy consumption and water use in buildings.
The Software EDGE has been used in over 120 countries for more than 122 million square meters of green floor space

tech_0161_building-design-optimization-t.id: Buildings > Design and envelope > Building design tools > Building design optimization tools

tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.technology_status_summary_zh: 此類建築沉浸式技術可建立施工現場的 3D 虛擬複本，供人員進行遠端即時查驗。
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 可免除建築查驗所需的差旅。
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.technology_status_summary_en: Immersive technologies for buildings enabling remote, real-time inspections of 3D virtual replicas of construction sites
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.market_dynamics_summary_en: Eliminates travel needs for buildings inspections
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.description: Immersive technologies for buildings enabling remote, real-time inspections of 3D virtual replicas of construction sites
tech_0162_construction-site-inspection-t.NZErationale: Eliminates travel needs for buildings inspections

tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.technology_status_summary_zh: 建築資訊模型（BIM）軟體是可建立及管理資料豐富之 3D 模型的數位工具，用以支援建築物與基礎設施的設計、施工及營運。
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 是整合多項技術、使建築效能達到最佳化所必需的工具，並可降低施工造成的氣候衝擊。
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.technology_status_summary_en: Building Information Modeling (BIM) software refers to digital tools that create and manage 3D models enriched with data to support the design, construction, and operation of buildings and infrastructure.
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.
Reduces climate impact of construction.
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.description: Building Information Modeling (BIM) software refers to digital tools that create and manage 3D models enriched with data to support the design, construction, and operation of buildings and infrastructure.
tech_0163_building-information-modeling-.NZErationale:
Necessary to combine technologies to maximise the performance of the building.
Reduces climate impact of construction.

initiatives.description: As of 2016, the UK government has made it a requirement that all government-procured projects are required to use BIM

tech_0164_composite-construction.technology_status_summary_zh: 複合構造是在主要結構構件中搭配使用兩種或以上的材料。例如：鋼柱搭配由鋼筋混凝土梁構成的樓板系統、鋼骨構架搭配混凝土核心、混凝土包覆型鋼柱、混凝土充填鋼管，以及木構架搭配混凝土核心等。
tech_0164_composite-construction.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 複合構造已在高層建築市場占有主導地位，且市占率逐年提高。
tech_0164_composite-construction.technology_status_summary_en: Composite construction uses a combination of two or more materials used together in the main structural elements. Examples include buildings which utilise: steel columns with a floor system of reinforced concrete beams; a steel frame system with a concrete core; concrete-encased steel columns; concrete-filled steel tubes; a timber frame with a concrete core, etc.
tech_0164_composite-construction.market_dynamics_summary_en: Composite construction is already dominating the high-rise construction market, and gaining market shares every year.
tech_0164_composite-construction.description: Composite construction uses a combination of two or more materials used together in the main structural elements. Examples include buildings which utilise: steel columns with a floor system of reinforced concrete beams; a steel frame system with a concrete core; concrete-encased steel columns; concrete-filled steel tubes; a timber frame with a concrete core, etc.
tech_0164_composite-construction.NZErationale: Composite construction is already dominating the high-rise construction market, and gaining market shares every year.

initiatives.description: CompoHouse is an experimental building which showcases the use of composite materials.
Lucas Museum of Narrative Art utilizes glass fibre-reinforced plastic as a composite material in the building.
Extensive uses of composite materials for the Mataf extension at the Holy Mosque of Mecca
Composite roof design of Jeddah station

The design brief for the Velodrome asked for a lightweight construction leading to an integrated approach to design. A materially efficient double-curved cable net was chosen for the roof structure, providing the signature aesthetic structure with half the carbon footprint of the equivalent sized Aquatics centre. The cable-net design reduced the embodied carbon by 27% compared to a steel arch option. The seating supports were also integrated into the structural frame to avoid the need for a separate structure. The material strategies not only minimised embodied carbon but also worked in conjunction with other design features to produce the most energy efficient building in the Olympic Park, improving on 2006 energy efficiency building regulations by 31%, demonstrating the potential success of an integrated approach

tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.technology_status_summary_zh: 懸鏈線樓板是一種由拱殼與最佳化加勁肋組成的薄型混凝土構件。樓板及加勁肋的厚度不超過 20 公釐，因此可用低密度隔熱材料取代 70% 的混凝土，提升樓板的熱性能。
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 懸鏈線樓板系統平均比傳統樓板減少 70% 的混凝土用量，且無須配置鋼筋，環境效益也更佳。
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.technology_status_summary_en: The funicular floor is a thin concrete element consisting of vaults and optimised stiffening fins. The thickness of the slab and fins is no more than 20 mm, which allows 70% of the concrete to be replaced by low-density insulation materials to improve the thermal performance of the floor.
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.market_dynamics_summary_en: The funicular floor system uses (on-average) 70% less concrete than a traditional slab and uses no reinforcement. It also has better environmental performance.
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.description: The funicular floor is a thin concrete element consisting of vaults and optimised stiffening fins. The thickness of the slab and fins is no more than 20 mm, which allows 70% of the concrete to be replaced by low-density insulation materials to improve the thermal performance of the floor.
tech_0165_funicular-floor-system.NZErationale: The funicular floor system uses (on-average) 70% less concrete than a traditional slab and uses no reinforcement. It also has better environmental performance.

initiatives.description: The Rippmann Floor System is a pre-fabricated Funicular floor system that is being deployed in several places

tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.technology_status_summary_zh: 薄殼混凝土屋頂是一種夾芯結構，可整合水循環式輻射冷暖系統、薄膜太陽光電系統等建築設備，同時作為輕量化屋頂。混凝土厚度介於 3 至 30 公分，並利用其特殊幾何形狀承受應力。
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較於合板，是更具永續性的材料。
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.technology_status_summary_en: A thin shelled concrete roof is a sandwich structure integrating buildings elements (e.g. a hydronic radiant heating and cooling system, thin film photovoltaic systems, etc.) while also serving as a lightweighted roof. The thickness of the concrete varies between 3 and 30 cm, and it withstands stress thanks to its specific shape.
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.market_dynamics_summary_en: More sustainable material compared to plywood.
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.description: A thin shelled concrete roof is a sandwich structure integrating buildings elements (e.g. a hydronic radiant heating and cooling system, thin film photovoltaic systems, etc.) while also serving as a lightweighted roof. The thickness of the concrete varies between 3 and 30 cm, and it withstands stress thanks to its specific shape.
tech_0166_thin-shelled-concrete.NZErationale: More sustainable material compared to plywood.

initiatives.description: NEST (Next Evolution in Sustainable Building Technologies) is a district scale project by Empa (Swiss Federal Laboratories for Materials Science and Technology) whose Hilo project (high performance, low-energy) integrates thin shelled roofs
