tech_0253_potassium-ion-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鉀離子（K-ion）電池的運作原理與鋰離子（Li-ion）及鈉離子（Na-ion）電池相同，但以鉀離子在充放電過程中於正極與負極之間傳遞能量。其主流正極活性材料通常使用蘊藏豐富的材料，不含鋰、鎳或鈷；因此與鈉離子化學體系相似，具有降低關鍵礦物需求的潛力。與鈉離子電池不同，鉀離子電池可採用石墨負極，因此能沿用既有鋰離子電池的石墨負極供應鏈。
tech_0253_potassium-ion-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 鉀離子電池的正極與負極材料不含鋰，也可能完全不含關鍵礦物。鉀蘊藏豐富，全球分布亦比鋰廣泛，可帶來供應鏈多元化的優勢。
tech_0253_potassium-ion-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Potassium-ion (K-ion) has the same working principle as lithium-ion (Li-ion) and sodium-ion (Na-ion) batteries, but uses potassium as ion to transfer energy from the cathode to the anode during battery charge and dischargeg. K-ion typically relies on abundant materials for its leading cathode active materials (which contain no lithium, nickel, nor cobalt), and thus, similarly to sodium-ion chemistries, they come with potential to reduce critical mineral demand. Unlike Na-ion, K-ion can use graphite anodes which means it can use the graphite anode supply chains developed for Li-ion batteries.
tech_0253_potassium-ion-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Potassium-ion batteries contain no lithium oand potentially no critical minerals in anode and cathode materials. Potassium is highly abundant and more globally distributed than lithium, which could offer supply chain diversification advantages.
tech_0253_potassium-ion-battery.description: Potassium-ion (K-ion) has the same working principle as lithium-ion (Li-ion) and sodium-ion (Na-ion) batteries, but uses potassium as ion to transfer energy from the cathode to the anode during battery charge and dischargeg. K-ion typically relies on abundant materials for its leading cathode active materials (which contain no lithium, nickel, nor cobalt), and thus, similarly to sodium-ion chemistries, they come with potential to reduce critical mineral demand. Unlike Na-ion, K-ion can use graphite anodes which means it can use the graphite anode supply chains developed for Li-ion batteries.
tech_0253_potassium-ion-battery.NZErationale: Potassium-ion batteries contain no lithium oand potentially no critical minerals in anode and cathode materials. Potassium is highly abundant and more globally distributed than lithium, which could offer supply chain diversification advantages.

initiatives.description: In April 2023, University College London published roadmap for Potassium-Ion Batteries on technical paper. It highlights PIBs are a promising alternative given its chemical and economic benefits, making a strong competitor to LIBs and sodium-ion batteries for different applications.
In March 2022, Advanced Research Projects Agency - Energy affiliated with U.S. DOE announced to start Project K developing and commercializing a potassium-ion battery.
In 2024, US start-up Group1 produced a potassium-ion cell in cylindrical form for the first time globally.

tech_0254_sodium-ion-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鈉離子（Na-ion）電池的運作原理與鋰離子電池相同，差別在於使用鈉陽離子取代鋰陽離子。鈉離子是目前最具可行性的電池化學體系之一，可滿足部分鋰離子電池的功能；其主要優勢是不含鋰，因此可避免鋰資源需求。主流正極與負極材料不同於鋰離子電池，部分鈉離子化學體系採用蘊藏豐富、可能更安全且成本較低的元素，並且不含鎳或鈷。然而，鈉離子電池的能量密度仍低於鋰離子電池，且因供應鏈成熟度較低，目前成本高於磷酸鐵鋰（LFP）電池。因此，其市場前景取決於能量密度能否提升，或鋰價是否高到足以使鈉離子電池比 LFP 電池更具成本優勢。此外，在 LFP 較不適用的特定情境，例如極寒氣候，鈉離子電池可能具有競爭優勢。
tech_0254_sodium-ion-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 鈉離子電池是目前唯一能在特定應用中取代鋰離子電池的商用電池化學體系，例如小型電動車、電池儲能系統，或在寒冷氣候下行駛的電動車。由於不含鋰，鈉離子電池可提供供應鏈多元化的優勢。
tech_0254_sodium-ion-battery.technology_status_summary_en: The working principle for sodium-ion (Na-ion) batteries is the same as Lithium-ion - the difference is the change in the cation (i.e. sodium instead of lithium). Na-ion is currently one of the most viable chemistries, capable of fulfilling some Li-ion functions, with the key advantage that it does not contain any lithium, thus avoiding lithium demand. Its leading anode and cathode materials are different from those used in Li-ion battery chemistries, and some Na-io chemistries is composed of abundant, potentially safe and low-cost elements containing no nickel or cobalt. Na-ion batteries still exhibits lower energy density than lithium-ion and are currently more expensive than lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries because of their less mature supply chain. Therefore, their market outlook hinges either on increasing its energy density or high lithium prices making Na-ion less expensive than LFP batteries. Besides, sodium-ion could provide a competitive advantage in certain applications where LFP is less suited, such as particularly cold climates.
tech_0254_sodium-ion-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Sodium-ion battery is the only commercial battery chemistry that can substitute lithium-ion batteries in certain applications, such as in small electric vehicles, battery storage, or electric vehicles operating in cold climates. As sodium-ion batteries do not contain lithium, they can offer supply chain diversification advantages.
tech_0254_sodium-ion-battery.description: The working principle for sodium-ion (Na-ion) batteries is the same as Lithium-ion - the difference is the change in the cation (i.e. sodium instead of lithium). Na-ion batteries still exhibits lower energy density than lithium-ion and are currently more expensive than lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries because of their less mature supply chain. Therefore, their market outlook hinges either on increasing its energy density or high lithium prices making Na-ion less expensive than LFP batteries. Besides, sodium-ion could provide a competitive advantage in certain applications where LFP is less suited, such as particularly cold climates.

initiatives.description: CATL announced plans to mass manufacture sodium-ion batteries by 2024
A large scale (100 MW/200 MWh) sodium-ion battery energy storage system goes into operation in 2024 in China.
CATL announced that its first-generation sodium-ion cells cost about 77 USD per kWh, and the second generation with volume production can drop to 40 USD per kWh.
In May 2022, Natron stated to kick off mass-production of long-life sodium-ion batteries in 2023.
In 2023, HiNa Battery, becomes 1st battery maker to put sodium-ion batteries in Evs in China
In 2024, BYD began building its first sodium-ion battery plant in China.
Experimental demonstration of the use of hard carbon as anode material for sodium-ion batteries, which is the relevant anode material still today.
In 2025, CATL released its second generation sodium-ion battery and announced its Naxtra sodium-ion battery brand. Naxtra passenger car battery will be mass-produced from December 2025.
In 2025, Hina released its second generation sodium-ion battery.
In 2021, CATL presented its first generation sodium-ion battery.
Sodium-ion batteries from CATL and BYD announced to be to be installed in mass-produced cars by Q4 2023.
CATL presents its freevoy hybrid battery, which can combine different type of lithium-ion battery chemistries, as well as lithium-ion and sodium-ion battery cells in the same EV battery pack.
First intercalation materials for sodium-ion batteries are studied.
The NASICON material, used as solid-electrolyte for solid sodium-ion batteries, is identified.

BYD launched a mass-produced sodium-ion battery counterbalance forklift, targeting industrial applications requiring reliable performance in cold conditions (reported operating range: -40 °C to 60 °C).
In December 2025, CATL confirmed plans for commercial-scale deployment across multiple sectors from 2026, including battery swap systems, passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles and energy storage.
In January 2026, CATL announced a new sodium battery dedicated for light commercial vehicle applications.

tech_0255_batteries-using-hybrid-chemist.technology_status_summary_zh: 混合式電池組可結合不同電池化學體系的優點，提高電動車電池組的性能彈性。例如，在同一電池組中結合磷酸鐵鋰（LFP）與鎳錳鈷（NMC）電池，可獲得比純 LFP 電池組更長的續航里程，同時使生產成本低於純 NMC 電池組。另一例是將 LFP 與鈉離子電池組合，不僅生產成本低，還可利用鈉離子電池補足 LFP 電池在寒冷氣候下性能較差的問題。更複雜的設計可讓 NMC 或 LFP 電池負責日常使用，並只在需要特別長續航里程時啟用鋰金屬電池；鋰金屬電池雖具高能量密度，但循環壽命較短。此配置可在不犧牲整體電池組壽命的情況下，實現超長續航里程。
tech_0255_batteries-using-hybrid-chemist.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 道路運輸電氣化需要針對特定應用調校性能的電池，而混合式電池可提供更大的性能配置彈性。
tech_0255_batteries-using-hybrid-chemist.technology_status_summary_en: Hybrid battery packs can enable combining the advantages of different chemistries to increase the flexibility of the EV battery pack. For example, combining LFP and NMC batteries in the same pack enable to obtain longer ranges than LFP battery packs while maintaining prouction cost lower than pure NMC packs. Another example is the combination of LFP and sodium-ion in the same pack, enabling low production cost while being able to leverage on sodium-ion to compensate for lower performance in cold climates of LFP batteries. More complext designs can also consider the use of NMC of LFP batteries that are used routinely, and lithium metal batteries - which offers high energy density at the cost of low cycle ife - that are used only when particularly long ranges are required, unlocking ultra-long ranges without compromising the overall battery pack lifetime.
tech_0255_batteries-using-hybrid-chemist.market_dynamics_summary_en: Aelectrification of road transport will require batteries with properties tuned for specific applications, and hybrid batteries can enable greater performance flexibility.
tech_0255_batteries-using-hybrid-chemist.description: Hybrid battery packs can enable combining the advantages of different chemistries to increase the flexibility of the EV battery pack. For example, combining LFP and NMC batteries in the same pack enable to obtain longer ranges than LFP battery packs while maintaining prouction cost lower than pure NMC packs. Another example is the combination of LFP and sodium-ion in the same pack, enabling low production cost while being able to leverage on sodium-ion to compensate for lower performance in cold climates of LFP batteries. More complext designs can also consider the use of NMC of LFP batteries that are used routinely, and lithium metal batteries - which offers high energy density at the cost of low cycle ife - that are used only when particularly long ranges are required, unlocking ultra-long ranges without compromising the overall battery pack lifetime.
tech_0255_batteries-using-hybrid-chemist.NZErationale: Aelectrification of road transport will require batteries with properties tuned for specific applications, and hybrid batteries can enable greater performance flexibility.

tech_0256_almost-solid-state-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 準固態電池（SSB）是現有先進鋰離子電池極具潛力的演進方向。其易燃液態電解質大部分由固態電解質取代，但仍保留少量液態電解質，以填充電極孔隙，通常是正極孔隙；目前此技術正吸引大量關注與投資。固態電解質可望搭配鋰金屬或矽等高能量密度負極，提高整體能量密度，且本身不易燃，可提升安全性。然而，這兩項優勢仍須在電池組層級獲得證實；目前挑戰包括需要高堆疊壓力，以及「電芯呼吸」，亦即鋰或矽負極膨脹，使電芯在充放電循環中發生體積變化。此外，「固態電池」尚無完全一致的定義，範圍可涵蓋使用加熱型聚合物電解質或凝膠電解質的半固態電池、含少量液態電解質的準固態電池，以及只使用固態電解質的全固態電池。除電解質與負極外，固態電池通常沿用與鋰離子電池相同的正極材料。
tech_0256_almost-solid-state-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 固態電池可望實現更高能量密度，促進整體運輸電氣化，尤其有利於中型及重型卡車的電動化。
tech_0256_almost-solid-state-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Almost solid-state batteries (SSBs) are a promising evolution of state-of-the-art lithium-ion batteries, where the liquid (flammable) electrolyte is mostly substituted with a solid electrolyte, but some liquid electrolyte is still used to fill the electroddes' porosity, typically that of the cathode. They are currently attracting major interest and investments. The advantages of using solid electrolytes are that it can potentially allow for higher energy density anodes (such as lithium metal or silicon), leading to higher energy density, and that they are not flammable, leading to safety benefits. Both of these benefits, however, still need to be demonstrated at the battery pack level, in which challenges persist, such as the need for high stack pressure and “cell breathing” (battery cells changing their volume during cycling due to volume expansion of the lithium or silicon anode). Lastly, it should be noted that “solid-state batteries” are not perfectly defined yet, and can range from "semi solid-state batteries", for example using polymer electrolyte that is heated during operation and gel-based electrolyte, almost-SSBs that embed a small volume of liquid electrolytes, and all-SSBs that uses only solid electrolytes. Besides the electrolyte and anode, SSBs typically use the same cathode materials as lithium-ion batteries.
tech_0256_almost-solid-state-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Solid-state batteries could unlock higher energy density and allow greater penetration of transport electrification in general, and of medium- and heavy-duty trucks in particular.
tech_0256_almost-solid-state-battery.description: Almost solid-state batteries (SSBs) are a promising evolution of state-of-the-art lithium-ion batteries, where the liquid (flammable) electrolyte is mostly substituted with a solid electrolyte, but some liquid electrolyte is still used to fill the electroddes' porosity, typically that of the cathode. They are currently attracting major interest and investments. The advantages of using solid electrolytes are that it can potentially allow for higher energy density anodes (such as lithium metal or silicon), leading to higher energy density, and that they are not flammable, leading to safety benefits. Both of these benefits, however, still need to be demonstrated at the battery pack level, in which challenges persist, such as the need for high stack pressure and “cell breathing” (battery cells changing their volume during cycling due to volume expansion of the lithium or silicon anode). Lastly, it should be noted that “solid-state batteries” are not perfectly defined yet, and can range from "semi solid-state batteries", for example using polymer electrolyte that is heated during operation and gel-based electrolyte, almost-SSBs that embed a small volume of liquid electrolytes, and all-SSBs that uses only solid electrolytes. Besides the electrolyte and anode, SSBs typically use the same cathode materials as lithium-ion batteries.
tech_0256_almost-solid-state-battery.NZErationale: Solid-state batteries could unlock higher energy density and allow greater penetration of transport electrification in general, and of medium- and heavy-duty trucks in particular.

initiatives.description: In 2022, Amptricity (United States) announced its first solid-state battery for home energy storage, with plants to deploy up to 4 GWh in the next three years. Commercial 1 MWh demo units were available to select customers.
In May 2022, Samsung SDI scheduled a call to announce they would start pilot producing solid-state batteries in 2024 to power a series EV in 2028.
In January 2022 at CES, Toyota announced that its first vehicle to use solid-state batteries will go on sale by 2025 in an interview with Autoline.

In February 2023, Nissan illustrated his future plan included getting a pilot production plant producing the first solid-state batteries by 2025, completing the initial application engineering by 2026, and then the vehicle application in 2028.

In January 2023, BMW announced BMW and battery developer Solid Power would expand plans to collaborate on solid-state battery technology, with plans to begin testing vehicles will these cells in 2023. BMW said a working prototype with solid-state batteries would be presented before 2025, but market launch timing remains fluid for now.

In 2024, an all-solid-state battery pilot line was set up in the Samsung SDI R&D Center in Suwon last year and is currently delivering prototype samples with the intention of mass-producing all-solid-state batteries by 2027. Samsung’s latest solid-state EV battery, which boasts an energy density of 500 Wh/kg, and was announced to be capable of a 600-mile charge in nine minutes and a 20-year lifespan.
In 2024, QuantumScape completes the development of the production process for its solid-state cells, laying the foundation for producing larger quantities of its B-sample cells in 2025.

A Chinese government-led battery alliance including large producers such as CATL, BYD, SAIC, and Geely was created in 2024 for R&D in the solid-state battery space and is set to receive investment of more than USD 830 million in solid-state battery research.

In 2024, Samsung announced that its pilot solid-state EV battery production line is now fully operational. An all-solid-state battery pilot line was set up in the Samsung SDI R&D Center in Suwon, Korea, in 2024 and is currently delivering prototype samples with the intention of mass-producing all-solid-state batteries by 2027. Samsung’s latest solid-state EV battery has an energy density of 500 Wh/kg can can charge up to 80% in less than 10 minutes.

Factorial Energy has scaled up the first of its Solstice solid-state battery cells developed with Mercedes-Benz to a capacity of 40 Ah. The US developer revealed the A-samples, characterized by their dry cathodes, in relevant sizes for electric cars.
Toyota’s all-solid-state EV battery plans officially gained approval from Japan’s Ministry of Trade and Industry.
BYD confirmed plans to rolling out EVs using solid-state batteries starting in 2027, with mass production planned in 2030.
Samsung announced plans to start solid-state batteries mass production in 2027.
In 2025, Toyota announced plans to launch its solid‑state battery powered EV in 2027 or 2028.
QuantumScape solid state batteries were tested and showcased in a Ducati motorcycle.

Discovery of the first solid electrolyte with the room temperature ionic conductivity as high of that of liquid electrolytes, opening up the opportunity to the development of solid-state batteries for mass markets.
Discovery of Lithium phosphorus oxynitride (LIPON), a solid electrolyte enabling the first thin film solid-state batteries.
A scientific publication making a clear distinction between all-solid, almost-solid, and semi-solid state batteries.
Accademic ublication rising the challenges and potential benefits of SSBs.
Quantum Scape develops its first 24-layer solid state battery cell.
BASQUEVOLT announced third party testing of its 20 Ah pouch cell to selected partners and potential customers.
Factorial presented its 40 Ah solid state battery cell (A-sample).
The Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer NIO tested a 150 kWh semi-solid-state battery from WeLion in 2023, claiming to have achieved over 1000 km range in a single charge.

Verge Motorcycles announced that its subsidiary, Donut Lab, has developed a solid-state energy storage technology intended for deployment across all 2026 models. However, no technical specifications or material details have been released, and there are doubts as to whether the system is a proper rechargeable battery or adifferent system, such a capacitor.
Factorial Energy, a US‑based company, has announced plans to list on public markets following real‑world tests demonstrating an electric‑vehicle range of more than 700 miles.

tech_0257_semi-solid-state-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 半固態電池通常將鋰金屬等高能量密度負極與聚合物電解質結合。若要達到電動車應用所需的性能，這類電池通常須在 60°C 至 90°C 的溫度範圍內運作。鋰金屬雖可提高能量密度，但也會增加製造複雜度，並因其高反應性而需要更嚴格的安全措施。
tech_0257_semi-solid-state-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 固態電池可望實現更高能量密度，促進整體運輸電氣化，尤其有利於中型及重型卡車的電動化；半固態電池則是朝此方向發展的重要基礎。
tech_0257_semi-solid-state-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Semi-solid-state batteries typically combine a high-energy-density anode, such as lithium metal, with a polymer electrolyte. To achieve performance levels suitable for electric vehicle applications, these batteries often require operating temperatures between 60 °C and 90 °C. While the use of lithium metal enables higher energy density, it also increases manufacturing complexity and necessitates enhanced safety measures to manage the high reactivity of lithium metal.
tech_0257_semi-solid-state-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Solid-state batteries could unlock higher energy density and allow greater penetration of transport electrification in general, and of medium- and heavy-duty trucks in particular. Semi-solid state batteries are a basis towards that direction.
tech_0257_semi-solid-state-battery.description: Semi-solid-state batteries typically combine a high-energy-density anode, such as lithium metal, with a polymer electrolyte. To achieve performance levels suitable for electric vehicle applications, these batteries often require operating temperatures between 60 °C and 90 °C. While the use of lithium metal enables higher energy density, it also increases manufacturing complexity and necessitates enhanced safety measures to manage the high reactivity of lithium metal.
tech_0257_semi-solid-state-battery.NZErationale: Solid-state batteries could unlock higher energy density and allow greater penetration of transport electrification in general, and of medium- and heavy-duty trucks in particular. Semi-solid state batteries are a basis towards that direction.

initiatives.description: A scientific publication identifies the potential of poly-ethylene oxide (PEO) for conduction alkali metal ions.
SONY announced the establishment of a plant producing lithium-ion polymer batteries.
France: Blue Solutions already serves some vehicles using semi-solid-state batteries (lithium metal polymer batteries) based on a polymer electrolyte and a lithium metal anode.
CATL launches condensed battery with an energy density of up to 500 Wh/kg, aiming electrification of passenger aircrafts.
Bluebus from the Bollore group are deployed in France using their semi-solid state technology based on lithium metal polymer technology.
Some fire to buses in Paris using lithium metal polymer batteries lead to the retirement of those buses from the market.
Two years after the fires, over 200 Bluebuses were reintroduced in Paris after the implementation of additional safety features.
Blue Solution announced plans to invest over 2 billion euros in battery production.

tech_0258_all-solid-state-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 固態電池（SSB）是現有先進鋰離子電池極具潛力的演進方向，以固態電解質取代易燃液態電解質，目前正吸引大量關注與投資。固態電解質可望搭配鋰金屬或矽等高能量密度負極，提高整體能量密度，且本身不易燃，可提升安全性。然而，這兩項優勢仍須在電池組層級獲得證實；目前挑戰包括需要高堆疊壓力，以及「電芯呼吸」，亦即鋰或矽負極膨脹，使電芯在充放電循環中發生體積變化。此外，「固態電池」尚無完全一致的定義，範圍可涵蓋使用加熱型聚合物電解質或凝膠電解質的半固態電池、含少量液態電解質的準固態電池，以及只使用固態電解質的全固態電池。除電解質與負極外，固態電池通常沿用與鋰離子電池相同的正極材料。
tech_0258_all-solid-state-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 固態電池可望實現更高能量密度，促進整體運輸電氣化，尤其有利於中型及重型卡車的電動化。
tech_0258_all-solid-state-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Solid-state batteries (SSBs) are a promising evolution of state-of-the-art lithium-ion batteries, where the liquid (flammable) electrolyte is substituted with a solid electrolyte. They are currently attracting major interest and investments. The advantages of using solid electrolytes are that it can potentially allow for higher energy density anodes (such as lithium metal or silicon), leading to higher energy density, and that they are not flammable, leading to safety benefits. Both of these benefits, however, still need to be demonstrated at the battery pack level, in which challenges persist, such as the need for high stack pressure and “cell breathing” (battery cells changing their volume during cycling due to volume expansion of the lithium or silicon anode). Lastly, it should be noted that “solid-state batteries” are not perfectly defined yet, and can range from "semi solid-state batteries", for example using polymer electrolyte that is heated during operation and gel-based electrolyte, almost-SSBs that embed a small volume of liquid electrolytes, and all-SSBs that uses only solid electrolytes. Besides the electrolyte and anode, SSBs typically use the same cathode materials as lithium-ion batteries.
tech_0258_all-solid-state-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Solid-state batteries could unlock higher energy density and allow greater penetration of transport electrification in general, and of medium- and heavy-duty trucks in particular.

Lastly, it should be noted that “solid-state batteries” are not perfectly defined yet, and can range from "semi solid-state batteries", for example using polymer electrolyte that is heated during operation and gel-based electrolyte, almost-SSBs that embed a small volume of liquid electrolytes, and all-SSBs that uses only solid electrolytes. Besides the electrolyte and anode, SSBs typically use the same cathode materials as lithium-ion batteries.

BMW said a working prototype with solid-state batteries would be presented before 2025, but market launch timing remains fluid for now.

In 2024, an all-solid-state battery pilot line was set up in the Samsung SDI R&D Center in Suwon last year and is currently delivering prototype samples with the intention of mass-producing all-solid-state batteries by 2027. Samsung’s latest solid-state EV battery, which boasts an energy density of 500 Wh/kg, and was announced to be capable of a 600-mile charge in nine minutes and a 20-year lifespan.
In 2024, QuantumScape completes the development of the production process for its solid-state cells, laying the foundation for producing larger quantities of its B-sample cells in 2025.

A Chinese government-led battery alliance including large producers such as CATL, BYD, SAIC, and Geely was created in 2024 for R&D in the solid-state battery space and is set to receive investment of more than USD 830 million in solid-state battery research.

In 2024, Samsung announced that its pilot solid-state EV battery production line is now fully operational. An all-solid-state battery pilot line was set up in the Samsung SDI R&D Center in Suwon, Korea, in 2024 and is currently delivering prototype samples with the intention of mass-producing all-solid-state batteries by 2027. Samsung’s latest solid-state EV battery has an energy density of 500 Wh/kg can can charge up to 80% in less than 10 minutes.

Factorial Energy has scaled up the first of its Solstice solid-state battery cells developed with Mercedes-Benz to a capacity of 40 Ah. The US developer revealed the A-samples, characterized by their dry cathodes, in relevant sizes for electric cars.
Toyota’s all-solid-state EV battery plans officially gained approval from Japan’s Ministry of Trade and Industry.
BYD confirmed plans to rolling out EVs using solid-state batteries starting in 2027, with mass production planned in 2030.
Samsung announced plans to start solid-state batteries mass production in 2027.
In 2025, Toyota announced plans to launch its solid‑state battery powered EV in 2027 or 2028.
QuantumScape solid state batteries were tested and showcased in a Ducati motorcycle.

Discovery of the first solid electrolyte with the room temperature ionic conductivity as high of that of liquid electrolytes, opening up the opportunity to the development of solid-state batteries for mass markets.
Discovery of Lithium phosphorus oxynitride (LIPON), a solid electrolyte enabling the first thin film solid-state batteries.
A scientific publication making a clear distinction between all-solid, almost-solid, and semi-solid state batteries.
Accademic ublication rising the challenges and potential benefits of SSBs.
Quantum Scape develops its first 24-layer solid state battery cell.
Honda presents a demonstration production line for all-solid-state batteries.
BASQUEVOLT announced third party testing of its 20 Ah pouch cell to selected partners and potential customers.
Factorial presented its 40 Ah solid state battery cell (A-sample).
The Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer NIO tested a 150 kWh semi-solid-state battery from WeLion in 2023, claiming to have achieved over 1000 km range in a single charge.
WELION plans to achieve small-scale all-solid-state demonstration installations by 2027, targeting an energy density of 400Wh/kg.

Xpeng announced plans to use all-solid state batteries to power humanoid robots, an application that could drive the first phase of all solid-state battery adoption thanks to its lower sensitivity to battery prices and even greater requirements on safety.

Verge Motorcycles announced that its subsidiary, Donut Lab, has developed a solid-state energy storage technology intended for deployment across all 2026 models. However, no technical specifications or material details have been released, and there are doubts as to whether the system is a proper rechargeable battery or adifferent system, such a capacitor.

tech_0259_ai-assisted-battery-material-s.technology_name_zh: AI 輔助電池材料篩選
tech_0259_ai-assisted-battery-material-s.technology_status_summary_zh: AI 輔助電池材料篩選整合機器學習（ML）、高通量計算及自主實驗，加速找出並最佳化電化學儲能所需的電極、電解質與隔離膜材料。此技術結合源自密度泛函理論及實驗資料的大型材料資料庫、資料驅動的性質預測，以及由主動學習引導的閉迴路機器人測試。
tech_0259_ai-assisted-battery-material-s.technology_status_summary_en: AI-assisted battery-materials screening integrates machine learning (ML), high-throughput computation, and autonomous experimentation to accelerate the identification and optimisation of electrode, electrolyte, and separator materials for electrochemical energy storage. It combines large materials databases (from density-functional-theory and experimental data), data-driven property prediction, and closed-loop robotic testing guided by active learning.
tech_0259_ai-assisted-battery-material-s.description: AI-assisted battery-materials screening integrates machine learning (ML), high-throughput computation, and autonomous experimentation to accelerate the identification and optimisation of electrode, electrolyte, and separator materials for electrochemical energy storage. It combines large materials databases (from density-functional-theory and experimental data), data-driven property prediction, and closed-loop robotic testing guided by active learning.

initiatives.description: The Materials Project, a leading academic initiative that models and screens a wide range of materials to assess their potential for battery applications, was firstly presented.
A machine learning model was combined with robotics system to develop and test battery electrolytes.
A scientific publication review the application of artificial inteligence and machine learning applied to battery research, including materials discovery,
Machine learning is used to guide an autonomous laboratory aiming to discover new battery materials for the first time.

Aionics, an AI battery start-up, developed the world’s first AI-powered battery design platform to screen thousands of candidate materialsin seconds for potential new electrolyte designs, targetting electric aviation applications.

Microsoft and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory used AI to screen over 30 million materials for their potential use as solid electrolytes in less than a week and synthesised the most promising ones.

SES AI developed a new cylindrical Li-ion cell using a new electrolyte discovered by its AI system, with improved low-temperature operation, durability and safety, with targeted applications in drones and robotics.
IBM Research has used AI to develop a new chemistry free of nickel and cobalt but has provided little detail on the chemistry.
China develops autonomous laboratories for battery material reseach.

tech_0260_rare-earth-free-electric-motor.technology_status_summary_zh: 永磁同步馬達（PMSM）憑藉高功率密度、高效率及相對較低的製造成本，目前主導電動車市場。此類馬達依賴主要含釹及鏑的稀土磁鐵，這些磁鐵是目前已知磁力最強的永久磁鐵。然而，稀土元素供應鏈在地理上高度集中，價格亦曾大幅波動；相關材料開採與加工所造成的環境疑慮，更凸顯發展替代馬達技術的必要性。目前已有或正在開發多種無稀土馬達技術：1. 外部激磁同步馬達（EESM）已應用於量產車款，例如 Renault 與 BMW；其以電磁轉子磁場取代永久磁鐵，但製造較複雜，效率及功率密度通常低於 PMSM。2. 感應馬達廣泛用於較早期的電動車，例如 Tesla、Audi 與 Mercedes-Benz；其堅固且不含稀土，但通常效率較低、重量較重，因而市占率逐漸下降。3. 無稀土永久磁鐵的研發持續進行，目標是利用鐵氧體或氮化鐵化合物等替代材料製造高性能磁鐵。4. 新型同步馬達設計則運用材料科學及電力電子技術進展，力求在不使用稀土元素的情況下兼具高效率與緊湊尺寸。
tech_0260_rare-earth-free-electric-motor.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若目前主流馬達設計持續占優勢，隨電動車加速部署，稀土材料需求也將同步增加。由於稀土與永久磁鐵生產在地理上高度集中，可能引發供應鏈風險；無稀土替代方案則可望緩解這些問題。
tech_0260_rare-earth-free-electric-motor.technology_status_summary_en:
Permanent magnet synchronous motors (PMSMs) currently dominate the electric vehicle (EV) market due to their high power density, efficiency, and relatively low manufacturing costs. These motors rely on rare-earth magnets, primarily containing neodymium and dysprosium—the strongest known permanent magnetic materials. However, the supply chain for rare-earth elements is highly geographically concentrated and has experienced significant price volatility. Environmental concerns related to mining and processing of these materials further underline the need for alternative motor technologies.

A range of rare-earth-free electric motor technologies are available or under development:
(1) Externally excited synchronous motors (EESMs) – Already deployed in production vehicles (e.g. Renault, BMW). These motors eliminate the need for permanent magnets by using an electromagnetic rotor field. They are more complex to manufacture and typically have lower efficiency and power density compared to PMSMs. 
(2) Induction motors – Widely used in earlier EV generations (e.g. Tesla, Audi, Mercedes). They are robust and rare-earth-free but generally less efficient and heavier than PMSMs, which has led to declining market share. 
(3) Rare-earth-free permanent magnets – Research and development efforts are ongoing to produce high-performance magnets based on alternative materials, such as ferrites or iron–nitride compounds. 
(4) Novel synchronous motor concepts – Emerging designs aim to combine high efficiency and compactness without the use of rare-earth elements, supported by advances in materials science and power electronics.
tech_0260_rare-earth-free-electric-motor.market_dynamics_summary_en: With the current accelerating deployment of electric cars, the need for rare-earth materials will increase accordingly, if current dominant motor designs persist. This could pose supply chain issues because of the prare earths and permanent magnet production geographical concentration. Rare-earth free alternatives could alleviate these issues.

initiatives.description: In 2023, ZF presented a novel design called in-rotor inductive-excited synchronous motor, claiming to match performance and compactness of PMSMs wihtout the need for rare-earth materials.
Niron Magnetics is commercialising iron-nitrode magnets, with similar strength to NdFeB magnets.
In 2023, Tesla announced to deliver rare-earth free drivetrains for their next generation of EVs
In a joint project, Valeo and Mahle are developing new magnet-free electric motors for electric cars.
Toyota developed a electric motor permanent magnet, claiming up to 50% reduced need of rare earth elements.
Renault inaugurated a new electric motor production line, including the production of synchronous wound rotors, which does not require the use of a permanent magnet.
The research to develop and optimize iron-based permanent magnets continue
BMW developed an externally-excited synchronous motor.
The government of India provided funding to NITK for the development of rare earth free electric vehicle motors.

tech_0261_battery-electric-light-commerc.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動輕型商用車使用由多顆電芯組成的電池組，目前主要採用鋰離子電池。電池組搭配逆變器及電動馬達，將電池提供的電能轉換為機械能。
tech_0261_battery-electric-light-commerc.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 輕型道路運輸車輛電氣化，搭配再生能源與零碳發電占比提升，是輕型運輸去碳化最具潛力的技術途徑。
tech_0261_battery-electric-light-commerc.technology_status_summary_en: Light commercial electric vehicles use batteries (today principally Li-ion batteries) arranged in a battery pack. The battery pack is combined with inverters and an electric motor to convert electrical energy provided by the batteries into mechanical energy.
tech_0261_battery-electric-light-commerc.market_dynamics_summary_en: Electrification of light-duty road transport vehicles, together with increasing penetration of renewables and zero-carbon electricity generation, is the most promising technology opportunity for decarbonising light-duty transport.
tech_0261_battery-electric-light-commerc.description: Light commercial electric vehicles use batteries (today principally Li-ion batteries) arranged in a battery pack. The battery pack is combined with inverters and an electric motor to convert electrical energy provided by the batteries into mechanical energy.
tech_0261_battery-electric-light-commerc.NZErationale: Electrification of light-duty road transport vehicles, together with increasing penetration of renewables and zero-carbon electricity generation, is the most promising technology opportunity for decarbonising light-duty transport.

initiatives.description: In 2019, there were almost 377 000 e-LCVs on world’s roads. China has the largest electric LCV fleet worldwide (65% of the fleet). Many major postal and package delivery companies, among them Amazon, DHL, DB Schenker, FedEx, the Ingka Group (owned by Ikea), UPS, and the Swiss and Austrian postal services, have pledged to expand their electric fleets, through retrofits or outright purchases, in the near future.
The Kia PV5 Cargo has set a new Guinness World Record by travelling 430 miles fully loaded

The market share of newly registered battery electric vans (up to 3.5 tonnes) in the Netherlands jumped from 11% in the first half of 2024 to 78% in the first half of 2025. High sale shares also observed in the Nordics.

tech_0262_battery-electric-passenger-car.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動車（BEV）以可充電電池作為主要能源，目前幾乎全數採用鋰離子電池。電池由個別電芯組成，先組成模組，再組裝為電池組；部分設計則將電芯直接整合至電池組，省去中間模組，以提高能量密度並減輕重量。電池組透過包含逆變器在內的電力電子設備向電動馬達供電；逆變器將電池的直流電（DC）轉換為馬達所需的交流電（AC），再由馬達將電能轉換為機械能以驅動車輪。BEV 的能源效率明顯高於內燃機（ICE）車輛，平均約有 70% 的電池儲能可傳遞至車輪，而內燃機車僅約 20% 至 40%，因此 BEV 每公里能源消耗較低。續航里程取決於電池容量、車輛效率及駕駛條件，目前 BEV 每次充電通常可行駛 200 至 600 公里。
tech_0262_battery-electric-passenger-car.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 輕型道路運輸車輛電氣化，搭配再生能源與零碳發電占比提升，是輕型運輸去碳化最具潛力的技術途徑。
tech_0262_battery-electric-passenger-car.technology_status_summary_en:
Battery electric vehicles (BEVs) use rechargeable batteries—today almost exclusively lithium-ion—as their primary energy source. These batteries are composed of individual cells, which are grouped into modules and then assembled into a battery pack. In some designs, cells are integrated directly into the pack without intermediate modules to improve energy density and reduce weight.
The battery pack supplies electricity to an electric motor through power electronics, including inverters, which convert direct current (DC) from the battery into alternating current (AC) for the motor. The motor then converts electrical energy into mechanical energy to drive the wheels.
BEVs are significantly more energy-efficient than internal combustion engine (ICE) vehicles. On average, around 70% of the energy stored in the battery is delivered to the wheels, compared with 20–40% for ICE vehicles. This higher efficiency translates into lower energy consumption per kilometre.
Driving range depends on battery capacity, vehicle efficiency, and driving conditions. Current BEVs typically offer ranges between 200 and 600 km per charge.
tech_0262_battery-electric-passenger-car.market_dynamics_summary_en: Electrification of light-duty road transport vehicles, together with increasing penetration of renewables and zero-carbon electricity generation, is the most promising technology opportunity for decarbonising light-duty transport.

initiatives.description: First EV for mass market using lithium-ion batteries.
First mass-produced EV using lithium-ion batteries.
Global EV sales starting exponential growth
In 2024, about two-thirds f all electric cars sold in China in 2024 were priced lower than their conventional equivalents, without considering purchase incentives for EVs.

The price gap between electric cars and their conventional counterparts continues to narrow across many regions, with particularly rapid declines in emerging markets such as Southeast Asia, Mexico and Brazil, supporting sustained growth in sales.
Nissan teamed up with Sony to launch the world's first lithium-ion–powered car — the Prairie Joy EV — although it remained a limited prototype intended for fleet use.
Nissan introduced the Altra, the first series-produced electric car powered by lithium-ion batteries, making lithium-ion EV technology available beyond prototype fleets.

tech_0263_battery-electric-truck.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動卡車以電池系統為驅動車輛的電動馬達供電，目前幾乎全數採用鋰離子技術。電池與逆變器等電力電子設備整合為電池組，將儲存的電能轉換為推進所需的機械能。隨著電池能量密度提高、成本下降及充電基礎設施擴建，電池電動卡車正快速進入各類中型與重型車市場；部分已上市車型每次充電續航里程超過 500 公里，適用於日益增加的區域及長途運輸。重型卡車需要龐大的儲能容量及快速補充能源，以維持營運彈性，因此面臨特別嚴峻的挑戰。目前開發中的解決方案包括百萬瓦級高功率充電系統、換電，以及仍處於原型階段的固態電池等次世代化學體系。從總持有成本來看，每日行駛 500 公里的重型電池電動卡車，在中國已比同級柴油車便宜，歐洲預計於 2030 年達成類似目標。主要用於都市或區域物流的中型卡車，能源及續航需求較低，因此在成本與性能方面更接近內燃機車輛。電動卡車能否持續普及，將取決於充電基礎設施、電池技術、電網整合及政策支持的進展，以加快達成總持有成本競爭力，並降低貨運排放。
tech_0263_battery-electric-truck.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 公路貨運車輛電氣化，搭配再生能源與零碳發電占比提升，是重型運輸去碳化最具潛力的技術途徑。
tech_0263_battery-electric-truck.technology_status_summary_en:
Electric trucks use battery systems—today almost exclusively based on lithium-ion technology—to power electric motors that drive the vehicle. The batteries are integrated into a pack together with power electronics such as inverters, which convert the stored electrical energy into mechanical energy for propulsion.
Battery electric trucks are emerging rapidly across medium- and heavy-duty vehicle segments, supported by improvements in battery energy density, cost reductions, and the expansion of charging infrastructure. Some commercially available models now offer driving ranges exceeding 500 km per charge, suitable for a growing share of regional and long-haul applications.
Heavy-duty trucks, which require large energy storage capacity and fast refuelling to maintain operational flexibility, face particular challenges. Solutions under development include high-power (megawatt-scale) charging systems, battery swapping, and the use of next-generation chemistries such as solid-state batteries - currently at the prototype stage. From a total cost of ownership perspective, heavy duty battery electrc trucks with a 500 km daily route are already cheaper than their diesel equivalent in China. A similar target is projected to be reached in Europe by 2030.
Medium-duty trucks, used primarily in urban or regional logistics, have lower energy and range requirements and are therefore closer to cost and performance parity with internal combustion engine vehicles.
The continued deployment of electric trucks will depend on advances in charging infrastructure, battery technology, grid integration, and policy support to accelerate total-cost-of-ownership competitiveness and emissions reduction across freight transport.
tech_0263_battery-electric-truck.market_dynamics_summary_en: Electrification of freight road transport vehicles, together with increasing penetration of renewables and zero-carbon electricity generation, is the most promising technology opportunity for decarbonising heavy-duty transport.

In 2025 several electric truck models in China hit the market with a range of over 800 km

tech_0264_battery-electric-urban-transit.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動公車使用由多顆電芯組成的電池組，目前幾乎全數採用鋰離子電池。電池組搭配逆變器及電動馬達，將電池提供的電能轉換為機械能。長途客運巴士若要具備競爭力，可能需要專用基礎設施，例如換電或完善的充電設施，或採用高能量密度電池化學體系，例如目前仍處於原型階段的固態電池；這些方案的部署目前仍有限。市區公車因會在固定地點頻繁停靠，對續航里程及相關設施的要求明顯較低。
tech_0264_battery-electric-urban-transit.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 公車電氣化，搭配再生能源與零碳發電占比提升，是大眾運輸去碳化最具潛力的技術途徑之一。
tech_0264_battery-electric-urban-transit.technology_status_summary_en: Electric buses use batteries (today almost exclusively Li-ion batteries) arranged in a battery pack. The battery pack is combined with inverters and an electric motor to convert electrical energy provided by the batteries into mechanical energy. Long haul transit buses might require either devoted infrastructure (e.g. battery swapping or adequate charging infrastructure) or high-energy density battery chemistries (e.g. solid-state batteries, currently at the prototype stage) to be competitive, and deployment of these solutions is still limited. Urban buses have significantly lower requirements thanks to recurrent stops in predefined locations.
tech_0264_battery-electric-urban-transit.market_dynamics_summary_en: Electrification of buses, together with increasing penetration of renewables and zero-carbon electricity generation, is one of the most promising technology opportunity for decarbonising public transport.
tech_0264_battery-electric-urban-transit.description: Electric buses use batteries (today almost exclusively Li-ion batteries) arranged in a battery pack. The battery pack is combined with inverters and an electric motor to convert electrical energy provided by the batteries into mechanical energy. Long haul transit buses might require either devoted infrastructure (e.g. battery swapping or adequate charging infrastructure) or high-energy density battery chemistries (e.g. solid-state batteries, currently at the prototype stage) to be competitive, and deployment of these solutions is still limited. Urban buses have significantly lower requirements thanks to recurrent stops in predefined locations.
tech_0264_battery-electric-urban-transit.NZErationale: Electrification of buses, together with increasing penetration of renewables and zero-carbon electricity generation, is one of the most promising technology opportunity for decarbonising public transport.

initiatives.description: In the first 3 quarters of 2025 nearly one in four new buses in Europe was electric. In other parts of the world deployment is gearing up as well, with over 70,000 electric buses in Latin America, and 500 in Africa
In 2020, the global e-bus fleet reached over half a million

tech_0265_cell-to-chassis-battery-techno.technology_status_summary_zh: 電芯底盤一體化（CTC）技術將電芯直接整合至車輛底盤，再進一步整合馬達、電子控制系統，以及 DC/DC 轉換器、車載充電器（OBC）等車輛高壓設備；智慧電力域控制器則負責最佳化電力分配並降低能源消耗。透過移除標準電池組中的部分元件，此技術可望大幅提高能量密度。
tech_0265_cell-to-chassis-battery-techno.technology_status_summary_en: Cell-to-Chassis (CTC) technology integrates the battery cell with the chassis and then integrates the motor, electronic control, and vehicle high voltage such as DC/DC, OBC, etc, and an intelligent power domain controller optimises power distribution and reduces energy consumption. It could lead to a significant increase of energy density by removing some components of the standard battery packs.
tech_0265_cell-to-chassis-battery-techno.description: Cell-to-Chassis (CTC) technology integrates the battery cell with the chassis and then integrates the motor, electronic control, and vehicle high voltage such as DC/DC, OBC, etc, and an intelligent power domain controller optimises power distribution and reduces energy consumption. It could lead to a significant increase of energy density by removing some components of the standard battery packs.

initiatives.description: First mass market deployment of cell-to-body technology, increeasing EV battery energy density and decreasing their costs.

In September 2020, Tesla unveiled CTC technology at Battery Day. The battery cells or modules are installed in the body, connecting the front and rear body castings, and replacing cockpit floor with a battery upper cover. The technology is to be used in 2022 Model Y. Tesla predicts a 55% reduction in investment per GWH and a 35% reduction in space occupied with CTC technology. However, by end 2024, it was still unclear wheter this technology achieved mass market volume.

tech_0266_cell-to-pack-battery-technolog.technology_name_zh: 電芯直接整合電池組（CTP）技術
tech_0266_cell-to-pack-battery-technolog.technology_status_summary_zh: 電芯直接整合電池組（CTP）是取消電池組內傳統模組的電池架構。傳統方式會組裝多個各自包含電芯、熱管理元件及電氣連接的模組，CTP 則將所有電芯直接整合為單一大型結構單元。此設計可減少元件數量，集中管理電池管理與冷卻系統，並提高體積利用效率。CTP 是介於傳統電池組設計與電芯底盤一體化配置之間的過渡方案，可藉由簡化組裝及減少材料使用，提高能量密度並降低成本。
tech_0266_cell-to-pack-battery-technolog.technology_status_summary_en: Cell-to-Pack (CTP) refers to a battery architecture that eliminates traditional modules within a pack. Instead of assembling multiple modules—each containing cells, thermal management components, and electrical connections—the CTP approach integrates all battery cells directly into a single, large structural unit. This design reduces the number of components, centralizes battery management and cooling systems, and improves volumetric efficiency. As an intermediate step between conventional pack designs and cell-to-chassis configurations, CTP enables higher energy density and cost savings through simplified assembly and reduced material use.
tech_0266_cell-to-pack-battery-technolog.description: Cell-to-Pack (CTP) refers to a battery architecture that eliminates traditional modules within a pack. Instead of assembling multiple modules—each containing cells, thermal management components, and electrical connections—the CTP approach integrates all battery cells directly into a single, large structural unit. This design reduces the number of components, centralizes battery management and cooling systems, and improves volumetric efficiency. As an intermediate step between conventional pack designs and cell-to-chassis configurations, CTP enables higher energy density and cost savings through simplified assembly and reduced material use.

initiatives.description: First deployment of cell-to-pack technology, increeasing EV battery energy density and decreasing their costs. This technology opened the possibility to widespread adoption of LFP batteries in EV applications.
In 2022, Contemporary Amperex Intelligence Technology (CATL) launched its new cell-to-pack concept to be commercialized in 2023, further increasing volume utilization efficiency.
BYD launch of its prismatic blade battery, which also has a structural role in cell-to-pack configuration.

tech_0267_automated-and-connected-vehicl.technology_name_zh: 自動駕駛與聯網車輛（第 4 級以上）
tech_0267_automated-and-connected-vehicl.technology_status_summary_zh: 自動駕駛與聯網車輛運用先進感測、通訊及運算技術，實現只需極少或完全無須人為介入的駕駛功能。此類車輛可透過節能駕駛、最佳化路線規劃及車隊編隊行駛等策略改善交通流量，達到比人類駕駛車輛更高的能源效率；其採用電動化動力的可能性也較高，可進一步降低排放。若結合共享及共乘運輸模式，自動駕駛車輛可大幅降低每人公里的能源使用。然而，若要廣泛部署，軟體方面仍須推進人工智慧及用於感知與決策的機器學習，硬體方面則須改善感測器、高速通訊及車載運算。資安、互通性及基礎設施整備等問題，也將是技術規模化的關鍵。
tech_0267_automated-and-connected-vehicl.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若此類車輛同時具備共享、自動駕駛、聯網及電動化特性，主要可透過共乘／共享行程與車輛尺寸適配，減少車輛行駛公里數並提高車輛效率。然而，若這些技術僅部署於私人小客車，較低的移動成本可能引發反彈效應，並對大眾運輸造成不利影響。
tech_0267_automated-and-connected-vehicl.technology_status_summary_en:
Automated and connected vehicles leverage advanced sensing, communication, and computing technologies to enable driving functions with minimal or no human intervention. These vehicles can achieve higher energy efficiency than human-driven counterparts through strategies such as eco-driving, optimized routing, and platooning, which improve traffic flow. They are also more likely to adopt electrification, further lowering emissions.
When combined with shared and pooled mobility models, automated vehicles can deliver substantial reductions in energy use per passenger-kilometre. However, widespread deployment requires continued progress in software (artificial intelligence, machine learning for perception and decision-making) and hardware (sensors, high-speed communications, and onboard computing). Addressing challenges related to cybersecurity, interoperability, and infrastructure readiness will be critical for scaling these technologies.
tech_0267_automated-and-connected-vehicl.market_dynamics_summary_en: If these vehicles are shared, automated and connected (and electric), they may help to reduce vkm and increase vehicle efficiency, primarily through pooled/shared rides and vehicle right-sizing. However, if these technologies are deployed only in cars, low cost of mobility may lead to rebound, and/or adverse effects for public transit.

These vehicles can achieve higher energy efficiency than human-driven counterparts through strategies such as eco-driving, optimized routing, and platooning, which improve traffic flow. They are also more likely to adopt electrification, further lowering emissions.
When combined with shared and pooled mobility models, automated vehicles can deliver substantial reductions in energy use per passenger-kilometre. However, widespread deployment requires continued progress in software (artificial intelligence, machine learning for perception and decision-making) and hardware (sensors, high-speed communications, and onboard computing). Addressing challenges related to cybersecurity, interoperability, and infrastructure readiness will be critical for scaling these technologies.

However, if these technologies are deployed only in cars, low cost of mobility may lead to rebound, and/or adverse effects for public transit.

initiatives.description: Ongoing trials for shared, automated, and connected fleets around the world. One example is Waymo's service in San Francisco, California.
Carnegie Mellon University's Navlab 1, a full-size van equipped with computers and sensors, demonstrated autonomous driving capabilities in suburban neighborhoods.
Google started its "Google Self-Driving Car Project"

In January 2023, Mercedes became the first automaker to receive certification for level 3 autonomous driving in the United States, in which all aspects of driving can be automated, but the driver must remain available to take control if prompted to do so, and the first models are now available in California and Nevada
BYD has begun incorporating its level 2 autonomous driving “God’s Eye” system into low-cost EV models.
Tesla continues to pursue level 3 and level 4 autonomy, but is limited to level 2 at present.
China Huaneng Group commissioned the world's first fleet of 100 autonomous, all-electric mining trucks at the Yimin open-pit mine in Inner Mongolia
Chinese autonomous driving company Pony.ai operates over 720 robotaxis and 170 robotrucks
China's autonomous driving company Pony.ai announced that it has been granted permission to carry out cross-provincial expressway testing of unmanned truck platoons, the first such testing in China.

tech_0268_2-3w-charging.technology_status_summary_zh: 換電是傳統電動車充電的替代方案，旨在縮短補充能源所需時間。在換電站，電動車使用者可自動將電量耗盡的電池換成充飽電的電池，通常只需數分鐘。此方式可提高車輛使用率，並支持乘用車、二輪與三輪車，以及重型車輛等多個市場區隔的電動車部署。
tech_0268_2-3w-charging.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電動自行車與電動二輪／三輪車採用換電具有高度吸引力，主要原因是補充能源僅需數分鐘。此外，換電可協助減輕配電網與輸電網的負荷壓力，對印度等擁有大量電動機車的國家尤其重要。
tech_0268_2-3w-charging.technology_status_summary_en: Battery swapping is an alternative to conventional electric vehicle (EV) charging, designed to reduce refuelling time. At a battery swapping station, an EV user can automatically exchange a depleted battery for a fully charged one, typically in a matter of minutes. This approach can improve vehicle utilisation and support the deployment of EVs across multiple segments, from passenger cars to two- and three-wheelers and heavy-duty vehicles.
tech_0268_2-3w-charging.market_dynamics_summary_en: Battery swapping for e-bikes and electric 2/3 wheelersis very attractive for many reasons, primarily refuelling time, just a few minutes. Furthermore, battery swapping can help to  alleviate that the issue of strains on distribution and transmission grids, which is relevant in countries with large numbers of electric motorcycles, such as India.
tech_0268_2-3w-charging.description: Battery swapping is an alternative to conventional electric vehicle (EV) charging, designed to reduce refuelling time. At a battery swapping station, an EV user can automatically exchange a depleted battery for a fully charged one, typically in a matter of minutes. This approach can improve vehicle utilisation and support the deployment of EVs across multiple segments, from passenger cars to two- and three-wheelers and heavy-duty vehicles.
tech_0268_2-3w-charging.NZErationale: Battery swapping for e-bikes and electric 2/3 wheelersis very attractive for many reasons, primarily refuelling time, just a few minutes. Furthermore, battery swapping can help to  alleviate that the issue of strains on distribution and transmission grids, which is relevant in countries with large numbers of electric motorcycles, such as India.

initiatives.description: Gogoro is considered to be the leader in battery swapping for e-bikes. It has now expanded to India and Singapore with the aim to decarbonise last-mile deliveries.
Gogoro has more than 12 000 battery swapping stations in Chinese Taipei as of 2022 and supplied more than 500 000 riders.
India's Battery Smart company successfully rolled out >1500 battery swapping stations in 2025

tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.technology_name_zh: 車輛（不含二輪／三輪車）（充電）
tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.technology_status_summary_zh: 換電是傳統電動車充電的替代方案，旨在縮短補充能源所需時間。在換電站，電動車使用者可自動將電量耗盡的電池換成充飽電的電池，通常只需數分鐘。此方式可提高車輛使用率，並支持乘用車、二輪與三輪車，以及重型車輛等多個市場區隔的電動車部署。
tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 由於充電時間對部分電動車使用者構成限制，若高效率換電技術可在與內燃機車加油相近的時間內完成，將具有吸引力。換電站也可作為儲能設施，在尖峰用電時段協助降低電網負載。然而，受換電站成本及系統複雜度影響，目前市場較傾向優先發展快速與超快速充電器。此外，各換電站無法相容所有電動車型，因此此技術尚未準備好進行大規模商業化。
tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.technology_status_summary_en: Battery swapping is an alternative to conventional electric vehicle (EV) charging, designed to reduce refuelling time. At a battery swapping station, an EV user can automatically exchange a depleted battery for a fully charged one, typically in a matter of minutes. This approach can improve vehicle utilisation and support the deployment of EVs across multiple segments, from passenger cars to two- and three-wheelers and heavy-duty vehicles.
tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.market_dynamics_summary_en: With the electric vehicle (EV) charging time being a constraint for some consumers, an efficient battery swapping technology that could be implemented in a timeframe comparable to that of refuelling internal combustion engines could be attractive. Furthermore, battery swapping stations could act as energy storage and help unload the grid during peak consumption hours. Today, the market is more inclined to prioritise fast and ultra fast chargers due to the cost of swapping stations and their complexity. Furthermore, the technology is not ready to be commercialised at a large scale as stations are not compatible with all EV models.
tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.description: Battery swapping is an alternative to conventional electric vehicle (EV) charging, designed to reduce refuelling time. At a battery swapping station, an EV user can automatically exchange a depleted battery for a fully charged one, typically in a matter of minutes. This approach can improve vehicle utilisation and support the deployment of EVs across multiple segments, from passenger cars to two- and three-wheelers and heavy-duty vehicles.
tech_0269_vehicles-exc-2-3w-charging.NZErationale: With the electric vehicle (EV) charging time being a constraint for some consumers, an efficient battery swapping technology that could be implemented in a timeframe comparable to that of refuelling internal combustion engines could be attractive. Furthermore, battery swapping stations could act as energy storage and help unload the grid during peak consumption hours. Today, the market is more inclined to prioritise fast and ultra fast chargers due to the cost of swapping stations and their complexity. Furthermore, the technology is not ready to be commercialised at a large scale as stations are not compatible with all EV models.

initiatives.description: In 2023, Nio is the leader in battery swapping infrastructure with more than 1 000 stations deployed in China and a further 1 000 planned to be deployed. The upcoming batch deployment will be capable of swapping a battery in under 5 minutes and replace around 400 batteries per day.

NIO further developed its battery swapping infrastructure stock in Europe by opening the first in Denmark. This arrives after deployment in Netherlands, Norway, Germany and Sweden. In total, NIO deployed 12 stations in Europe with the ambition to expand even more.

CATL has introduced a new technology for trucks called Modul to bracket (MTB) which integrates the battery directly into the vehicle's chassis. This enables the battery to be lighter and ease battery swapping. The company will be testing the swap project at Qiyuan Core Power in 2023.
CATL partnered with a Chinese highway operator in the Fujian province to construct 4 battery swap stations for heavy trucks.
Nio provided nearly 100 000 daily car battery swap services at the start of 2025 and has over 3 300 battery swap stations in China
About 30% of new electric heavy-trucks (nearly 30 000) sold in China in 2024 are battery swap-capable.
CATL and Sinopec announced a plan for 10 000 battery swap stations in China, which would mean that 1 in 3 petrol stations of Sinopec would have a battery swap station.
About 100 Fiat 500e's that are part of a car sharing fleet in Madrid are fitted with battery swap technology

CATL unveils two standardized battery models, #20 and #25, to ease the deployment of battery swapping. At the same time, they announced the creation of battery swap ecosystem using those battery standards with nearly 100 partners. The co-development of 10 new EV models with swappable batteries and the construction of 1000 new battery swapping stations have also been announced.
Nio surpassed 2000 installed battery stations, most of which in China and 27 in Europe.
Geely joins Nio in its battery swap alliance. By early 2024, the NIO battery swap alliance included Chinese automakers - including Geely, Chery, JAC, and Changan.
Nio and CATL forms strategic partership on battery swapping.

tech_0270_vehicle-to-grid-v2g.technology_status_summary_zh: 雙向充電使電力可流入及流出電動車，讓電動車電池能支援住宅（V2H）、建築（V2B）、用電設備負載（V2L）或整體電網（V2G）。電動車可在電力價格低或供應充裕時儲電，並在電力稀缺或價值較高時放電，使 V2G 能提供削峰、頻率調節及區域彈性等服務。實現這些功能需要雙向充電器、具備對外供電功能的電動車、確保電力安全輸出的通訊協定，以及允許消費者或聚合商參與電網服務市場的市場機制。V2G 在技術上屬於廣義智慧充電生態系，但因需要額外硬體，且有互通性及法規要求，因此被視為獨立技術。
tech_0270_vehicle-to-grid-v2g.technology_status_summary_en: Bidirectional charging enables power to flow both to and from an electric vehicle, allowing EV batteries to support homes (V2H), buildings (V2B), appliances loads (V2L) or the wider grid (V2G). By enabling EVs to store electricity when it is cheap or abundant and discharge when it is scarce or valuable, V2G can provide services such as peak shaving, frequency regulation and local flexibility. Delivering these capabilities requires bidirectional chargers, electric cars that enable  delivering electricity, communication protocols that ensure safe and secure power export, and market frameworks that allow consumers or aggregators to participate in grid-service markets. While technically part of the broader smart-charging ecosystem, V2G is considered a separate technology given its additional hardware, interoperability and regulatory requirements.
tech_0270_vehicle-to-grid-v2g.description: Bidirectional charging enables power to flow both to and from an electric vehicle, allowing EV batteries to support homes (V2H), buildings (V2B), appliances loads (V2L) or the wider grid (V2G). By enabling EVs to store electricity when it is cheap or abundant and discharge when it is scarce or valuable, V2G can provide services such as peak shaving, frequency regulation and local flexibility. Delivering these capabilities requires bidirectional chargers, electric cars that enable  delivering electricity, communication protocols that ensure safe and secure power export, and market frameworks that allow consumers or aggregators to participate in grid-service markets. While technically part of the broader smart-charging ecosystem, V2G is considered a separate technology given its additional hardware, interoperability and regulatory requirements.

initiatives.description: Launch of large-scale car-sharing service (500 Evs), using V2G technology to balance local electricity generated from Solar PV and demand for electricity by shared mobility
Octopus Energy and BYD have launched the UK’s first bundled V2G solution, enabling free home charging and grid integration via a V2G-capable EV, bi-directional charger, and smart tariff.

The release of OCPP 2.1 in January 2025 introduced native support for bidirectional charging via ISO 15118-20, enabling standardized vehicle-to-grid (V2G) functionality and positioning EVs as active energy resources within smart grid ecosystems
In 2024 there were over 30 bi-directionalcapable electric car models available, an increase of nearly 20% from 2023.

tech_0270_vehicle-to-grid-v2g.id: Transport > Road transport > EV charging equipment > Demand response > Vehicle-to-grid (v2g)

tech_0271_smart-charging-transport-deman.technology_name_zh: 智慧充電（運輸需量反應）
tech_0271_smart-charging-transport-deman.technology_status_summary_zh: 智慧充電是以有利於整體系統的方式，協調管理電動車電池充電，避免電網出現尖峰需求或壅塞。此技術不需要截然不同的基礎設施，但仍須創新整合資訊科技（IT）與操作技術（OT），包括遠端感測、巨量資料分析及遠端控制。從技術角度來看，最簡單的部署方式是建立後端系統，在消費者較少介入的情況下運作，納入電網需求與電動車電池可提供的服務資訊，並透過預設合約自動向電網提供服務，而非仰賴用戶主動選擇加入。
tech_0271_smart-charging-transport-deman.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 電動車的瞬時負載高於一般家戶的額定容量；大量電動車併入後，最終將增加地方配電網，以及上游輸電與發電系統的負擔。目前在高容量電動車滲透率較高的特定地區，已經出現局部熱點問題。
tech_0271_smart-charging-transport-deman.technology_status_summary_en: Smart charging refers to the co-ordinated and managed charging of the batteries in electric vehicles in a way that benefits the system, avoiding peak demand or congestion on the grid. While it does not require a very different infrastructure, innovation is needed to integrate IT and OT (Operational Technologies), including remote sensing, big data analytics, remote sensing and control. The simplest strategy for deployment, from a technology perspective, would be to develop back-end systems that would function without much involvement from consumers, and incorporate information on grid needs and services that can be provided by EV batteries, and allow for these services to be delivered to the grid by default contracts, rather than relying on opt-in from customers.
tech_0271_smart-charging-transport-deman.market_dynamics_summary_en: With instantaneous loads above the rated capacity of the average household, integrating large numbers of electric vehicles (EVs) will eventually impose burdens on local distribution grids as well as upstream transmission and generation. Today, hotspots are already seen in specific areas with high penetration of high-capacity EVs.
tech_0271_smart-charging-transport-deman.description: Smart charging refers to the co-ordinated and managed charging of the batteries in electric vehicles in a way that benefits the system, avoiding peak demand or congestion on the grid. While it does not require a very different infrastructure, innovation is needed to integrate IT and OT (Operational Technologies), including remote sensing, big data analytics, remote sensing and control. The simplest strategy for deployment, from a technology perspective, would be to develop back-end systems that would function without much involvement from consumers, and incorporate information on grid needs and services that can be provided by EV batteries, and allow for these services to be delivered to the grid by default contracts, rather than relying on opt-in from customers.

initiatives.description: Amsterdam launches smart charging pilot to deal with congension, this shows that smart charging is being picked up by other regions outside of UK, and progressing towards TRL 9 - adoption across multiple regions

tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.sector_zh: 動態充電或電動道路系統
sector: Dynamic charging or electric road system
tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.sector_en: Dynamic charging or electric road system
tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.technology_status_summary_zh: 電動道路系統（ERS）是一種基礎設施網路，使電動車能在行駛中利用道路供應的能源充電。ERS 主要分為兩類：傳導式系統使用嵌入車道的供電軌；感應式系統則使用電磁線圈。動態充電可減少大型車載電池需求、延長續航里程並提高營運彈性，尤其適合重型及長途運輸。傳導式 ERS 透過與嵌設於路面或道路側邊的供電軌或導電體實體接觸，向行駛中的電動車供電；車輛利用裝設的集電裝置取得電能，可在行駛期間持續充電。此方式的能源傳輸效率高，並可大幅減少所需電池容量，但需要龐大的基礎設施投資、精準的車輛對位，以及嚴格的安全措施。
tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 動態充電可補充或取代傳統電動車充電，例如讓道路車輛使用較小電池即可電動行駛。電動道路系統可望加速電動化，尤其適用於重型、高使用強度及長途運輸，例如城際客運巴士，以及區域與長途卡車運輸。對其他車型及使用情境而言，其重要性則低於部分其他充電策略。
tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.technology_status_summary_en:
Electric Road Systems (ERS) are infrastructure networks that allow electric vehicles (EVs) to charge while in motion, using energy supplied through the road itself. ERS can take two main forms: conductive, using power rails or rails embedded in lanes, and inductive, using electromagnetic coils. By enabling dynamic charging, ERS reduce the need for large onboard batteries, extend driving range, and increase operational flexibility, particularly for heavy-duty and long-haul transport.
Conductive charging (ERS) delivers electrical energy to EVs in motion through physical contact with rails or power conductors embedded in the roadway or along the roadside. Vehicles collect energy via a mounted contact device, allowing continuous charging during travel. This method provides high energy transfer efficiency and can significantly reduce battery size requirements, but requires substantial infrastructure investment, precise vehicle alignment, and rigorous safety measures.
tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.market_dynamics_summary_en: Dynamic charging can complement or serve as a substitute to traditional electric vehicle charging (e.g. by enabling road vehicles to run on electric with smaller batteries). Electric Road Systems could accelerate adoption, particularly for heavy-duty and intensive usage and/or long-distance operations like intercity buses (coaches), and regional and long-haul trucking. For other vehicle types and operations, it is of less critical importance than some of the other charging strategies.

Vehicles collect energy via a mounted contact device, allowing continuous charging during travel. This method provides high energy transfer efficiency and can significantly reduce battery size requirements, but requires substantial infrastructure investment, precise vehicle alignment, and rigorous safety measures.
tech_0272_conductive-electric-road-syste.NZErationale: Dynamic charging can complement or serve as a substitute to traditional electric vehicle charging (e.g. by enabling road vehicles to run on electric with smaller batteries). Electric Road Systems could accelerate adoption, particularly for heavy-duty and intensive usage and/or long-distance operations like intercity buses (coaches), and regional and long-haul trucking. initiatives.description: In Sweden, Trafikverket have studied the financial impact on ERS compared with diesel, with two sections to be opened in 20149 and 2020.
South Coast Air Quality Management District and Siemens demonstrated ERS in the Ports of Los Angeles and Long Beach.
In Sweden, the Volvo automotive test track near Gothenburg is developing technology for trucks and buses through a current collector in the form of a pantograph.

India was conducting trials for the deployment of their National Highway for Electric Vehicles (NHEV) which will be five times bigger than the current longest e-highway in Germany (109 km). The trials ended in late 2022 and the Delhi-Mumbai highway is expected to be EV ready by March 2023.
Siemens Mobility and Continental will co-operate, aiming to achieve serial production of trucks equipped with pantographs, capable of running on ERS.
A kilometer long conductive electric road system has been tested in South of Sweden between 2019 and 2024.
Sweden is building the World's first permanent electrified road, with 2 kilometers already active and potentially thousands of kilometer to be electrified by 2035.

tech_0273_inductive-charging.sector_zh: 動態充電或電動道路系統
sector: Dynamic charging or electric road system
tech_0273_inductive-charging.sector_en: Dynamic charging or electric road system
tech_0273_inductive-charging.technology_status_summary_zh: 感應式充電利用嵌入道路基礎設施的線圈與車載接收器之間形成的電磁場，以無線方式傳輸能量。此概念可追溯至 20 世紀初，但在電動車上的應用仍處於部署初期。靜態感應式充電通常設置於停車位，是比插電式系統更便利且安全的替代方案，有助於擴大電動車採用。動態感應式充電則屬於電動道路系統（ERS），透過埋設於車道下方的線圈，使車輛在行駛中充電，可減少電池容量需求、延長續航里程並提高營運彈性，尤其適合重型及長途貨運。然而，相較於傳導式系統，感應式充電的能源傳輸效率較低、基礎設施成本較高，ERS 每車道公里估計超過 100 萬美元，材料與施工需求也更大。
tech_0273_inductive-charging.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 動態充電可補充或取代傳統電動車充電，例如讓道路車輛使用較小電池即可電動行駛。電動道路系統可望加速電動化，尤其適用於重型、高使用強度及長途運輸，例如城際客運巴士，以及區域與長途卡車運輸。對其他車型及使用情境而言，其重要性則低於部分其他充電策略。
tech_0273_inductive-charging.technology_status_summary_en:
Inductive charging enables wireless energy transfer via electromagnetic fields between coils embedded in road infrastructure and receivers in vehicles. While the concept dates back to the early 20th century, its application to electric vehicles (EVs) remains at an early stage of deployment.
Static inductive charging, typically installed in parking spaces, offers a user-friendly and safe alternative to plug-in systems, supporting broader EV adoption. Dynamic inductive charging, a form of Electric Road System (ERS), allows vehicles to charge while in motion via coils embedded beneath traffic lanes. This can reduce battery size requirements, extend driving range, and improve operational flexibility, particularly for heavy-duty and long-haul freight.
Despite its potential, inductive charging faces challenges including lower energy transfer efficiency, higher infrastructure costs (estimated at over USD 1 million per lane-km for ERS), and greater material and construction demands compared to conductive systems.
tech_0273_inductive-charging.market_dynamics_summary_en: Dynamic charging can complement or serve as a substitute to traditional electric vehicle charging (e.g. by enabling road vehicles to run on electric with smaller batteries). Electric Road Systems could accelerate adoption, particularly for heavy-duty and intensive usage and/or long-distance operations like intercity buses (coaches), and regional and long-haul trucking. For other vehicle types and operations, it is of less critical importance than some of the other charging strategies.

initiatives.description: Electreon, partnered with EnBW, will deploy a 1km Electric Road System along a road in Balingen, Germany. The technology deployed will enable static and dynamic wireless charging infrastructure and be Germany's first-ever public wireless road project. No dates announced yet.
Qualcomm recently developed and tested one of the world’s first DEVC (Dynamic EV Charging) test tracks, proving EV charging dynamically at up to 20 kW at highway speeds (100 km/h)
ElectReon has started trials on the use of electric roads with a 40 tonnes electric truck in Sweden.

Following successful tests in labs and on closed test tracks, the Charge as you Drive project has cleared a new milestone with real-world dynamic wireless charging trial, on a 1.5 km stretch of the A10 motorway near Paris. Four prototype vehicles (a truck, van, car and bus) equipped with the necessary pickup coils are now driving in real-life traffic conditions on a pilot motorway section to assess the system's performance. And the initial results are very encouraging: the wireless technology can transfer more than 300 kW of instantaneous power and more than 200 kW of average power under optimal steady-state conditions.
“Arena del Futuro” Demonstrates Capability of Dynamic Inductive Recharging Technology for Electric Vehicles
In the E|MPOWER project for inductive charging of EVs while driving, the construction phase on the A6 motorway near Amberg has been completed. The test phase is now beginning
Porche announced that its soon to be released Cayenne model will be wireless charging capable.
The city of Detroit in the United States finalized works for the first public EV-charging roadways, albeit for less than a mile.
The first infrastructure deployment and road tests on inductive charging applied to public buses have been carried out in Korea between 2013 and 2017.
Virginia-based Evatran partnered with six commercial EV users to equip their vehicle with inuctive charging systems.

Society of Automotive Engineers International publishes the SAE J2954, their standard for wireless power transfer for light-duty electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles using magnetic resonance. This has also been adopted outside the United States, notably in Europe and Korea, among others.
An Overview of Dynamic Inductive Charging for Electric Vehicles

tech_0274_fast-and-ultra-fast-charging.technology_status_summary_zh: 目前多數商用直流（DC）快充站的功率為 250 至 350 kW。350 kW 至 1 MW 的快充技術是加速電動車部署的重要驅動力，可提高城際旅行便利性並減少續航焦慮；電動公路貨運及較大型電動乘用車尤其需要快充樞紐。若要進一步突破高功率門檻，仍須進行多項創新，包括結合電池與超級電容器，以及將高功率充電設備整合至乘用電動車與卡車的車體。充電站須在盡量降低電網衝擊的情況下提供高功率輸出，因此還須整合電池儲能、電容器或智慧管理系統。電池化學體系與設計也須能承受超快速充電，避免因枝晶形成等原因加速劣化；材料方面則須達到可與超級電容器相比的超高放電率。
tech_0274_fast-and-ultra-fast-charging.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 長途公路行駛是輕型與重型電動車普及的一項特殊障礙，儘管輕型車的城際客運需求僅占總客運量的一小部分。若能部署補充能源時間與內燃機車加油相近、並可支援長途旅行的超快速充電技術，將可大幅加速電動車普及，並降低城際運輸排放。
tech_0274_fast-and-ultra-fast-charging.technology_status_summary_en: Most commercially available direct current (DC) fast charging stations currently enable power levels ranging from 250-350 kW. Fast charging technology of 350 kW up to 1 MW is a key driver for faster electric vehicle (EV) deployment, to increase the convenience of inter-city travel and reduce range anxiety. In particular, fast charging hubs are required for electric road freight and larger EV passenger models. A number of innovations are needed to go beyond high capacity thresholds, including battery and ultracapacitor combinations and integration of high capacity charging equipment within passenger EV and truck frames. Charging stations must provide high power output with minimal impact on the grid, which also will require further integration efforts including application of battery storage, capacitors or smart management systems. Finally, battery chemistries and designs will need to be developed that can be rapidly charged by ultrafast charging systems without risking accelerated degradation (e.g. via dendrite formation). Innovations are also needed on materials that also achieve ultrahigh discharge rates, comparable to those of supercapacitors.
tech_0274_fast-and-ultra-fast-charging.market_dynamics_summary_en: Long-distance road travel is a particular hurdle for light- and heavy-duty electric vehicle adoption, despite the fact that inter-city passenger transport demand from light duty vehicles comprises a small share of total passenger travel. Deploying ultra-fast charging technology that can make trips over long distances possible with refuelling times comparable to those of internal combustion engines could greatly accelerate adoption and reduce emissions from intercity travel.
tech_0274_fast-and-ultra-fast-charging.description: Most commercially available direct current (DC) fast charging stations currently enable power levels ranging from 250-350 kW. Fast charging technology of 350 kW up to 1 MW is a key driver for faster electric vehicle (EV) deployment, to increase the convenience of inter-city travel and reduce range anxiety. In particular, fast charging hubs are required for electric road freight and larger EV passenger models. A number of innovations are needed to go beyond high capacity thresholds, including battery and ultracapacitor combinations and integration of high capacity charging equipment within passenger EV and truck frames. Innovations are also needed on materials that also achieve ultrahigh discharge rates, comparable to those of supercapacitors.

Deploying ultra-fast charging technology that can make trips over long distances possible with refuelling times comparable to those of internal combustion engines could greatly accelerate adoption and reduce emissions from intercity travel.

initiatives.description: By 2024, the global fast-charging network surpassed 2 million units, with ultra-fast chargers (≥150 kW) expanding by over 50% to represent nearly one-tenth of all fast chargers, supported by falling costs—down about 20% between 2022 and 2024.

In March 2025, BYD set a new benchmark for charging speed with its Super-e platform, which is claimed to deliver around 400 km of range in 5 minutes. This leap was made possible by nextgeneration silicon carbide power chips, all-liquid-cooling, and a 1 000 V architecture, which allows for coupling with 1 MW charging.
