tech_0275_ultra-fast-charging-1-mw.technology_name_zh: 超快速充電（1 MW 以上）
tech_0275_ultra-fast-charging-1-mw.technology_status_summary_zh: 目前正開發多種功率超過 1 MW 的充電標準，用於中型及重型車輛，相關超快速充電技術規格仍在制定中。在中國，中國電力企業聯合會與 CHAdeMO 共同開發「Ultra ChaoJi」重型電動車充電標準，功率最高可達數 MW。在歐洲與美國，國際標準化組織（ISO）及其他機構正在制定 CharIN 百萬瓦充電系統（MCS）規格，潛在最高功率可達 4.5 MW。中重型電動車商業化部署所需的最終 MCS 規格，原預期於 2025 年完成。為避免製造商採取不同技術路線，造成車輛進口商與跨國營運業者面臨額外成本、效率損失及操作困難，重型電動車的充電標準須盡可能趨於一致，並確保互通性。
tech_0275_ultra-fast-charging-1-mw.technology_status_summary_en: Multiple charging standards are currently being developed for charging medium- and heavy-duty vehicles at power rates of greater than 1 MW. Technical specifications for ultra-fast charging are under development. In China, co-developers China Electricity Council and CHAdeMO’s “ultra ChaoJi” are developing a charging standard for heavy-duty electric vehicles for up to several megawatts. In Europe and the United States, specifications for the CharIN Megawatt Charging System (MCS), with a potential maximum power of 4.5 MW, are under development by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and other organisations. The final MCS specifications, which will be needed for commercial roll-out of medium- and heavy-duty electric vehicles, are expected for 2025. Ensuring maximum possible convergence of charging standards and interoperability for heavy-duty EVs will be needed to avoid the cost, inefficiency, and challenges for vehicle importers and international operators that would be created by manufacturers following divergent paths.
tech_0275_ultra-fast-charging-1-mw.description: Multiple charging standards are currently being developed for charging medium- and heavy-duty vehicles at power rates of greater than 1 MW. Technical specifications for ultra-fast charging are under development. In China, co-developers China Electricity Council and CHAdeMO’s “ultra ChaoJi” are developing a charging standard for heavy-duty electric vehicles for up to several megawatts. In Europe and the United States, specifications for the CharIN Megawatt Charging System (MCS), with a potential maximum power of 4.5 MW, are under development by the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) and other organisations. The final MCS specifications, which will be needed for commercial roll-out of medium- and heavy-duty electric vehicles, are expected for 2025. Ensuring maximum possible convergence of charging standards and interoperability for heavy-duty EVs will be needed to avoid the cost, inefficiency, and challenges for vehicle importers and international operators that would be created by manufacturers following divergent paths.

initiatives.description: Pilot project to test megawatt charging in real-world fleet operations
The European Union and the United States issued a joint statement recognising the MCS as adopted by international standardisation bodies.
The world’s first megawatt chargers for trucks were deployed in the United States and Europe, marking a key technological milestone.

In March 2025, BYD set a new benchmark for charging speed with its Super-e platform, which is claimed to deliver around 400 km of range in 5 minutes. This leap was made possible by nextgeneration silicon carbide power chips, all-liquid-cooling, and a 1 000 V architecture, which allows for coupling with 1 MW charging.

tech_0278_hydrogen-fuel-cell-truck.technology_status_summary_zh: 請參見質子交換膜燃料電池（PEMFC）。
tech_0278_hydrogen-fuel-cell-truck.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在長途重型卡車運輸中，若能開發並部署高流量加氫站，燃料電池卡車可能在成本方面與電池電動卡車競爭，並具有加氫時間較短的優勢。
tech_0278_hydrogen-fuel-cell-truck.market_dynamics_summary_en: In long-haul heavy-duty trucking, fuel cell trucks may become cost-competitive with battery electric trucks and offer advantages in terms of fuelling times if high flow rate refueling stations are developed and deployed.
tech_0278_hydrogen-fuel-cell-truck.NZErationale: In long-haul heavy-duty trucking, fuel cell trucks may become cost-competitive with battery electric trucks and offer advantages in terms of fuelling times if high flow rate refueling stations are developed and deployed.

tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.technology_name_zh: 道路車輛用車載氫氣儲存槽
tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.technology_status_summary_zh: 道路車輛須配備氫氣儲存槽，以氣態或液態形式在車上儲存氫氣。由於氫氣的體積能量密度低，須採 35 至 70 MPa 的高壓儲存，及／或約 20 K 的極低溫液態儲存。關鍵挑戰包括安全性（加壓氫氣在洩漏時具有火災風險）、耐久性、認證、標準化，以及系統重量與體積能量密度的最佳化。與車輛整合也是一項挑戰，例如須開發傳統圓柱形儲存槽以外的設計。為解決安全與整合問題，產業正朝標準化及模組化發展；例如氫燃料公車最多可配置十個獨立圓柱形儲存槽。
tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 若燃料電池電動車成為電池電動車的策略性互補方案，進一步改善氫氣儲存槽設計與量產，將是兼顧安全、可接受成本及長續航里程的關鍵。
tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.technology_status_summary_en: Hydrogen tanks are required to store hydrogen on board vehicles, either in gaseous or liquid form. Due to its low volumetric energy density, hydrogen requires very high pressure storage (between 35 and 70 Mpa) and/or at very low temperature (around 20°K for liquid storage). Key challenges related to hydrogen tanks include safety (as H2 under pressure poses a fire risk, especially in case of leakage), durability, certification, standardisation, and optimization of system gravimetric and volumetric energy density. Vehicle integration is another challenge, for example in developping alternatives to the conventional cylindrical tank design. To address safety and integration issues, the industry is moving towards standardisation and modularity, exemplified by hydrogen buses that can be equipped with as many as ten individual cylindrical tanks.
tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.market_dynamics_summary_en: In case fuel cell electric vehicles emerge as a strategic complementary solution to battery electric vehicles, further improvements in the design and mass production of hydrogen tanks will be key to ensuring safety and high vehicle ranges at an acceptable cost.
tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.description: Hydrogen tanks are required to store hydrogen on board vehicles, either in gaseous or liquid form. Due to its low volumetric energy density, hydrogen requires very high pressure storage (between 35 and 70 Mpa) and/or at very low temperature (around 20°K for liquid storage). Key challenges related to hydrogen tanks include safety (as H2 under pressure poses a fire risk, especially in case of leakage), durability, certification, standardisation, and optimization of system gravimetric and volumetric energy density. Vehicle integration is another challenge, for example in developping alternatives to the conventional cylindrical tank design. To address safety and integration issues, the industry is moving towards standardisation and modularity, exemplified by hydrogen buses that can be equipped with as many as ten individual cylindrical tanks.
tech_0280_hydrogen-onboard-storage-tank-.NZErationale: In case fuel cell electric vehicles emerge as a strategic complementary solution to battery electric vehicles, further improvements in the design and mass production of hydrogen tanks will be key to ensuring safety and high vehicle ranges at an acceptable cost.

tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_name: Polymer electrolyte membrane hydrogen fuel cell for FCEVs
tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_name_zh: 燃料電池電動車用質子交換膜燃料電池
tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.sector_zh: 燃料電池電動車用氫燃料電池
tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_status_summary_zh: 氫燃料電池系統利用氫氣發電。由於能量儲存在氫氣中，燃料電池電動車（FCEV）所需電池遠小於電池電動車，容量差距至少達十倍。FCEV 利用氫氣較高的重量能量密度，可提供比 BEV 更長的續航里程。然而，持續部署仍面臨多項技術與經濟挑戰，包括氫氣處理安全性（加氫與殘餘洩漏）、車載氫氣儲存，以及燃料電池堆與系統的高成本。電池堆內的電化學反應需要塗覆鉑系觸媒的質子交換膜（PEM），而鉑價格昂貴；但隨著規模經濟形成，燃料電池堆及系統成本預期將大幅下降。若 FCEV 要與其他動力系統競爭，供應至加氫站的氫氣須透過生命週期零排放或極低排放技術生產，且價格須使每公里成本與傳統內燃機車或使用電網電力的電池電動車相近。這需要進一步降低低碳與零碳製氫技術的成本，例如搭配碳捕捉與封存（CCS）的蒸汽甲烷重組（SMR），或以風力、太陽光電等再生電力驅動電解槽；同時也須降低氫氣輸送與配銷網路及加氫站（HRS）的成本。
tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 對電動車而言，燃料電池技術是降低電池依賴的互補方案，可減少對鋰離子電池關鍵材料的需求，但會增加鉑需求。
tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_status_summary_en:
A hydrogen fuel cell system generates electric power from hydrogen. Fuel cell electric vehicles (FCEV) have much smaller batteries than battery electric vehicles (at least by a factor of 10), as the energy is stored in the hydrogen. By exploiting the higher gravimetric energy density of hydrogen, FCEVs can offer a higher range than BEVs. However their continuing deployment faces multiple technical and economic challenges, including: safety of hydrogen handling (refuelling, residual leakage), on-board hydrogen storage (see the dedicated entry below) and the high cost of the fuel cell stack (the electrochemical reaction inside the stack requires a proton exchange membrane (PEM) coated with a platinum-based catalyst, a costly material) and system. Costs of the fuel cell stack and system are expected to decline significantly with economies of scale.
For FCEVs to be competitive with other powertrain technologies, hydrogen must be delivered to hydrogen refuelling stations using technologies that lead to zero or very low lifecycle emissions, at prices that bring per-kilometre costs into the same range as conventional ICEs, or of battery electric vehicles powered by grid electricity. This will require further cost reductions in technologies for low- and zero-carbon hydrogen production technologies (e.g. SMR with CCS, renewable electricity generation such as wind and solar coupled to electrolysers), as well as in hydrogen transmission and distribution networks and in hydrogen refuelling stations (HRS).
tech_0281_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.market_dynamics_summary_en: For electric vehicles, fuel cell technology represents a complementary solution to reduce dependency on batteries. The need for critical Li-ion battery materials would be alleviated (at the expense of an increased demand for platinum).

Toyota announced a next-generation fuel cell system with double the durability, 20% higher efficiency, and lower costs through design and manufacturing innovations; with market launch expected post-2026 for passenger and heavy-duty vehicles.

tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_name: Polymer electrolyte membrane hydrogen fuel cell as range-extender in EVs
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_name_zh: 電動車增程用質子交換膜燃料電池
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.sector_zh: 燃料電池電動車用氫燃料電池
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_status_summary_zh: 原理與質子交換膜燃料電池相同，但系統容量僅需提供電池電動動力系統的增程功能。
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 對電動車而言，燃料電池技術是降低電池依賴的互補方案，可減少對鋰離子電池關鍵材料的需求，但會增加鉑需求。不同車輛市場區隔已推出多款燃料電池增程式電動車，其中許多已停產。事實上，中國銷售的許多輕型商用車與中型貨運卡車，採用的就是燃料電池增程式電動架構。
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.technology_status_summary_en: Same as PEM fuel cell, but sized to only provide range extension to the battery electric powertrain.
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.market_dynamics_summary_en: For electric vehicles (EVs), fuel cell technology represents a complementary solution to reduce dependency on batteries. The need for critical Li-ion battery materials would be alleviated (at the expense of an increased demand for platinum). Various range-extended fuel-cell EVs have been introduced (and many discontinued) in vehicle markets across different segments. Many light commercial vehicles and medium-freight trucks sold in China are, in fact, fuel-cell range extended EVs.
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.description: Same as PEM fuel cell, but sized to only provide range extension to the battery electric powertrain.
tech_0282_polymer-electrolyte-membrane-h.NZErationale: For electric vehicles (EVs), fuel cell technology represents a complementary solution to reduce dependency on batteries. The need for critical Li-ion battery materials would be alleviated (at the expense of an increased demand for platinum). Various range-extended fuel-cell EVs have been introduced (and many discontinued) in vehicle markets across different segments. Many light commercial vehicles and medium-freight trucks sold in China are, in fact, fuel-cell range extended EVs.

tech_0283_hydrogen-fuelled-light-commerc.technology_name_zh: 氫氣內燃機輕型商用車
tech_0283_hydrogen-fuelled-light-commerc.technology_status_summary_zh: 在內燃機中直接燃燒氫氣，是不依賴燃料電池的另一種氫氣運輸應用。氫氣引擎目前的能源效率低於燃料電池，峰值效率約為 35% 至 45%，燃料電池則為 50% 至 60%；但氫氣引擎不需要鉑等關鍵礦物，因此可能成為具成本效益的方案。與燃料電池不同，氫氣內燃機可使用品質較低的氫氣，使可採用的製氫途徑更廣泛。然而，安全性、引擎效率與功率密度，以及排氣中氮氧化物（NOₓ）與汽缸壁附近潤滑油燃燒所產生的煙灰，仍是技術挑戰。目前正進行技術成熟度第 6 級（TRL 6）的研發，以解決這些問題。
tech_0283_hydrogen-fuelled-light-commerc.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 氫氣引擎不需要鉑等稀有材料，特別適合極寒環境；燃料電池在此環境可能遇到運轉問題，而引擎散失的熱量可用於車廂供暖。此外，內燃機對氫氣品質的敏感度低於燃料電池。
tech_0283_hydrogen-fuelled-light-commerc.technology_status_summary_en: Burning hydrogen directly in an internal combustion engine offers an alternative use of hydrogen in transport, one that does not rely on fuel cells. Although less energy efficient than fuel cells today (35-45% peak efficiency for hydrogen engines vs. 50-60% for fuel cells), the hydrogen engine does not require critical minerals like platinum and could represent a cost-effective solution. Unlike fuel cells, hydrogen internal combustion engines can run on low-quality grade hydrogen, which allows for a broader range of hydrogen production pathways. However, several technical challenges remain, including safety, engine efficiency and power density, and control of exhaust nitrogen oxides (NOₓ) and soot emissions generated by lubricant combustion near the cylinder walls. Research and development (at TRL 6) is currently underway to tackle these challenges.
tech_0283_hydrogen-fuelled-light-commerc.market_dynamics_summary_en:
The hydrogen engine does not require rare materials like platinum. 
It could be a particularly well-adapted solution in extreme cold-weather applications in which fuel cells may encounter operational challenges and where heat loss from the engine would be useful for heating up the cabin. Moreover, internal combustion engines are less sensitive to hydrogen quality than fuel cells are.

tech_0285_hydrogen-fuelled-truck.technology_status_summary_zh: 在內燃機中直接燃燒氫氣，是不依賴燃料電池的另一種氫氣運輸應用。氫氣引擎目前的能源效率低於燃料電池，峰值效率約為 35% 至 45%，燃料電池則為 50% 至 60%；但氫氣引擎不需要鉑等關鍵礦物，因此可能成為具成本效益的方案。與燃料電池不同，氫氣內燃機可使用品質較低的氫氣，使可採用的製氫途徑更廣泛。然而，安全性、引擎效率與功率密度，以及排氣中氮氧化物（NOₓ）與汽缸壁附近潤滑油燃燒所產生的煙灰，仍是技術挑戰。目前正進行技術成熟度第 6 級（TRL 6）的研發，以解決這些問題。
tech_0285_hydrogen-fuelled-truck.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 氫氣引擎不需要鉑等稀有材料，特別適合極寒環境；燃料電池在此環境可能遇到運轉問題，而引擎散失的熱量可用於車廂供暖。此外，內燃機對氫氣品質的敏感度低於燃料電池。
tech_0285_hydrogen-fuelled-truck.technology_status_summary_en: Burning hydrogen directly in an internal combustion engine offers an alternative use of hydrogen in transport, one that does not rely on fuel cells. Although less energy efficient than fuel cells today (35-45% peak efficiency for hydrogen engines vs. 50-60% for fuel cells), the hydrogen engine does not require critical minerals like platinum and could represent a cost-effective solution. Unlike fuel cells, hydrogen internal combustion engines can run on low-quality grade hydrogen, which allows for a broader range of hydrogen production pathways. However, several technical challenges remain, including safety, engine efficiency and power density, and control of exhaust nitrogen oxides (NOₓ) and soot emissions generated by lubricant combustion near the cylinder walls. Research and development (at TRL 6) is currently underway to tackle these challenges.
tech_0285_hydrogen-fuelled-truck.market_dynamics_summary_en:
The hydrogen engine does not require rare materials like platinum. 
It could be a particularly well-adapted solution in extreme cold-weather applications in which fuel cells may encounter operational challenges and where heat loss from the engine would be useful for heating up the cabin. Moreover, internal combustion engines are less sensitive to hydrogen quality than fuel cells are.

initiatives.description: Powertrain and engine costs are difficult to estimate, but are likely to be similar in terms of mark-up relative to conventional spark-ignition or compression ignition engines as natural gas powertrain costs (see 'Compressed biogas').

A start-up has developed a kit to convert diesel engines into hydrogen engines for truck and bus applications. The kit includes dedicated fuel, ignition and after-treatment systems, and adapts existing powertrain components, as well as a turbocharger and combustion chamber.
The Aachen-based FEV is developing engine, powertrain, and aftertreatment components for H2 ICE engines.

The Munich-based start-ups KEYOU and DEUTZ are intensifying their cooperation. Both sides intend to expand their existing development partnership and enter into a cooperation for the joint development, industrialisation and commercialisation of CO2-free hydrogen engines for off- and on-road applications.
Cummins is testing a hydrogen fuelled internal combustion engine.
MAN is also testing hydrogen combustion engines.
MAN launched its first commercial heavy-duty H2-fueled ICE truck model, the MAN hTGX. Around 200 vehicles for selected markets expected to be delivered in 2025.
Hylane, an European zero-emission commercial vehicle rental company, includes MAN hTGX to its portfolio.

tech_0287_liquid-hydrogen-road-transport.technology_status_summary_zh: 液態氫的能量密度高於壓縮氫氣，可延長車輛續航里程。若採集中式生產並將液態氫配送至各地，也可提高單次運輸的能量總量。
tech_0287_liquid-hydrogen-road-transport.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 氫氣在部分道路運輸利基應用中相當重要，但對絕大多數運輸模式與使用情境而言，已有其他替代方案。
tech_0287_liquid-hydrogen-road-transport.technology_status_summary_en: Liquid hydrogen provides greater energy density than compressed hydrogen, allowing for greater range of vehicles. It also increases the amount of energy that can be transported when considering centralised production and subsequent distribution of the liquid hydrogen.
tech_0287_liquid-hydrogen-road-transport.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hydrogen for road transport is important in some niche applications, but alternatives exist for the vast majority of modes and use cases.
tech_0287_liquid-hydrogen-road-transport.description: Liquid hydrogen provides greater energy density than compressed hydrogen, allowing for greater range of vehicles. It also increases the amount of energy that can be transported when considering centralised production and subsequent distribution of the liquid hydrogen.
tech_0287_liquid-hydrogen-road-transport.NZErationale: Hydrogen for road transport is important in some niche applications, but alternatives exist for the vast majority of modes and use cases.

initiatives.description: Air Liquide and Daimler joint project advancing liquid hydrogen refuelling for heavy-duty vehicles.

tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.technology_status_summary_zh: 為使氫能重型卡車的加氫時間接近柴油卡車加油所需時間，加氫機向車輛輸送氫氣的流量，須高於目前乘用車與公車加氫站的流量。因此需要設計新型元件並制定新的加氫協定。
tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在長途重型卡車運輸中，若高流量加氫站得以開發並部署，燃料電池卡車的成本可能具備與電池電動卡車競爭的能力，且在能源補充時間方面更具優勢。
tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.technology_status_summary_en: To fuel heavy hydrogen trucks in times similar to diesel truck refueling, the flow rate of hydrogen from the dispenser and into the vehicle needs to be faster than it is currently at stations designed for cars and buses. This requires new components to be desgined and new fueling protocols to be developed.
tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.market_dynamics_summary_en: In long-haul heavy-duty trucking, fuel cell trucks may become cost competitive with battery electric trucks and offer advantages in terms of fuelling times if high flow rate refueling stations are developed and deployed.
tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.description: To fuel heavy hydrogen trucks in times similar to diesel truck refueling, the flow rate of hydrogen from the dispenser and into the vehicle needs to be faster than it is currently at stations designed for cars and buses. This requires new components to be desgined and new fueling protocols to be developed.
tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.NZErationale: In long-haul heavy-duty trucking, fuel cell trucks may become cost competitive with battery electric trucks and offer advantages in terms of fuelling times if high flow rate refueling stations are developed and deployed.

initiatives.description: In January 2025, Cavendish announced plans to commercialise its 700-bar hydrogen refuelling stations in 2025 capable of refuelling heavy-duty trucks in 10 minutes

tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.id: Transport > Road transport > Hydrogen use in road transport > Refueling and infrastructure > High flow rate (>120 g/s)
tech_0288_high-flow-rate-120-g-s.id_zh: 運輸 > 公路運輸 > 氫能於公路運輸之應用 > 加氫與基礎設施 > 高流量（>120 g/s）

tech_0289_standard-flow-rate-60-120-g-s.technology_status_summary_zh: 加氫站（HRS）通常以 350 bar 或 700 bar 運作。乘用車加氫站大多採 700 bar，公車加氫站則通常採 350 bar，因此目前多數加氫站以 700 bar 運作，其中許多為雙壓系統，可同時供應 350 bar 與 700 bar。加氫站可獨立設置，也可與製氫站相連。若氫氣以中間載體形式運抵加氫站，則須配置儲存與壓縮系統。氫氣儲存系統通常採約 50 至 200 bar 的低壓；壓縮機用以克服儲存與加氫之間的壓力差，加氫壓力最高可達 1 000 bar，因此壓縮機是加氫站的核心創新領域。車輛通常透過 450 bar 或 950 bar 的高壓緩衝儲槽加氫，而非直接連接壓縮機出口。依氫氣為氣態或液態、處理量及車種不同，可採用多種技術將低壓氫氣壓縮至使用端所需壓力。燃料電池應用對氫氣純度要求很高，因此需要離子液體壓縮機等技術，以降低污染風險。氫氣在壓縮過程中會升溫，須以預冷系統確保溫度不超出車載燃料儲存系統的限制。這些系統會增加複雜度與能源消耗，因此提升效率及降低加氫系統成本，是目前的重要開發方向。
tech_0289_standard-flow-rate-60-120-g-s.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 氫氣在部分道路運輸利基應用中相當重要，但對絕大多數運輸模式與使用情境而言，已有其他替代方案。
tech_0289_standard-flow-rate-60-120-g-s.technology_status_summary_en:
Normally, hydrogen refuelling stations (HRS) operate at 350 or 700 bar. Most of the stations for passenger cars are designed for operating at 700 bar, while stations for buses typically use 350 bar. For this reason, the majority of the stations currently operate at 700 bar, with many of them operating on a dual basis, being able to deliver fuel to both at 350 and 700 bar. Hydrogen refuelling can be standalone, or linked to a hydrogen production station. If the hydrogen is delivered to the station in intermediary form, storage and compression systems are needed. Hydrogen storage systems are generally low pressure, around 50-200 bar. Compressors overcome the pressure difference between storage and refuelling (which can be up to 1 000 bar), and they are a central area of innovation in hydrogen refuelling stations. Most of the time, storage buffers (at 450 or 950 bar) are used to refuel vehicles (without a direct connection of vehicles to compressor outlet).
A range of technologies can be employed for compressing H2 from low pressure states to up to those needed at the point of use, depending on whether hydrogen is in gaseous or liquid form, and on the throughput vehicle type. High levels of purity are needed in fuel cell applications, so technologies like ionic compressors are needed to reduce the possibility of contamination. During compression the hydrogen gas heats up, and precooling systems are needed to stay within the limits of the vehicle’s fuel storage system. These systems add complexity and increase energy consumption, and are a key area of development for improving the efficiency and reducing costs of hydrogen refuelling systems.
tech_0289_standard-flow-rate-60-120-g-s.market_dynamics_summary_en: Hydrogen for road transport is important in some niche applications, but alternatives exist for the vast majority of modes and use cases.

initiatives.description: At the end of 2022, over 1 000 hydrogen refuelling stations (HRS) were in operation worldwide. This stock of HRS has more than doubled from number of stations available in operation at the end of 2019 (460). China leads with 320 stations, followed by Korea (213), Japan (164), Germany (095), and the United States (71). Leading countries have announced targets to build a total of 1 000 hydrogen refuelling stations during 2025‑30.

tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.sector_zh: 先進燃燒引擎與動力系統
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.technology_status_summary_zh: ED95 引擎專門應用於可使用生質乙醇的重型卡車，以 95% 乙醇及 5% 添加劑（包括點火改進劑）為燃料。這類引擎由柴油引擎改裝而成，須採高壓縮比才能點燃燃料；此外，由於乙醇的能量密度較低，也需要專用燃料噴射系統加以補償。
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 採高壓縮比的原生火花點火引擎，在效率與污染物排放方面可能表現更佳，可作為壓燃式（柴油）引擎的替代方案。乙醇目前是價格最低且全球產量最大的生質燃料；將其用於柴油引擎，無須大幅改造卡車生產線。
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.technology_status_summary_en: Specifically applied to heavy duty tracking that can use bioethanol, ED95 engines can be fuelled by 95% ethanol and 5% additives (including ignition improvers). They are adapted diesel engines with high compression ratios, which are required to ignite the fuel. A dedicated injection system is also needed, to compensate for the lower energy density of ethanol.
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.market_dynamics_summary_en: Native spark ignition engines with high compression ratios could attain better results in terms of efficiency and pollutant emissions, and present an alternative to compression ignition (diesel) engines. Ethanol is currently the cheapest biofuel available and is the biofuel that is produced in the highest volumes, globally. Its use in diesel engines does not require major changes to truck production lines.
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.description: Specifically applied to heavy duty tracking that can use bioethanol, ED95 engines can be fuelled by 95% ethanol and 5% additives (including ignition improvers). They are adapted diesel engines with high compression ratios, which are required to ignite the fuel. A dedicated injection system is also needed, to compensate for the lower energy density of ethanol.
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.NZErationale: Native spark ignition engines with high compression ratios could attain better results in terms of efficiency and pollutant emissions, and present an alternative to compression ignition (diesel) engines. Ethanol is currently the cheapest biofuel available and is the biofuel that is produced in the highest volumes, globally. Its use in diesel engines does not require major changes to truck production lines.

initiatives.description: Scania has been producing commercially-available trucks using ED95 for several years. They are currently producing the third generation of ED95 engines

tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.id: Transport > Road transport > Advanced combustion engines and powetrains > Ethanol-fuelled diesel engine
tech_0290_ethanol-fuelled-diesel-engine.id_zh: 運輸 > 公路運輸 > 先進燃燒引擎與動力系統 > 乙醇燃料柴油引擎

tech_0291_compressed-biogas.sector_zh: 先進燃燒引擎與動力系統
tech_0291_compressed-biogas.technology_status_summary_zh: 此技術可應用於由生質甲烷內燃機驅動的道路車輛，通常為重型車輛。生質甲烷儲存在 20 至 25 MPa 的高壓儲槽中。主要技術挑戰是引擎的甲烷逸散（洩漏），可能發生在進氣歧管，或因燃燒不完全而發生在燃燒室。間接噴射引擎的逸散量較高，排氣中約有 5% 未燃甲烷；高壓缸內直噴引擎則較低。此技術若要實現淨減排，甲烷須來自再生來源，例如生質甲烷或合成甲烷，並以高壓缸內直噴氣體引擎燃燒；相較柴油動力系統，在現有引擎技術中使用化石甲烷並無二氧化碳減排效益。此外，亦須改善排氣後處理觸媒，以提高未燃甲烷的轉化率，尤其是在引擎暖機或低負載運轉等低溫條件下。
tech_0291_compressed-biogas.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 由於再生生質甲烷供應有限，此技術的市場預期仍將維持利基規模。較具潛力的應用是使用市政或農業廢棄物所產生生質甲烷的市政車隊。未來若能利用低碳電力電解所得的氫氣與碳源，大量且具成本競爭力地生產合成甲烷，則在既有天然氣管網的國家，此技術可望擴大應用。
tech_0291_compressed-biogas.technology_status_summary_en:
This technology can be adopted in road vehicles (typically heavy duty) powered by an internal combustion engine fuelled by biomethane. The biomethane is stored in high pressure tanks (20-25 MPa). Technical challenges that apply to this technology mostly relate to methane slip (leakage) in the engine, which occurs either at the intake manifold level or in the combustion chamber due to incomplete combustion. Indirect injection engines have higher slip (5% unburnt methane in the exhaust gas) than direct high pressure injection engines (reference: Advanced Motor Fuels Technology Collaboration Programme Annex 51). For this technology to deliver net emissions reductions, the methane would need to be produced from renewable sources (e.g. biomethane or synthetic methane) and burned in direct injection high pressure gas engines, as use of fossil methane in current engine technologies has no CO2 emissions benefit relative to diesel powertrains.
Exhaust gas after-treatment catalysts should also be improved to increase the conversion rates of unburnt methane, especially at low temperatures (e.g. during engine warm-up, or when the engine is running at low loads).
tech_0291_compressed-biogas.market_dynamics_summary_en:
The market for this technology is expected to remain niche because of the limited availability of renewable biomethane. Promising application opportunities are municipal fleets supplied by biomethane from municipal or agricultural waste.
In the case of the cost-competitive, abundant production of synthetic methane (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity with a carbon-source) in the future and in countries where gas grids already exist, this technology could be applied on a wider scale.
tech_0291_compressed-biogas.description:
This technology can be adopted in road vehicles (typically heavy duty) powered by an internal combustion engine fuelled by biomethane. The biomethane is stored in high pressure tanks (20-25 MPa). Technical challenges that apply to this technology mostly relate to methane slip (leakage) in the engine, which occurs either at the intake manifold level or in the combustion chamber due to incomplete combustion. Indirect injection engines have higher slip (5% unburnt methane in the exhaust gas) than direct high pressure injection engines (reference: Advanced Motor Fuels Technology Collaboration Programme Annex 51). For this technology to deliver net emissions reductions, the methane would need to be produced from renewable sources (e.g. biomethane or synthetic methane) and burned in direct injection high pressure gas engines, as use of fossil methane in current engine technologies has no CO2 emissions benefit relative to diesel powertrains.
Exhaust gas after-treatment catalysts should also be improved to increase the conversion rates of unburnt methane, especially at low temperatures (e.g. during engine warm-up, or when the engine is running at low loads).
tech_0291_compressed-biogas.NZErationale:
The market for this technology is expected to remain niche because of the limited availability of renewable biomethane. Promising application opportunities are municipal fleets supplied by biomethane from municipal or agricultural waste.
In the case of the cost-competitive, abundant production of synthetic methane (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity with a carbon-source) in the future and in countries where gas grids already exist, this technology could be applied on a wider scale.

tech_0292_liquefied-biogas.sector_zh: 先進燃燒引擎與動力系統
tech_0292_liquefied-biogas.technology_status_summary_zh: 此技術可應用於由生質甲烷內燃機驅動的車輛，通常是重型車輛。液態生質甲烷儲存在低溫儲槽中，其能量密度高於壓縮甲烷，是長途卡車具成本效益的方案。液化生質甲烷動力系統包括專用活塞引擎、缸內直噴裝置及低溫儲槽，主要技術挑戰包括車載液化沼氣（LBG）儲槽在 −162 °C 下的隔熱，以及甲烷逸散與燃燒不完全；後者需要最佳化燃燒系統並配置專用排氣後處理系統。若引擎無法利用液化天然氣（LNG）儲槽內因蒸發形成的高壓甲烷，也會造成甲烷逸散。此外，亦須改善排氣後處理觸媒，以提高未燃甲烷的轉化率，尤其是在引擎暖機或低負載運轉等低溫條件下。
tech_0292_liquefied-biogas.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 由於再生生質甲烷供應有限，此技術的市場預期仍將維持利基規模。較具潛力的應用是使用市政或農業廢棄物所產生生質甲烷的市政車隊。未來若能利用低碳電力電解所得的氫氣與碳源，大量且具成本競爭力地生產合成甲烷，則在既有天然氣管網的國家，此技術可望擴大應用。
tech_0292_liquefied-biogas.technology_status_summary_en:
This technology can be applied in vehicles (typically for heavy-duty applications) powered by an internal combustion engine, and fuelled by biomethane. The liquid biomethane is stored in cryogenic tanks, which enables it to be stored at a higher energy density than compressed methane, and is a cost-efficient solution for long-haul trucks. The liquefied biomethane powertrain, including dedicated piston engine, direct injection device and cryogenic tank, faces some technological challenges:
* insulation of on-board liquefied biogas (LBG) storage in cryogenic tank (-162 °C)
* risk of methane slip and incomplete methane combustion (requires combustion system optimisation and dedicated exhaust after-treatment system) 
Methane slip can also occur from liquefied natural gas (LNG) tank, which releases the evaporative phase methane under high pressure if the engine is not capable of using it.
Exhaust gas after-treatment catalysts should also be improved to increase the conversion rates of unburnt methane, especially at low temperatures (e.g. during engine warm-up, or when the engine is running at low loads).
tech_0292_liquefied-biogas.market_dynamics_summary_en:
The market for this technology is expected to remain niche because of the limited availability of renewable biomethane. Promising application opportunities are municipal fleets supplied by biomethane from municipal or agricultural waste.
In the case of the cost-competitive, abundant production of synthetic methane (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity with a carbon-source) in the future and in countries where gas grids already exist, this technology could be applied on a wider scale.
tech_0292_liquefied-biogas.description:

The liquefied biomethane powertrain, including dedicated piston engine, direct injection device and cryogenic tank, faces some technological challenges:

tech_0293_flex-fuel-and-hybrid-flex-fuel.technology_name_zh: 彈性燃料與油電複合彈性燃料車
tech_0293_flex-fuel-and-hybrid-flex-fuel.sector_zh: 先進燃燒引擎與動力系統
tech_0293_flex-fuel-and-hybrid-flex-fuel.technology_status_summary_zh: 彈性燃料車（FFV）亦稱雙燃料車，其內燃機可使用一種以上的燃料。不同燃料儲存在同一個燃料箱內，燃料成分感測器可讓引擎依實際燃料組成調整噴射量與點火正時。多數彈性燃料車可使用汽油與乙醇的混合燃料，或汽油與甲醇的混合燃料。使用生質乙醇，或使用以再生電力製氫為基礎的合成甲醇、合成液體燃料時，生命週期排放可能較低。
tech_0293_flex-fuel-and-hybrid-flex-fuel.technology_status_summary_en: A flexible-fuel vehicle (FFV) or dual-fuel vehicle (referred to as a flex-fuel vehicle) has an internal combustion engine that is designed to run on more than one fuel. Both fuels are stored in the same tank and a fuel composition sensor allows the engine to adjust its fuel injection and spark timing to the fuel. Most flex-fuel vehicles run either on gasoline and ethanol or gasoline and methanol. When running on bioethanol or fuels such as synthetic methanol or synthetic liquid fuels that are based on hydrogen from renewable electricity, lifecycle emissions can potentially be low.
tech_0293_flex-fuel-and-hybrid-flex-fuel.description: A flexible-fuel vehicle (FFV) or dual-fuel vehicle (referred to as a flex-fuel vehicle) has an internal combustion engine that is designed to run on more than one fuel. Both fuels are stored in the same tank and a fuel composition sensor allows the engine to adjust its fuel injection and spark timing to the fuel. Most flex-fuel vehicles run either on gasoline and ethanol or gasoline and methanol. When running on bioethanol or fuels such as synthetic methanol or synthetic liquid fuels that are based on hydrogen from renewable electricity, lifecycle emissions can potentially be low.

tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.sector_zh: 先進燃燒引擎與動力系統
tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.technology_status_summary_zh: 甲醇引擎亦稱 M100，指以 100% 甲醇為燃料的車輛引擎。其設計與汽油引擎相似，但須進行若干調整，包括採用可防止腐蝕的相容材料、調整燃料噴射系統、配置專用冷啟動裝置與控制策略，以及調整排氣後處理系統。由於甲醇的辛烷值高，引擎可採較高壓縮比以提升熱效率，甚至可能超越柴油引擎。甲醇分子與甲烷一樣僅含一個碳原子，因此引擎的粒狀污染物排放極低。甲醇在標準溫度與壓力下為液體，處理與儲存相對容易，但對人體有毒。甲醇可由生質原料製成生質燃料，也可利用低碳電力電解所得的氫氣與碳源製成合成燃料；然而，可永續供應的製醇生質原料相當有限。
tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 可永續供應的製醇生質原料有限；此外，相較其他低排放運輸替代燃料，合成甲醇的生產成本相當高。
tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.technology_status_summary_en:
Methanol engines (so-called ''M100'', as vehicles fuelled by 100% methanol) are similar in design to gasoline engines, with moderate changes: material compatibility to prevent corrosion, adapted injection system, a dedicated cold start device and strategy, and adapted after-treatment for exhaust gas. Due to the high octane of the fuel, methanol engines can benefit from a high compression ratio, thus increasing thermal efficiency, possibly up to higher levels than for diesel engines. Methanol engines generate very low particulate emissions levels due to the molecule's specificity of having a single carbon atom - just as in the case of methane. The methanol is in liquid form at standard temperature and pressure, making it relatively easy to handle and store, although it is toxic for humans. 
Methanol can be produced as a biofuel or as a synthetic fuel (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity with a carbon source). However, the availability of sustainably sourced biomass to produce methanol is limited.
tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.market_dynamics_summary_en: The availability of sustainably sourced biomass to produce methanol is limited and the cost of producing methanol as a synthetic fuel is quite high relative to other alternative low-emission fuel options for transport.
tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.description:
Methanol engines (so-called ''M100'', as vehicles fuelled by 100% methanol) are similar in design to gasoline engines, with moderate changes: material compatibility to prevent corrosion, adapted injection system, a dedicated cold start device and strategy, and adapted after-treatment for exhaust gas. Due to the high octane of the fuel, methanol engines can benefit from a high compression ratio, thus increasing thermal efficiency, possibly up to higher levels than for diesel engines. Methanol engines generate very low particulate emissions levels due to the molecule's specificity of having a single carbon atom - just as in the case of methane. The methanol is in liquid form at standard temperature and pressure, making it relatively easy to handle and store, although it is toxic for humans. 
Methanol can be produced as a biofuel or as a synthetic fuel (from electrolysis from low-carbon electricity with a carbon source). However, the availability of sustainably sourced biomass to produce methanol is limited.
tech_0294_methanol-fuelled-engine.NZErationale: The availability of sustainably sourced biomass to produce methanol is limited and the cost of producing methanol as a synthetic fuel is quite high relative to other alternative low-emission fuel options for transport.

initiatives.description: In 2012, the Chinese government initiated a methanol vehicle pilot program led by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT). In 2019 a government plan was launched to expand the ''M100'' fleet. The Chinese car manufacturer Geely has invested in factories with production capacity of more than 300 000 methanol cars annually.
In 2019, Chinese truck maker Geely released the first Methanol (M100)-powered heavy duty truck.
In 2025, Chinese OEM Geely claims to have launched a cumulative 50,000 methanol vehicles since the release of its first model.

tech_0295_platooning-and-road-train.technology_status_summary_zh: 車輛編隊與公路列車可藉由降低空氣阻力，減少道路貨運的能源消耗。車輛編隊是指多輛卡車配備先進駕駛輔助系統，透過聯網與自動駕駛車輛（CAV）技術進行智慧車間通訊與自動控制，以較小車距、接近固定的速度編隊行駛，從而降低空氣阻力與燃料消耗，並提高道路容量。以三輛卡車以 80 km/h 編隊行駛為例，車距 20 m 時估計可節省約 5% 燃料，車距縮短至 4 m 時可節省約 15%。主要挑戰之一，是不同品牌卡車在同一編隊中運作，因此需要制定通訊標準。公路列車則是由一輛曳引車牽引數輛拖車。
tech_0295_platooning-and-road-train.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 無論卡車採用何種動力系統，車輛編隊都是具成本效益的智慧化策略，可使道路貨運部門的能源消耗降低 4% 至 15%，並有助於緩解交通壅塞。
tech_0295_platooning-and-road-train.technology_status_summary_en: Platooning and road trains are solutions to reduce energy consumption in road freight transport by reducing aerodynamic drag. Platooning refers to trucks that closely follow each other, and are equipped with state-of-the-art driving support, forming a platoon of trucks driven by smart vehicle communication and automation (CAV) technologies. This allows trucks to drive closer together at near-constant speeds, which reduces air resistance (and thereby fuel consumption) and increases the capacity of roads. The fuel savings of truck platooning are estimated to range from 5% (at 20 metres distance) to 15% (at 4 metres between trucks) for a three-truck platoon travelling at 80 km/h. Among the challenges is the operation of multi-brand trucks in a single platoon, requiring communication standards. A road train consists of several trailers hauled by a single tractor.
tech_0295_platooning-and-road-train.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Whatever the truck powertrain technology, platooning is a cost-effective strategy (''smart'' technology'). It can contribute to the reduction of energy consumption of the road freight sector by 4-15% and can reduce traffic congestion.
(Sources: https://clepa.eu/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/CLEPA-Platooning-Panel-A4-V4-HD.pdf ; http://www.nrel.gov/transportation/fleettest-platooning.html )
tech_0295_platooning-and-road-train.description: Platooning and road trains are solutions to reduce energy consumption in road freight transport by reducing aerodynamic drag. Platooning refers to trucks that closely follow each other, and are equipped with state-of-the-art driving support, forming a platoon of trucks driven by smart vehicle communication and automation (CAV) technologies. This allows trucks to drive closer together at near-constant speeds, which reduces air resistance (and thereby fuel consumption) and increases the capacity of roads. The fuel savings of truck platooning are estimated to range from 5% (at 20 metres distance) to 15% (at 4 metres between trucks) for a three-truck platoon travelling at 80 km/h. Among the challenges is the operation of multi-brand trucks in a single platoon, requiring communication standards. A road train consists of several trailers hauled by a single tractor.

(Sources: https://clepa.eu/wp-content/uploads/2017/10/CLEPA-Platooning-Panel-A4-V4-HD.pdf ; http://www.nrel.gov/transportation/fleettest-platooning.html )

initiatives.description: Pilot project to test semiautonomous  platooning through a joint initiative between Ohio and Indian Departments of Transportation
ENSEMBLE project to test multi-brand platooing
Pony.ai was selected as the first company in China to start testing Autonomous truck platooning, in one year their robotrucks drove more than 5 million km in tests

tech_0296_li-air-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鋰空氣電池以空氣中的氧氣作為正極活性物質，以鋰作為負極。這種材料組合的理論能量密度可達與液體燃料相同的數量級；然而，多項重大技術障礙使現有設計無法達到如此高的能量密度。此技術在理論上極具潛力，但實際可行性及能否達到具應用價值的性能，仍有待驗證。
tech_0296_li-air-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 除鋰離子電池外，若要推動高能耗、高功率及長程運輸工具的電氣化，例如飛機與遠洋船舶，可能需要能量密度更高的電池技術。
tech_0296_li-air-battery.technology_status_summary_en: In this concept the oxygen in the air would act as the cathode and lithium as the anode. This combination of materials offers a theoretical energy density of the same order of magnitude as liquid fuels. However, there are several significant technical barriers that prevent any design from reaching such a high density. While this technology is very promising in theory, its practical feasibility and viable performance are still to be demonstrated.
tech_0296_li-air-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Beyond lithium-ion, technologies that have higher energy density might be needed to electrify vehicles that operate in energy- and power-intensive and long-distance operations, including aircrafts and long-haul ships.
tech_0296_li-air-battery.description: In this concept the oxygen in the air would act as the cathode and lithium as the anode. This combination of materials offers a theoretical energy density of the same order of magnitude as liquid fuels. However, there are several significant technical barriers that prevent any design from reaching such a high density. While this technology is very promising in theory, its practical feasibility and viable performance are still to be demonstrated.
tech_0296_li-air-battery.NZErationale: Beyond lithium-ion, technologies that have higher energy density might be needed to electrify vehicles that operate in energy- and power-intensive and long-distance operations, including aircrafts and long-haul ships.

initiatives.description: A lithium-air battery able to operate at room temperature is developed.

tech_0297_li-s-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鋰硫電池通常以鋰作為負極、硫作為正極，具有達成極高重量能量密度的潛力。由於硫價格低廉且蘊藏量豐富，不需要昂貴的正極材料。目前已開發出能量密度超過 400 Wh/kg 的原型電芯；然而，較低的體積能量密度及目前偏短的循環壽命，限制了其在主流電動車市場的吸引力。若能解決循環壽命短與安全性等技術障礙，國防領域可能率先採用。
tech_0297_li-s-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 除鋰離子電池外，若要推動高能耗、高功率及長程運輸工具的電氣化，包括飛機、船舶及重型卡車（例如港區短程運輸、區域運輸與長途運輸卡車），需要能量密度更高且材料成本更低的電池技術。
tech_0297_li-s-battery.technology_status_summary_en: This battery typically uses lithium as an anode while the cathode is made of sulphur. This concept offers the prospect of achieving a very high gravimetric energy density and does not require expensive cathode materials, as sulphur is very inexpensive and abundant. Prototype cells have already been developed with energy densities above 400 Wh/kg. However, their lower volumetric energy density and currently short cycle life limit their attractiveness for mainstream EV applications. Defence may prove an early adopter, if technical obstacles such as short cycle life and safety concerns can be addressed.
tech_0297_li-s-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Beyond lithium-ion, technologies that have higher energy density and lower material costs are needed to electrify vehicles that operate in energy- and power-intensive and long-distance operations, including aircrafts, ships and heavy-duty (e.g. drayage, regional and long-haul) trucks.
tech_0297_li-s-battery.description: This battery typically uses lithium as an anode while the cathode is made of sulphur. This concept offers the prospect of achieving a very high gravimetric energy density and does not require expensive cathode materials, as sulphur is very inexpensive and abundant. Prototype cells have already been developed with energy densities above 400 Wh/kg. However, their lower volumetric energy density and currently short cycle life limit their attractiveness for mainstream EV applications. initiatives.description: In June 2020, EU commission mentioned the strong and weak points about Li-Sufar battery as the result of Horizon, Research and Innovation project.

In March 2021, "2021 roadmap pm lithium sulfur batteries" was published as a technical paper on Journal of Physics Energy. It gave an implication of the possibility LiS batteries would be used in  the aerospace sector.
In May 2023, Stellantis announced to invest in Lyten’s Breakthrough Lithium-Sulphur EV Battery Technology.
In 2024, US-based startup Lyten announced plans to invest more than 1 billion US dollars to build the world’s first Lithium-Sulfur battery gigafactory.
In 2024, Stellantis announced to partner with Zeta Energy to bring lithium-suplur batteries to the market.

China’s GNE develops a prototype of lithium-sulfur battery, claiming an energy density of 700Wh/kg, more than double than of state-of-the-art lithium-ion batteries, but without reporting information on volumetric energy density or costs.
Researchers in the United States found that the addition of iodine into the sulphur structure to increase its electronic conductivity and the overall batter cycle life.
In 2024, Chrysler announced that will test Lythen lithium-sulphur batteries for its Halcyon concept car.

In 2025, researchers between Germany and China identified a material acting as redox mediator and accelerating solid-solid sulfur reaction in all solid-state lithium-sulfur batteries, demonstrating high cycle life and opening up a potential pathway for the development of these type of batteries in the future.

tech_0298_lithium-ion-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鋰離子電池是電動車（EV）、電池儲能系統（BESS）、可攜式電子產品及其他電子裝置的主流電池技術。2024 年，電動車電池約占電池需求的四分之三，BESS 占 15%，可攜式電子產品占 5%，電動自行車與無人機等其他應用占 5%。鋰離子電池的核心是電芯，外型可分為方形、圓柱形及軟包等形式；電芯可組裝成模組與電池包供電動車使用，也可整合為完整的貨櫃式 BESS，或直接用於可攜式電子產品。電芯的三項關鍵組件為負極、正極及電解質。負極與正極負責儲存鋰離子，鋰離子在充放電期間於兩極之間移動；電解質則在使兩極保持電子絕緣的同時，提供鋰離子往返的傳輸途徑。負極通常以石墨為主，並逐漸提高矽的占比。正極則有多種化學體系並存，最常見的是磷酸鋰鐵（LFP）及鎳系材料，包括鋰鎳錳鈷氧化物（NMC）與鋰鎳鈷鋁氧化物（NCA）。NMC 正極中的元素比例各不相同，例如鎳、錳、鈷等比例的 NMC333，以及比例為 8:1:1 的 NMC811；目前趨勢是降低鈷含量並提高鎳含量。2024 年，LFP 幾乎占電動車電池市場的一半，其餘大多採用 NMC；同年 LFP 也占 BESS 新增裝置的 90% 以上。可攜式電子產品則因重視高體積能量密度，仍以較早期的鋰鈷氧化物（LCO）為主。鋰離子電池雖已成熟，創新仍快速推進。近年 LFP 技術，尤其自第四代開始，已能以低於 NMC 的成本提供足夠的電動車續航里程及更長壽命，因此對降低電動車生產成本日益重要；但 NMC 仍具有較高能量密度與較長續航里程。同時，安全標準持續提高，實際電池壽命也顯示比製造商最初預估更長，生產成本則持續下降。2024 年依銷量加權的電池包平均成本約為 115 美元/kWh；在電動車電池包層級，NMC 的最佳能量密度約為 250 Wh/kg，LFP 約為 200 Wh/kg。
tech_0298_lithium-ion-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 鋰離子電池目前是汽車及電池儲能系統領域的主流電池技術，支撐道路運輸電氣化，並協助電網提高間歇性再生能源的占比。未來十年預期仍將維持主導地位，但可能由鈉離子電池、固態電池等其他技術補充。
tech_0298_lithium-ion-battery.technology_status_summary_en:
Lithium-ion (Li-ion) is the dominant battery technology for electric vehicle (EV) applications, battery energy storage systems (BESS),  portable and other electronic devices. In 2024, EV battery deployment accounted for about three-qaurters of battery demand, against 15% for BESS, 5% for portable electronics, and 5% for other applications, such as electric bikes and drones. The core element of lithium-ion batteries is the cell, which can have different size formats (prismatic, cylindrical, or pouch), which is assembled in modules and packs for uses in EVs, in full containerized systems for BESS, or used as such in portable electronics. Battery cells have three key components are the anode, cathode, and electrolyte. The anode and cathode store the lithium-ion, which are transfered from one to the other during battery discharge and charge, while the electrolyte ensure the movement of the li-ion from the anode to the cathode (and vice versa) while insultaing them electronically. The anode is typically composed of graphite with increasing shares of silicon, and various cathode chemistries coexist (the most common being the lithium iron phosphate (LFP) and nickel-based chemistries - lithium nickel manganese cobalt oxide (NMC) and lithium nickel cobalt aluminium oxide (NCA)). Within NMC cathodes, the elements can be found in various proportions. These range, for example, from NMC333, with equal shares of Ni, Mn and Co, to NMC811, with composition ratios of Ni, Mn, and Co of 8:1:1, with a current trend towards moving to lower cobalt content and higher nickel content. In 2024, LFP accounted for almost half of the EV battery market, with most of the rest using NMC batteries. LFP also accounted for over 90% of BESS installations in the same year. Portable electronics are still dominated by the older lithium cobalt oxyde (LCO) thanks to its high volumetric energy density.
Li-ion is already a mature technology, but it innovation continue at a fast pace. Recent innovation in LFP technologies, particularly starting from its 4th generation, are increasing the importance of this chemistry to decrease EV production costs as they now enable largely sufficient electric ranges and longer lifetime while being less costly than their NMC eqquivalent, albeit the latter still provide greater energy density and therefore range. At the same time, safety standards are increasing, battery lifetime is demonstrating to be even longer than what initially predicted by manufacturers, and production costs continue to decline. The 2024 sales-weighted average cost was around USD 115/kWh at pack level. The best energy density of this technology is around 250 Wh/kg at the EV battery pack level for NMC batteries, and 200 Wh/Kg for LFP batteries.
tech_0298_lithium-ion-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Li-ion batteries are the dominant battery technology in the automotive and battery energy storage system sectors today, underpining road trasport electriffication and support greater share in intermitted renewables in power grids. It is expected to remain the dominant technology in the next decade to come, even if it could be complemented by other technologies such as sodium-ion and solid-state batteries.

initiatives.description: First clarification of reaction types supporting lithium-ion batteries.
Development of the first cathode material powering first lithium-ion batteries, still used today.
The first development of the rocking chair theory, the fundation and key working principle of  lithium-ion batteries.
The first  unsymmetrical intercalation cell that shuttled Li ion back and forth was demonstrated.
Integration of intercalation cathode, graphitic anode, and carbonate electrolyte in the first commercially viable lithium-ion battery, led by Yoshino for Tokyo-based chemical company Asahi Kasei.
In 1991, Japanese electronics company Sony worked with Asahi Kasei to bring the world's first lithium-ion batteries to the market (for portable electronics).
Nissan introduced the Altra, the first series-produced electric car powered by lithium-ion batteries, making lithium-ion EV technology available beyond prototype fleets.
Development of lithium iron phosphate cathode, one of the two lithium-ion battery chemistry dominating the market today.
Development of lithium nickel cobalt manganese oxyde cathode, one of the two lithium-ion battery chemistry dominating the market today.
First EV developed for mass market using lithium-ion batteries, the Tesla Roadster.
First mass-produced EV using lithium-ion batteries, the Nissan Leaf.

First deployment of cell-to-pack technology, increeasing EV battery energy density and decreasing their costs. This technology opened the possibility to widespread adoption of LFP batteries in EV applications.
BYD launch of its prismatic blade battery, which also has a structural role in cell-to-pack configuration.

In 2023, China-based CATL unveiled the first 4th generation LFP battery for electric vehicles, offering 700 km range for large light-duty vehicles and the ability to recharge from 20% to 80% in 10 minutes.
Multi-graded anode microstructure to enable ultra-fast charging.
CATL launches condensed battery with an energy density of up to 500 Wh/kg, aiming electrification of passenger aircrafts.

In 2024, CATL unveiled TENER, a dedicated stationary storage battery with a capacity of 6.25 MWh with long cycle life and almost no degradation in the first 5 years of operation thanks to the use of additives to increase the battery lifetime.

First mass market deployment of cell-to-body technology, increeasing EV battery energy density and decreasing their costs. This technology opened the possibility to widespread adoption of LFP batteries in EV applications.
Deployment of MW-scale charging for electric car battereies, enabling up to 500 km of additional ranges in 5 minutes.

Development of No Propagation 3.0 technology, able to prevent battery fires or smoke and to continue power the vehicle for up to one hour in the event of thermal runaway because of a battery failure, provided the incident does not result from significant mechanical damage to the battery pack such as that caused by a vehicle collision.
First commissione commercial plant of LFP material production.
Nissan teamed up with Sony to launch the world's first lithium-ion–powered car — the Prairie Joy EV — although it remained a limited prototype intended for fleet use.

tech_0299_manganese-rich-cathode-battery.technology_status_summary_zh: 鋰離子電池採用富錳正極，可望以低成本的錳取代大量鎳、鈷等昂貴關鍵礦物，有助於降低鋰鎳錳鈷氧化物（NMC）電池的生產成本，縮小其與磷酸鋰鐵（LFP）電池的成本差距。LFP 電池也在提高錳含量，以維持低生產成本並提升能量密度。兩種重要的富錳化學體系為鋰鎳錳氧化物（LNMO）及富鋰錳系 NMC（LMR-NMC）。LNMO 不含鈷，能量密度明顯高於 LFP，但低於高鎳化學體系。LMR-NMC 因富含鋰而具有比許多高鎳化學體系更高的能量密度，但其鎳含量遠低於性能最佳的高鎳化學體系。
tech_0299_manganese-rich-cathode-battery.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 富錳化學體系可在維持較高能量密度的同時，降低鎳與鈷的需求，並縮小 NMC 與 LFP 電池之間的生產成本差距，長期可望促進電池市場與材料體系多元化。
tech_0299_manganese-rich-cathode-battery.technology_status_summary_en: Manganese-rich cathodes for Li-ion can potentially substitute significant amounts of expensive critical minerals such as nickel and cobalt with low-cost manganese. These cathodes have significant advantages for reducing lithium nickel cobalt manganese oxyde (NMC) battery production costs, reducing the gap with lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries. Higher manganese content is also being pursued in LFP batteries to increase their energy density while maintaining low production costs. Two significant manganese-rich chemistries include lithium nickel manganese oxide (LNMO) and lithium-manganese-rich NMC (LMR-NMC). LNMO contains no cobalt and has a notably higher energy density than LFP (though lower than high-nickel chemistries). LMR-NMC actually has a higher energy density than many high-nickel chemistries due to being lithium-rich (increasing lithium exposure) but it contains significantly less nickel than the top performance high-nickel chemistries.
tech_0299_manganese-rich-cathode-battery.market_dynamics_summary_en: Manganese-rich chemistries can be important to reduce nickel/cobalt demand while still achieving higher energy densities while reducing the production cost gap between NMC and LFP batteries, potentially offering more long term market diversification.
tech_0299_manganese-rich-cathode-battery.description: Manganese-rich cathodes for Li-ion can potentially substitute significant amounts of expensive critical minerals such as nickel and cobalt with low-cost manganese. These cathodes have significant advantages for reducing lithium nickel cobalt manganese oxyde (NMC) battery production costs, reducing the gap with lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries. Higher manganese content is also being pursued in LFP batteries to increase their energy density while maintaining low production costs. Two significant manganese-rich chemistries include lithium nickel manganese oxide (LNMO) and lithium-manganese-rich NMC (LMR-NMC). LNMO contains no cobalt and has a notably higher energy density than LFP (though lower than high-nickel chemistries). LMR-NMC actually has a higher energy density than many high-nickel chemistries due to being lithium-rich (increasing lithium exposure) but it contains significantly less nickel than the top performance high-nickel chemistries.
tech_0299_manganese-rich-cathode-battery.NZErationale: Manganese-rich chemistries can be important to reduce nickel/cobalt demand while still achieving higher energy densities while reducing the production cost gap between NMC and LFP batteries, potentially offering more long term market diversification.

initiatives.description: In September 2022, Nano One and Euro Manganese  have jointly demonstrated cathode materials made directly from Euro Manganese sourced electrolytic manganese metal using Nano One’s One-Pot Process. In this first milestone, pilot plant samples from Euro Manganese’s Chvaletice Manganese Project have been successfully validated as feedstock for Nano One’s patented One-Pot and M2CAM cathode production technologies.

In January 2022, Arkema and Morrow have signed a Memorandum of Understanding for the development, screening and testing of novel electrolyte formulations for the next generation of high voltage batteries, including LNMO.
Umicore starts pilot production of mangnanese rich NMC.
General Motors and LG Energy Solutions developed lithium-manganese-rich prismatic battery, aiming at commercialization in 2028.
Ford has announced a breakthrough in lithium-manganese-rich battery technology, which the company is now working to scale up for commercial application.

tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.technology_name: Low silicon content graphite anode battery
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.technology_name_zh: 低矽含量石墨負極電池
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.technology_status_summary_zh: 矽是極具潛力的負極材料，可摻入傳統石墨負極，也可取代石墨。矽的儲鋰容量約為石墨的十倍，因此具有大幅提高能量密度的潛力。低矽含量（<10%）可使負極能量密度獲得漸進式提升。
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在石墨負極中摻入矽，可提高負極乃至整體電池的能量密度，延長續航里程，並可能降低每 kWh 的成本。
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.technology_status_summary_en: Silicon is a promising anode material that can either be integrated with conventional graphite anode, or substitute it. The lithium storage capacity of silicon is roughly ten times higher than that of graphite, meaning that it holds great potential for increased energy density. Low silicon content (<10%) provides an incremental improvement in anode energy density.
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.market_dynamics_summary_en: Silicon doping in graphite anodes increase the energy density of the anode and therefore of the battery, enabling longer ranges and potentially decreasing prices per kWh.
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.description: Silicon is a promising anode material that can either be integrated with conventional graphite anode, or substitute it. The lithium storage capacity of silicon is roughly ten times higher than that of graphite, meaning that it holds great potential for increased energy density. Low silicon content (<10%) provides an incremental improvement in anode energy density.
tech_0300_low-silicon-content-graphite-a.NZErationale: Silicon doping in graphite anodes increase the energy density of the anode and therefore of the battery, enabling longer ranges and potentially decreasing prices per kWh.

tech_0301_medium-high-silicon-content-an.technology_status_summary_zh: 矽是極具潛力的負極材料，可摻入傳統石墨負極，也可取代石墨。矽的儲鋰容量約為石墨的十倍，因此具有大幅提高能量密度的潛力。中等矽含量的範圍為 >10% 至 50%。鋰離子電池要達到中高矽含量仍具挑戰，因為矽顆粒在充放電過程中會反覆膨脹與收縮，體積甚至可超過初始體積的三倍；不過，預鋰化等策略可協助縮小體積變化幅度。
tech_0301_medium-high-silicon-content-an.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 提高負極的矽含量（>10%），可在不改變正極化學體系的情況下顯著提升電池能量密度；若此技術能在 2030 年前部署，可能尤其重要。
tech_0301_medium-high-silicon-content-an.technology_status_summary_en: Silicon is a promising anode material that can either be integrated with conventional graphite anode, or substitute it. The lithium storage capacity of silicon is roughly ten times higher than that of graphite, meaning that it holds great potential for increased energy density. Medium silicon content ranges from over 10 to 50%. Reaching medium to high silicon content in lithium-ion batteries is challenging because of the expansion and contraction of silicon particles (up to over three times their initial volume) during battery charging and discharging, even though strategies such as pre-lithiation can help reduce this range.
tech_0301_medium-high-silicon-content-an.market_dynamics_summary_en: Higher silicon content in anodes (>10%) can significantly increase the energy density of batteries without requiring a change to cathode chemistry; this technology can be particularly important if deployed in the period before 2030.
tech_0301_medium-high-silicon-content-an.description: Silicon is a promising anode material that can either be integrated with conventional graphite anode, or substitute it. The lithium storage capacity of silicon is roughly ten times higher than that of graphite, meaning that it holds great potential for increased energy density. Medium silicon content ranges from over 10 to 50%. Reaching medium to high silicon content in lithium-ion batteries is challenging because of the expansion and contraction of silicon particles (up to over three times their initial volume) during battery charging and discharging, even though strategies such as pre-lithiation can help reduce this range.
tech_0301_medium-high-silicon-content-an.NZErationale: Higher silicon content in anodes (>10%) can significantly increase the energy density of batteries without requiring a change to cathode chemistry; this technology can be particularly important if deployed in the period before 2030.

initiatives.description: In April 2021, Sionic Energy has relaunched complete advanced battery cell designs that incorporate its technologies into a drop-in, rapidly commercialized, low-cost, high performance, safer Li-ion technology. It's incorporate the company’s complete technology innovations that deliver up to 50% greater energy density, 30% lower cost, and increased safety, and can be integrated into cylindrical, pouch, or prismatic cell formats in existing cell production supply chains and infrastructure. Production-scale prototype cells will be available in Q4 2022 for customer evaluations and testing.

In October 2022, Solid Power announced to intends to commercialize high-content silicon cells in 2026 and internal testing shows the potential benefits.  Solid Power’s coin pouch cells had a stack-level-specific energy of ~350 Wh/Kg, despite Tesla’s industry-leading 2170 batteries provide 260 Wh/kg.

In April 2023, Sila, a next-generation battery materials company, announced the availability of its high-performance nano-composite silicon (NCS) anode, Titan Silicon. Titan Silicon can also dramatically improve battery charging time, charging a battery from 10% to 80% in just 20 minutes – even if your charge time is currently as long as 60 minutes.

In May 2022, Mercedes-Benz will incorporate silicon-based anodes battery in its upcoming electric G-Class . The battery, made by Sila Nanotechnologies is 20 percent to 40 percent more energy dense than comparable cells currently available and reaching more than 800 Wh/l at cell level, Mercedes said.

tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.technology_name: High energy density lithium-ion batteries (>400 wh/kg)
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.technology_name_zh: 高能量密度鋰離子電池（>400 Wh/kg）
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.technology_status_summary_zh: 高能量密度（>400 Wh/kg）鋰離子電池通常採用鋰金屬負極或矽負極。若鋰枝晶與體積膨脹等技術挑戰能獲得解決或安全控制，便可加速重型道路運輸等需要長續航里程之應用的電氣化。
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 高能量密度（>400 Wh/kg）鋰離子電池通常採用鋰金屬負極或矽負極。若鋰枝晶與體積膨脹等技術挑戰能獲得解決或安全控制，便可加速長途重型道路運輸等需要長續航里程之應用的電氣化。
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.technology_status_summary_en: High energy density (>400 Wh/kg) lithium-ion batteries are typically based on either lithium metal or silicon anodes. If technical challenges such as lithium dendrites and volume expansion are solved or safely managed, they could enable faster electrification of applications requiring longer driving ranges, such as heavy-duty road transport.
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.market_dynamics_summary_en: High energy density (>400 Wh/kg) lithium-ion batteries are typically based on either lithium metal or silicon anodes. If technical challenges such as lithium dendrites and volume expansion are solved or safely managed, they could enable faster electrification of applications requiring longer driving ranges, such as long-haul heavy-duty road transport.
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.description: High energy density (>400 Wh/kg) lithium-ion batteries are typically based on either lithium metal or silicon anodes. If technical challenges such as lithium dendrites and volume expansion are solved or safely managed, they could enable faster electrification of applications requiring longer driving ranges, such as heavy-duty road transport.
tech_0302_high-energy-density-lithium-io.NZErationale: High energy density (>400 Wh/kg) lithium-ion batteries are typically based on either lithium metal or silicon anodes. If technical challenges such as lithium dendrites and volume expansion are solved or safely managed, they could enable faster electrification of applications requiring longer driving ranges, such as long-haul heavy-duty road transport.

Titan Silicon can also dramatically improve battery charging time, charging a battery from 10% to 80% in just 20 minutes – even if your charge time is currently as long as 60 minutes.
CATL launches condensed battery with an energy density of up to 500 Wh/kg, aiming electrification of passenger aircrafts.
Coreshell Launches 60 Ah Battery Cells using domestically sourced metallurgical silicon anode.
Altech Batteries raised $4MM to develop a silicon-alumina anode pilot plant, with additional plans for a 4 GWh battery factory.
SES AI’s 100 Ah Li-Metal Is First to Successfully Pass the Global Electric Vehicle EV Safety Standard Test GB38031-2020.
SK On is developing polymer electrolytes for lithium metal batteries.
