tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.technology_name: High temperature proton exchange membrane fuel cell electric ship
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.technology_name_zh: 高溫質子交換膜燃料電池電動船舶
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.technology_status_summary_zh: 高溫質子交換膜燃料電池（HT-PEMFC）對雜質的敏感度低，液化天然氣、甲醇、柴油及氫氣經外部重組後均可作為燃料。其操作溫度為 150 至 200 °C，效率為 50% 至 60%。相較其他海事燃料電池技術，成本屬中等，單一模組的輸出功率最高可達 30 kW，但使用壽命仍存在不確定性。由於輸出功率有限，目前進行中的示範計畫顯示，此技術可能主要適用於中小型船舶。
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 燃料電池的能源效率高於船用內燃機，雖然兩者差距不像道路車輛那麼大，且燃料電池不排放污染物。高溫質子交換膜燃料電池可使用多種燃料，能為船舶營運商提供燃料選擇彈性，但膜材含有稀有材料，導致成本較高。其功率密度有限，對長途航線構成挑戰，因此較適合中短程船舶。
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.technology_status_summary_en:
High Temperature Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cells (HT-PEMFC) have low sensitivity to impurities, thus being able to run with LNG, methanol, diesel and hydrogen after an external reforming stage. The operational temperature is 150-200 °C and these HT-PEMFC have an efficiency of 50-60%. They have a moderate cost (compared to other fuel cell technologies for maritime applications), and can have modules of up to 30 kW of power. There is uncertainty regarding their lifetime, http://www.dnvgl.com/maritime/publications/alternative-fuel-assessment-download.html.
Due to limited power output, this technology is likely to be used preferably for small and medium vessels, as currently proven by the ongoing demonstrations.
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Fuel cells have higher energy efficiency than internal combustion maritime engines - though the gap is not as high as it is in the case of road vehicles - and do not emit pollutants.
High temperature proton exchange membranes (PEMs) can work with several fuels and thus provide flexibility to ship operators, but are expensive due to the rare materials in the membrane. 
Their limited power density is challenging for long-distance routes, making this technology more suited to short- and medium-distance vessels.
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.description:
High Temperature Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cells (HT-PEMFC) have low sensitivity to impurities, thus being able to run with LNG, methanol, diesel and hydrogen after an external reforming stage. The operational temperature is 150-200 °C and these HT-PEMFC have an efficiency of 50-60%. They have a moderate cost (compared to other fuel cell technologies for maritime applications), and can have modules of up to 30 kW of power. There is uncertainty regarding their lifetime, http://www.dnvgl.com/maritime/publications/alternative-fuel-assessment-download.html.
Due to limited power output, this technology is likely to be used preferably for small and medium vessels, as currently proven by the ongoing demonstrations.
tech_0323_high-temperature-proton-exchan.NZErationale:
Fuel cells have higher energy efficiency than internal combustion maritime engines - though the gap is not as high as it is in the case of road vehicles - and do not emit pollutants.
High temperature proton exchange membranes (PEMs) can work with several fuels and thus provide flexibility to ship operators, but are expensive due to the rare materials in the membrane. 
Their limited power density is challenging for long-distance routes, making this technology more suited to short- and medium-distance vessels.

initiatives.description: Loan from EIB financing technology research, development, innovation (RDI) and production scaling efforts focusing on HT-PEM fuel cell systems for maritime auxiliary power units (APUs) and propulsion from 2024 to 2027. The aim is to accelerate the decarbonisation of maritime transport by advancing the promoter's HT-PEM and initiating its deployment, which will reduce emissions and therefore deliver significant environmental and economic benefits.
First 1MW pilot to be installed in 2026 for Maersk

Advent Technologies A/S (“Advent”), has signed a Joint Development Agreement (“JDA”) with Siemens Energy to develop an integrated 500kW High-Temperature Proton Exchange Membrane (“HT-PEM”) fuel cell solution for maritime applications and then evaluate to scale down/up the system to fit with market requirements from motor and Giga Yachts to ferries and container/commercial ships.

tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.technology_name: Molten carbonate fuel cell electric ship
tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.technology_name_zh: 熔融碳酸鹽燃料電池電動船舶
tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.technology_status_summary_zh: 熔融碳酸鹽燃料電池（MCFC）在 600 至 700 °C 的極高溫下運作，對雜質的敏感度中等，燃料選擇彈性高。相較其他海事燃料電池技術，MCFC 成本非常高，但可製成輸出功率最高達 500 kW 的大型模組，且使用壽命良好。其典型效率約為 50%，搭配熱回收後最高可提升至 85%。由於輸出功率仍有限，目前進行中的示範計畫顯示，此技術可能主要適用於中小型船舶。
tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 燃料電池的能源效率略高於船用內燃機，且不排放污染物。熔融碳酸鹽燃料電池具有效率高、燃料彈性佳及模組尺寸較大的特點，可能成為遠洋船舶的動力方案。然而，其功率密度有限，對長途航線構成挑戰，因此較適合中短程船舶。
tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.technology_status_summary_en:
Molten Carbonate Fuel Cells (MCFC) operate at very high temperature (600-700 degrees Celsius). They have medium sensitivity to impurities and are flexible with regards to fuel choice. MCFC are very costly (compared to other fuel cell technologies for maritime applications). They can have large modules (up to 500 kW of power) and have a good lifetime. Their typical efficiency is around 50%, which can be optimised to 85% with heat recovery, http://www.dnvgl.com/maritime/publications/alternative-fuel-assessment-download.html
Due to limited power output, this technology is likely to be used preferably for small and medium vessels, as currently proved by the ongoing demonstrations.
tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.market_dynamics_summary_en:
Fuel cells have limited better energy efficiency than internal combustion maritime engines and do not emit pollutants.
Molten Carbonate Fuel Cells (MCFC) have high efficiency, high flexibility and large size, potentially making them an option to power oceangoing vessels.
Their limited power density is challenging for long-distance routes, making this technology more suited to short- and medium-distance vessels.
tech_0324_molten-carbonate-fuel-cell-ele.description:
Molten Carbonate Fuel Cells (MCFC) operate at very high temperature (600-700 degrees Celsius). They have medium sensitivity to impurities and are flexible with regards to fuel choice. Their typical efficiency is around 50%, which can be optimised to 85% with heat recovery, http://www.dnvgl.com/maritime/publications/alternative-fuel-assessment-download.html

Their limited power density is challenging for long-distance routes, making this technology more suited to short- and medium-distance vessels.

initiatives.description: Large MCFC fuel cells prototype tested on-board the offshore supply vessel "Viking Lady"

tech_0325_automated-and-connected-ship.technology_status_summary_zh: 自動化與聯網船舶可望提升能源效率。完全自主船舶可能以較低航速執行更長航程，從而提高燃料效率。
tech_0325_automated-and-connected-ship.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 潛在節能幅度取決於自動化程度。部分業界利害關係人宣稱節能潛力最高可達 15%，但實際操作條件下的成效可能較低。
tech_0325_automated-and-connected-ship.technology_status_summary_en: Automated and connected ships may improve energy efficiency. Fully autonomous ships may be able to take longer voyages at lower speeds and greater fuel efficiency.
tech_0325_automated-and-connected-ship.market_dynamics_summary_en: Potential energy savings depend on the level of automation. High energy saving potentials up to 15% have been claimed by some stakeholders, but actual values in real conditions may be lower.
tech_0325_automated-and-connected-ship.description: Automated and connected ships may improve energy efficiency. Fully autonomous ships may be able to take longer voyages at lower speeds and greater fuel efficiency.
tech_0325_automated-and-connected-ship.NZErationale: Potential energy savings depend on the level of automation. High energy saving potentials up to 15% have been claimed by some stakeholders, but actual values in real conditions may be lower.

initiatives.description: The world's first battery-powered containership "Birkeland" operated by Yeara since the end of 2021 in Norway is expected to be certified as autonomous after 2 years of testing.

The world’s first fully electric autonomous container vessel, Yara Birkeland, celebrated  5 years of service. It has successfully executed supervised Auto-Docking and Auto-Crossing functionalities, paving the way for fully autonomous voyages.

AVIKUS, HD Hyundai’s autonomous navigation in-house startup, announced its autonomous navigation is proven to reduce fuel use by as much as 15%. This was measured on on a 325,000-ton Very Large Ore Carrier (VLOC) operating several times on a 5,800-mile route from Singapore to Brazil using Avikus’ autonomous HiNAS Control system.

A trial was conducted by the DFFAS (Designing the Future of Full Autonomous Ship) consortium to simulate the actual operation of fully autonomous ship. The ship, a 750 gt container ship, travelled along the 790 km route from Tokyo bay to Ise bay, through the busy Uraga and Irago channels.

tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.technology_status_summary_zh: 傳統上，航運公司通常根據歷年航行經驗規劃航線。波浪、風及洋流均會影響船舶能源消耗；利用天氣預報、衛星或浮標網路資料，並採用可結合人工智慧的演算法進行航線最佳化，可降低能源消耗。
tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 透過避開逆風、巨浪與逆流海域，全年能源消耗可降低約 4% 至 8%。
tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.technology_status_summary_en: Traditionally, shipping routes are usually drawn up by shipping companies according to their historical navigation experience. Waves, wind and currents have an influence on the ship’s energy consumption, which can be reduced through route optimisation using algorithms that can use artificial intelligence, relying on weather forecasts, data from satellites or buoy networks.
tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.market_dynamics_summary_en: By avoiding areas with headwinds, high waves and opposite currents, energy consumption can be reduced by 4-8% in the course of a year.
tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.description: Traditionally, shipping routes are usually drawn up by shipping companies according to their historical navigation experience. Waves, wind and currents have an influence on the ship’s energy consumption, which can be reduced through route optimisation using algorithms that can use artificial intelligence, relying on weather forecasts, data from satellites or buoy networks.
tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.NZErationale: By avoiding areas with headwinds, high waves and opposite currents, energy consumption can be reduced by 4-8% in the course of a year.

initiatives.description: Some systems use weather forecasts combined with data collected from the ship itself (fuel consumption, wave and wind impact) as an input to the algorithm to compute the best route based on the selected criteria (e.g. earliest arrival time, lowest fuel consumption).
Some systems additionally use  the data collected by a network of buoys for better accuracy on currents, waves and winds.

Artificial Intelligence can be applied for further optimization: at the voyage planning stage by taking into account the specificities of the ship, and during the voyage itself by reassessing the course in real time with sufficient anticipation to allow for smooth manoeuvering
Currently, more that 15,000 vessels globally implement weather routing in some form or another, but only 10% of ships have a fully integrated system

tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.id: Transport > Shipping > Vessel operations > Dynamic route optimisation
tech_0326_dynamic-route-optimisation.id_zh: 運輸 > 航運 > 船舶營運 > 動態航線最佳化

tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.technology_status_summary_zh: 吃水是船舶沒入水中的深度，縱傾則是船艏與船艉吃水的差值。不同縱傾狀態會改變船體浸水表面積，進而影響能源消耗。
tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 主動規劃貨物裝載並據以最佳化縱傾與吃水，可節省燃料，典型幅度為 0.5% 至 3%；對經常以部分載重狀態航行的貨櫃船與滾裝船，最高可達 5%。
tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.technology_status_summary_en: Draught measures how deep the ship is submerged into the water, and trim, the difference between bow and stern draught. Depending on the trim, the wetted surface area of the hull will be different, which affects energy consumption.
tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.market_dynamics_summary_en: Actively planning cargo loading, and thereby optimising the trim and draught, can save fuel: typically 0.5-3% and up to 5% for container and Ro-Ro ships that tend to navigate in partial load conditions.
tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.description: Draught measures how deep the ship is submerged into the water, and trim, the difference between bow and stern draught. Depending on the trim, the wetted surface area of the hull will be different, which affects energy consumption.
tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.NZErationale: Actively planning cargo loading, and thereby optimising the trim and draught, can save fuel: typically 0.5-3% and up to 5% for container and Ro-Ro ships that tend to navigate in partial load conditions.

initiatives.description: Hapag-Lloyd deployed a trim optimization system on 173 out of its 253 vessels

tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.id: Transport > Shipping > Vessel operations > Trim and draught optimisation
tech_0327_trim-and-draught-optimisation.id_zh: 運輸 > 航運 > 船舶營運 > 縱傾與吃水最佳化

tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.technology_status_summary_zh: 電池電動船舶的推進系統與輔助設備均由電池供電，並在靠泊期間由岸上電網充電。受限於目前電池的能量密度，這類船舶主要適用於短程航線。
tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在淨零排放情境中，電池電動船舶至 2050 年在整體航運業的部署占比雖低，但可在短程及國內航運扮演重要角色；至 2050 年，可供應國內航運能源消耗的 3%。例如，此技術適合船舶在未來劃設的水域零排放區內航行。
tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.technology_status_summary_en: In battery electric ships, the power for propulsion and auxiliaries comes from batteries, which are charged while at berth from the on-shore electricity grid. Given the current limitations of the energy density of batteries, battery electric ships will mostly find applications on short-distance routes.
tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.market_dynamics_summary_en: In spite of the technology having a low deployment in the NZE Scenario by 2050 within the overall shipping sector, for short distance and domestic shipping it can play an important role: 3% of the energy consumption of domestic shipping by 2050 under the NZE Scenario.  For example, it is a suitable technology for circulation in future zero-emissions zones on water.
tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.description: In battery electric ships, the power for propulsion and auxiliaries comes from batteries, which are charged while at berth from the on-shore electricity grid. Given the current limitations of the energy density of batteries, battery electric ships will mostly find applications on short-distance routes.
tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.NZErationale: In spite of the technology having a low deployment in the NZE Scenario by 2050 within the overall shipping sector, for short distance and domestic shipping it can play an important role: 3% of the energy consumption of domestic shipping by 2050 under the NZE Scenario.  For example, it is a suitable technology for circulation in future zero-emissions zones on water.

initiatives.description: Norway is planning on creating the first zero-emissions zone on water. In 2023, the Norwegian Maritime Authority (NMA)  circulates for review the proposed amendments to the Regulations on environmental safety  that would  include zero emissions requirement for cruise ships, tourist boats and ferries in the World Heritage fjords by 2026

As of 2025, there are more than 1000 electric ships in operation and almost 500 on order. About two thirds of those are hybrids, with the remaining third being split between plug-in hybrids and pure electric
As of 2025, in Norway, nearly 108 ferries out of 229 are electric (that is ~47% of ferries and ~31% of connections).

In China, the world's largest battery-electric container ship (700 TEU) has started regular operations between Shanghai and Nanjing in 2024. The route covers almost 1 000 km along the Yangtze River without stopping to recharge.
Yara started operating the world's first battery-powered containership "Birkeland" at the end of 2021 between Porsgrunn and Brevik in Norway

In 2021, the ferry company Stena Line, the Port of Frederikshavn, and Frederikshavn Municipality signed an agreement earlier today committing each of the parties to making the necessary investments for Stena Line to introduce two Stena Elektra class ferries to the Gothenburg (Sweden)-Frederikshavn (Denmark) route by 2030.  The agreement will mean that onshore infrastructure such as sustainable charging facilities will be developed in parallel with the vessels

The Incat shipyard launched the Incat Hull 096 – the world’s largest battery-electric ship. When the Hull 096 enters service between Buenos Aires and Uruguay, it will operate entirely on battery-electric power, carrying up to 2,100 passengers and 225 vehicles across the River Plate. The ship is equipped with over 250 tonnes of batteries and an Energy Storage System (ESS) boasting more than 40 megawatt-hours of installed capacity
Wärtsilä to supply the electric propulsion system for USA’s first battery-electric, zero-emission high-speed passenger ferries

China's biggest all-electric bulk carrier, named Gezhouba, was launched on Thursday in Yichang, central China's Hubei Province, marking a key milestone in the country's green and intelligent shipping sector. The vessel, with a length of nearly 130 meters and a maximum load capacity of over 13,000 tonnes, is equipped with 12 lithium battery power units providing total energy capacity of 24,000 kWh.

After the Hull 96, Incat Tasmania will build two battery electric ferriers. Wärtsilä to equip two high-speed fully battery-electric Danish ferries with integrated electric propulsion system and waterjets with 45 MWh battery pack, the largest on order so far.

tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.id: Transport > Shipping > Vessels > Battery electric ship
tech_0328_battery-electric-ship.id_zh: 運輸 > 航運 > 船舶 > 電池電動船舶

tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.technology_status_summary_zh: 美國第一艘核動力商船「薩凡納號」建於 1959 年。俄羅斯目前有八艘核動力破冰船運轉中。現行破冰船及軍艦使用的海軍反應爐均為壓水式反應爐。民用船舶可使用低濃縮鈾，鈾-235 濃度最高可達 20%，相較之下陸上核電廠最高約為 5%；這仍可提供高功率密度，且換料週期最長可達十年。未來海事應用可採用現代化小型模組化反應爐（SMR），例如高溫／超高溫反應爐（HTR／VHTR）或熔鹽反應爐（MSR）。這些反應爐可具備更完善的被動安全特性，甚至可能使船舶在整個使用年限內無須換料。以陸上應用而言，HTR 的技術成熟度約為 TRL 7–8，MSR 約為 TRL 4–5；此外，仍須克服將其調整為海事運轉用途的挑戰。
tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 由於初期投資所需的龐大資本支出，以及高昂的營運與維護成本，核動力船舶迄今未能充分發揮潛力，也尚未實現商業獲利。安全性、核不擴散、放射性廢棄物管理及除役等問題，是可能阻礙其廣泛採用的主要障礙。
tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.technology_status_summary_en: The first US nuclear-powered merchant ship, the N.S. Savannah, was built in 1959. Russia currently has 8 nuclear icebreakers in operation. Naval reactors currently used on ice-breakers and military ships are of the pressurised-water type. Civilian applications can run on  low-enriched uranium (up to 20% in U235, to be compared to up to 5% for an on-shore nuclear power plant), which still enables a high power density and a duration of up to 10 years before refuelling. In the future, marine applications could take advantage of modern Small Modular Reactors (SMRs), like High/Very High Temperature Reactors (HTR/VHTR) or Molten Salt Reactors (MSR), that can have better passive safety features and can potentially eliminate the need for refuelling altogether during the life of the ship. For on-shore application, their TRL level ranges from 7-8 (for HTR) to 4-5 (MSR), with the additional challenge of adapting them to maritime operation.
tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.market_dynamics_summary_en: Due to the large capital expenditure required for the initial investment and operational and maintenance costs, nuclear-powered ships have fallen short of their potential and failed to become profitable up to now. Safety, non-proliferation, nuclear waste management and decommissioning issues are major hurdles that could impede wider adoption.
tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.description: The first US nuclear-powered merchant ship, the N.S. Savannah, was built in 1959. Russia currently has 8 nuclear icebreakers in operation. Naval reactors currently used on ice-breakers and military ships are of the pressurised-water type. Civilian applications can run on  low-enriched uranium (up to 20% in U235, to be compared to up to 5% for an on-shore nuclear power plant), which still enables a high power density and a duration of up to 10 years before refuelling. In the future, marine applications could take advantage of modern Small Modular Reactors (SMRs), like High/Very High Temperature Reactors (HTR/VHTR) or Molten Salt Reactors (MSR), that can have better passive safety features and can potentially eliminate the need for refuelling altogether during the life of the ship. For on-shore application, their TRL level ranges from 7-8 (for HTR) to 4-5 (MSR), with the additional challenge of adapting them to maritime operation.
tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.NZErationale: Due to the large capital expenditure required for the initial investment and operational and maintenance costs, nuclear-powered ships have fallen short of their potential and failed to become profitable up to now. Safety, non-proliferation, nuclear waste management and decommissioning issues are major hurdles that could impede wider adoption.

initiatives.description: In 2023, more than a dozen Japanese companies have invested a combined total of about USD 80 million in the UK-based Core Power, which is helping develop a floating molten salt reactor (MSR) nuclear power plant and other maritime applications.

In 2022, Ulstein launched Thor, a Thorium Molten Salt Reactor (MSR) powered ship that will operate as a mobile charging station for future battery-driven cruise ships. ‘Thor’s’ charging capacity has been scaled to satisfy the power needs of four expedition cruise ships simultaneously. ‘Thor' itself would never need to refuel.
In 2022, Hyundai has shown interest in the development of nuclear propulsion by investing USD 30 million in TerraPower, a US-based nuclear innovation company.

Jiangnan Shipyard, a division of state-owned China State Shipbuilding Corporation (CSSC) unveiled a nuclear-powered 24,000 TEU container ship model, for which it obtained the Approval in Principle (AiP) from DNV. It would feature a thorium-based Generation IV molten salt reactor.
The Yakutia, the 4th nuclear icebreaker of the LK-60 class, powered by two RITM-200 pressurized-water reactors,  entered in operation and escorted its first ship to Sever Bay.

Samsung Heavy Industries and the Korea Atomic Energy Research Institute (KAERI) have achieved a global first by receiving Approval in Principle (AiP) by the American Bureau of Shipping (ABS) for a 174,000-cubic-meter liquefied natural gas (LNG) carrier powered by a small modular molten salt reactor (MSR)

The NuProShip programme, supported by Norway, completed its Phase I and moved into Phase II to refine the design of the 3 reactor types it shortlisted: Kairos Power (USA), a fluoride high-temperature molten salt reactor, Ultrasafe (USA), a helium-cooled gas reactor,  Blykalla (Sweden), a lead-cooled reactor concept utilizing uranium oxide as fuel.

tech_0329_nuclear-powered-ship.id_zh: 運輸 > 航運 > 船舶 > 核動力船舶

tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.technology_status_summary_zh: 化學迴路燃燒是一種利用兩座主要反應器，在高溫下進行二氧化碳捕捉的技術。系統使用鐵、錳等金屬微粒與空氣中的氧結合，在第一座反應器中形成金屬氧化物；金屬氧化物隨後輸送至第二座反應器，釋出氧供燃料燃燒，產生能量及高濃度二氧化碳氣流。金屬載氧體之後再循環回第一座反應器。固體化學迴路的主要優點，是整體製程能源消耗可能較低；技術挑戰則包括降低金屬載氧體的成本及劣化程度。
tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術仍處於早期開發階段，因此未來成本存在不確定性。
tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.technology_status_summary_en: Chemical looping is a technology that involves CO2 capture at high temperatures using two main reactors. Chemical looping systems use small particles of metal (e.g. iron, manganese) to bind oxygen from the air to form a metal oxide (1st reactor), which is then transported to the other reactor where it releases the oxygen for the combustion of the fuel, thus generating energy and a concentrated stream of CO2 (2nd reactor). The metal is then looped back to the first reactor. A main benefit of solid looping is the potentially lower overall process energy consumption. Challenges include reducing the cost and degradation of the metal carrier (IEAGHG, 2019).
tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.market_dynamics_summary_en: Being at an early development stage, there are uncertainties on future costs.
tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.description: Chemical looping is a technology that involves CO2 capture at high temperatures using two main reactors. Chemical looping systems use small particles of metal (e.g. iron, manganese) to bind oxygen from the air to form a metal oxide (1st reactor), which is then transported to the other reactor where it releases the oxygen for the combustion of the fuel, thus generating energy and a concentrated stream of CO2 (2nd reactor). The metal is then looped back to the first reactor. A main benefit of solid looping is the potentially lower overall process energy consumption. Challenges include reducing the cost and degradation of the metal carrier (IEAGHG, 2019).
tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.NZErationale: Being at an early development stage, there are uncertainties on future costs.

initiatives.description: Dongfang Boiler Co., a subsidiary of Dongfang Electric, has successfully tested the world’s largest chemical looping combustion carbon capture demonstration unit in Deyang, Sichuan Province. The system uses an oxygen carrier to transfer oxygen from air to fuel, achieving over 95 % CO2 capture efficiency and producing a CO2 stream with more than 90 % purity. Developers report the process could reduce capture costs by about two-thirds compared with conventional technologies.

tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Chemical looping combustion (coal)
tech_0330_chemical-looping-combustion-co.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 化學迴路燃燒（煤炭）

tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.technology_name: Improved coal combustion (methane slips and oxidation rates)
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.technology_name_zh: 改良煤炭燃燒（甲烷逸散與氧化率）
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.technology_status_summary_zh: 改善操作條件與監測程序，可減少火炬燃燒不完全造成的甲烷逸散，並提高礦井通風排放甲烷氧化裝置的氧化率。相關措施包括監測減排程序，例如火炬銷毀效率；將空燃比控制自動化；以及減少火炬未點燃等異常操作狀況。
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少煤礦甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.technology_status_summary_en: Better operational conditions and monitoring processes can reduce methane slips from incomplete combustion at flares and improve oxidation rates at ventilation air methane oxidation units. These include measures to monitor abatement processes (e.g. flaring destruction efficiency), automate air-fuel ratio controls as well as reduce upset conditions (e.g. unlit flares).
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.description: Better operational conditions and monitoring processes can reduce methane slips from incomplete combustion at flares and improve oxidation rates at ventilation air methane oxidation units. These include measures to monitor abatement processes (e.g. flaring destruction efficiency), automate air-fuel ratio controls as well as reduce upset conditions (e.g. unlit flares).
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Improved coal combustion (methane slips and oxidation rates)
tech_0331_improved-coal-combustion-metha.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 改良煤炭燃燒（甲烷逸散與氧化率）

tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.technology_status_summary_zh: 純氧燃燒燃煤電廠使用近乎純氧取代空氣燃燒煤炭，因此煙道氣主要由二氧化碳與水蒸氣組成，經脫水後即可取得高純度二氧化碳氣流。氧氣通常以低溫空氣分離技術進行商業化生產。降低製氧的能源消耗與成本，例如改善低溫空氣分離、採用空氣分離膜，或在夜間等低電價時段製氧，以及降低整體純氧燃燒製程的能耗與成本，都是減少捕捉成本的關鍵。
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術須與燃煤電廠的其他 CCUS 方案競爭，其中燃燒後捕捉技術的成熟度較高。
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.technology_status_summary_en: An oxy-fuelling coal-fired power plant involves the combustion of coal using nearly pure oxygen instead of air, resulting in a flue gas composed of CO2 and water vapour, which can be dehydrated to obtain a high-purity CO2 stream. Typically, oxygen is commercially produced via low-temperature air separation. Lowering the energy consumption and cost for oxygen production (via improved low-temperature air separation or air-separating membranes, or by generating oxygen during periods of low-cost power, e.g. during night time), and the overall oxyfuel process, are key factors in reducing capture costs.
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.market_dynamics_summary_en: Competing with alternative (and in the case of post-combustion more mature) CCUS technologies for coal-fired power plants
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.description: An oxy-fuelling coal-fired power plant involves the combustion of coal using nearly pure oxygen instead of air, resulting in a flue gas composed of CO2 and water vapour, which can be dehydrated to obtain a high-purity CO2 stream. Typically, oxygen is commercially produced via low-temperature air separation. Lowering the energy consumption and cost for oxygen production (via improved low-temperature air separation or air-separating membranes, or by generating oxygen during periods of low-cost power, e.g. during night time), and the overall oxyfuel process, are key factors in reducing capture costs.
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.NZErationale: Competing with alternative (and in the case of post-combustion more mature) CCUS technologies for coal-fired power plants
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Oxy-fuelling (coal)
tech_0332_oxy-fuelling-coal.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 純氧燃燒（煤炭）

tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_name_zh: 燃燒後捕捉：化學吸收（煤炭搭配 CCUS）
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_status_summary_zh: 在採用化學吸收式燃燒後捕捉的燃煤電廠中，利用胺類等化學溶劑，將二氧化碳從燃燒煙道氣中分離。二氧化碳在較高溫度下自溶劑中釋出，溶劑則經再生後循環使用。
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 燃燒後捕捉可作為既有且廠齡相對較短之燃煤電廠的改裝方案。此技術亦已在商業規模下成功運轉數萬小時。現有二氧化碳捕捉電廠的設計捕捉率為 85% 至 90%，而只須相對有限的成本增幅，即可達到高得多的捕捉率。待高捕捉率技術完成大型示範後，隨著減排要求日益嚴格，預期將逐步導入。
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_status_summary_en: At a coal-fired power plant with post-combustion capture using chemical absorption, the CO2 is separated from the combustion flue gas by using a chemical solvent (e.g. amine-based). The CO2 is released at elevated temperatures, the solvent regenerated and recycled back for further operation.
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.market_dynamics_summary_en: Post-combustion capture can be a retrofit option for existing and relatively young coal-fired power plants. The technology has also operated successfully for tens of thousands of hours at commercial scale. While existing CO2 capture power plants are designed for 85-90% CO2 capture, much higher capture rates are feasible for a relatively modest increase in cost. Following demonstration at scale, higher capture rates are likely to be implemented as demands for stricter emissions reductions grow.
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.description: At a coal-fired power plant with post-combustion capture using chemical absorption, the CO2 is separated from the combustion flue gas by using a chemical solvent (e.g. amine-based). The CO2 is released at elevated temperatures, the solvent regenerated and recycled back for further operation.
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.NZErationale: Post-combustion capture can be a retrofit option for existing and relatively young coal-fired power plants. The technology has also operated successfully for tens of thousands of hours at commercial scale. While existing CO2 capture power plants are designed for 85-90% CO2 capture, much higher capture rates are feasible for a relatively modest increase in cost. Following demonstration at scale, higher capture rates are likely to be implemented as demands for stricter emissions reductions grow.

initiatives.description: In October 2024, the Navajo Transitional Energy Company (NTEC) won a $6.55 million award from the U.S. Department of Energy to conduct a FEED study for adding carbon capture and storage at the coal-fired Four Corners Power Plant in New Mexico. The project will evaluate the feasibility of using amine-based post-combustion technology to capture more than 95 % of CO2 emissions, with completion of the study expected in 2025.

The Prairie Research Institute, with the support of the U.S. Department of Energy has launched operations of the world’s largest coal-fired carbon capture pilot at the Dallman 4 power plant in Springfield, Illinois. The $80 million project retrofits the unit with Linde–BASF’s advanced post-combustion CO2 capture technology to demonstrate large-scale performance and de-risk commercialization.

After a 72-hour trial run, China Huaneng Group has commissioned on September 2025 a 1.5 MtCO2 per year carbon capture facility at its Zhengning coal-fired power plant in Gansu Province. The project captures over 90 % of CO2 from desulfurized flue gas using an alkaline absorbent. The captured CO2 will be utilized for geological storage, enhanced oil recovery, green fuel synthesis, and mineralized building materials.

Tsinghua University and Hebei Jiantao Energy Development have completed a 200 000 tCO2 per year carbon capture and utilization project at a coal-fired boiler facility in Hebei Province. The system uses a low-energy amine-based solvent with a desorption heat of 2.2 GJ/tCO2 and achieves over 90% capture efficiency. The captured CO2, with 99.5 % purity, is supplied for acetic acid production, forming an integrated carbon capture–utilization industrial chain.

NTPC and Carbon Clean have achieved a key milestone at the coal-fired Vindhyachal Super Thermal Power Station, producing the first drop of methanol from CO2 captured at the 500 MW Unit-13. The plant captures 20 tCO2 per day using Carbon Clean’s semi-modular CaptureX technology, with the captured CO2 hydrogenated using green hydrogen to produce methanol. The project, executed by NTPC’s NETRA division, demonstrates industrial-scale CO2 utilization and advances India’s CCUS ambitions.

tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Post-combustion: chemical absorption (coal with CCUS)
tech_0333_post-combustion-chemical-absor.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 燃燒後捕捉：化學吸收（煤炭搭配 CCUS）

tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.technology_name_zh: 燃燒後捕捉：高分子膜（煤炭搭配 CCUS）
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.technology_status_summary_zh: 在採用高分子膜進行燃燒後捕捉的燃煤電廠中，二氧化碳透過膜材自燃燒煙道氣中分離。高分子薄膜可作為選擇性屏障，從氣流中分離二氧化碳；也可作為非選擇性的氣液接觸裝置，使氣流與液態溶劑接觸，此方式稱為膜吸收。
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 相較化學吸收，高分子膜燃燒後捕捉的技術成熟度較低。
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.technology_status_summary_en: At a coal-fired power plant with post-combustion capture using chemical absorption, the CO2 is separated from the combustion flue gas by membranes, which are polymeric films and act as a selective barrier able to separate CO2 from a stream. They can also act, in a non-selective way, as a contacting device between the gas stream and the liquid solvent (i.e. membrane absorption).
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.market_dynamics_summary_en: Less mature post-combustion capture compared to chemical absorption.
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.description: At a coal-fired power plant with post-combustion capture using chemical absorption, the CO2 is separated from the combustion flue gas by membranes, which are polymeric films and act as a selective barrier able to separate CO2 from a stream. They can also act, in a non-selective way, as a contacting device between the gas stream and the liquid solvent (i.e. membrane absorption).
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.NZErationale: Less mature post-combustion capture compared to chemical absorption.

initiatives.description: Membrane Technology and Research (MTR) has completed the world’s largest membrane-based carbon capture testing facility at the Wyoming Integrated Test Center in Gillette. The DOE-supported pilot, part of the Fossil Fuel Large-Scale Pilots program, could capture up to 55 000 tCO2 per year from Basin Electric’s Dry Fork Station using MTR’s Polaris™ membrane process.

tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Post-combustion: membranes polymeric (coal with CCUS)
tech_0334_post-combustion-membranes-poly.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 燃燒後捕捉：高分子膜（煤炭搭配 CCUS）

tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.technology_name_zh: 燃燒後捕捉：固體吸附（煤炭搭配 CCUS）
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.technology_status_summary_zh: 固體吸附法使用沸石、金屬有機骨架材料（MOF）等固體吸附劑，將二氧化碳從燃燒煙道氣中分離。相較胺類化學吸收，固體吸附劑可具有較低的再生能耗及較高的吸附選擇性。
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 固體吸附可作為成本低於化學吸收的替代方案，並避免胺類降解可能造成的環境影響。
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.technology_status_summary_en: In solid adsorption, the carbon dioxide is separated from the combustion flue gas by using a solid sorbent (e.g. zeolites, metal organic framework). Compared to amine-based chemical absorption, solid adsorbents can have lower regeneration energy and greater adsorption selectivity.
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.market_dynamics_summary_en: Solid adsorption can be a lower cost alternative to chemical absorption and avoid potential environmental impact related to amine degradation.
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.description: In solid adsorption, the carbon dioxide is separated from the combustion flue gas by using a solid sorbent (e.g. zeolites, metal organic framework). Compared to amine-based chemical absorption, solid adsorbents can have lower regeneration energy and greater adsorption selectivity.
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.NZErationale: Solid adsorption can be a lower cost alternative to chemical absorption and avoid potential environmental impact related to amine degradation.

initiatives.description: State Energy Group has begun construction of a 10 000 tCO2 per year low-pressure adsorption carbon capture demonstration project at the 1 000 MW Ninghai coal-fired power plant in Zhejiang Province. The system uses carbon-based physical adsorbents and a low-pressure adsorption–vacuum regeneration process developed by the Low-Carbon Research Institute, aiming for an energy consumption below 300 kWh/tCO2.

tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Post-combustion: solid adsorption (coal with CCUS)
tech_0335_post-combustion-solid-adsorpti.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 燃燒後捕捉：固體吸附（煤炭搭配 CCUS）

tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.technology_name_zh: 燃燒前捕捉：物理吸收（煤炭搭配 CCUS）
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.technology_status_summary_zh: 在整合煤氣化複循環（IGCC）電廠中，煤炭先氣化為由氫氣與一氧化碳組成的合成氣。合成氣接著進行水煤氣轉化（WGS）反應，產生更多氫氣，並將一氧化碳轉化為二氧化碳。二氧化碳再透過吸附等物理分離程序，從轉化後的合成氣中捕捉；剩餘氫氣則送入複循環燃氣渦輪機燃燒發電。
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 目前尚無配備二氧化碳捕捉的整合煤氣化複循環電廠投入商業運轉。美國一座採空氣吹送的商業規模電廠已停止興建；日本一座採氧氣吹送的商業規模示範電廠則於 2019 年底開始試運轉。
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.technology_status_summary_en: In an integrated gasification combined-cycle coal power plant, coal is gasified into a synthesis gas, consisting of hydrogen and carbon monoxide. The synthesis gas is shifted in a water-gas-shift (WGS) reaction to produce additional hydrogen and convert the carbon monoxide into carbon dioxide. The carbon dioxide is then captured from the shifted syngas using physical separation processes, such as adsorption, and afterwards, the remaining hydrogen (H2) is combusted in a combined-cycle gas turbine that generates power.
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.market_dynamics_summary_en: No integrated gasification combined-cycle coal power plant with CO2 capture is in commercial operation yet. While construction of an air-blown commercial-scale plant in the United States has been abandoned, test operation at an oxygen-blown commercial-scale demonstration plant started at the end of 2019 in Japan.
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.description: In an integrated gasification combined-cycle coal power plant, coal is gasified into a synthesis gas, consisting of hydrogen and carbon monoxide. The synthesis gas is shifted in a water-gas-shift (WGS) reaction to produce additional hydrogen and convert the carbon monoxide into carbon dioxide. The carbon dioxide is then captured from the shifted syngas using physical separation processes, such as adsorption, and afterwards, the remaining hydrogen (H2) is combusted in a combined-cycle gas turbine that generates power.
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.NZErationale: No integrated gasification combined-cycle coal power plant with CO2 capture is in commercial operation yet. While construction of an air-blown commercial-scale plant in the United States has been abandoned, test operation at an oxygen-blown commercial-scale demonstration plant started at the end of 2019 in Japan.

initiatives.description: Pre-combustion capture has been demonstrated at existing coal-fired IGCC power plants: Spain: Pre-combustion capture was tested between September 2010 and June 2011 at a 14-MW pilot plant, being part of the larger Puertollano IGCC power plant (335 MW). The pilot plant treated around 2% of the total syngas produced at the power plant, resulting in 100 tonnes per day of CO2 being captured and 2 tonnes per day of hydrogen being produced.
Belgium: A 20-MW pilot plant tested pre-combustion capture at the 253-MW Buggenum IGCC power plant between May 2011 and October 2013.

tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Pre-combustion: physical absorption (coal with CCUS)
tech_0336_pre-combustion-physical-absorp.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 燃燒前捕捉：物理吸收（煤炭搭配 CCUS）

tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.technology_name_zh: 超臨界二氧化碳循環（煤炭搭配 CCUS）
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.technology_status_summary_zh: 傳統電廠使用煙道氣或蒸汽驅動一部或多部渦輪機，超臨界二氧化碳（sCO₂）循環則以處於臨界溫度及壓力以上、液相與氣相無法區分的二氧化碳作為工作流體。sCO₂ 循環具有多項潛在優勢，包括提高電廠效率、降低空氣污染物排放、減少投資成本，以及達到較高的二氧化碳捕捉率；在部分情況下也能降低用水量。此循環通常以近乎純氧燃燒燃料氣體，使煙道氣主要由二氧化碳與水蒸氣組成。
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 目前對多項操作挑戰所掌握的資訊仍有限，包括燃燒行為與火焰動力學。
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.technology_status_summary_en: While in conventional power plants flue gas or steam is used to drive one or multiple turbines, in supercritical CO2 (sCO2) cycles supercritical CO2 is used, i.e. CO2 at or above its critical temperature and pressure, where liquid and gaseous phases of CO2 are indistinguishable. sCO2 cycles offer many potential advantages, including higher plant efficiencies, lower air pollutant emissions, lower investment costs and high CO2 capture rates. In some cases, they could also allow for reduced water consumption. sCO2 cycles typically use nearly pure oxygen to combust the fuel gas in order to create a flue gas stream comprised primarily of CO2 and water vapour.
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.market_dynamics_summary_en: There is currently limited information on several operational challenges, including on combustion and flame dynamics.
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.description: While in conventional power plants flue gas or steam is used to drive one or multiple turbines, in supercritical CO2 (sCO2) cycles supercritical CO2 is used, i.e. CO2 at or above its critical temperature and pressure, where liquid and gaseous phases of CO2 are indistinguishable. sCO2 cycles offer many potential advantages, including higher plant efficiencies, lower air pollutant emissions, lower investment costs and high CO2 capture rates. In some cases, they could also allow for reduced water consumption. sCO2 cycles typically use nearly pure oxygen to combust the fuel gas in order to create a flue gas stream comprised primarily of CO2 and water vapour.
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.NZErationale: There is currently limited information on several operational challenges, including on combustion and flame dynamics.
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Combustion and conversion > Supercritical CO2 cycle (coal with CCUS)
tech_0337_supercritical-co2-cycle-coal-w.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 燃燒與轉化 > 超臨界二氧化碳循環（煤炭搭配 CCUS）

tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.technology_name: Coal mine methane use for energy supply
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.technology_status_summary_zh: 除氣井與甲烷抽放鑽孔可捕捉煤層或周圍岩層中的甲烷，降低採煤期間的洩漏風險。回收的甲烷可用於發電、注入天然氣管線、熱電共生，或作為製造業原料等其他用途。礦井通風排放甲烷若具有足夠的濃度與流量，也可作為內燃機的輔助燃料。
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少煤礦甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.technology_status_summary_en: Degasification wells and drainage boreholes can capture methane in coal reservoirs (coal seams or strata), reducing the potential of leaks during production. This methane can be used for power generation, pipeline injection, combined power and heat generation, and other technologies (e.g. manufacturing feedstock). Ventilation air methane at high enough concentrations and flows can serve as supplemental fuel for combustion air engines.
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.description: Degasification wells and drainage boreholes can capture methane in coal reservoirs (coal seams or strata), reducing the potential of leaks during production. This methane can be used for power generation, pipeline injection, combined power and heat generation, and other technologies (e.g. manufacturing feedstock). Ventilation air methane at high enough concentrations and flows can serve as supplemental fuel for combustion air engines.
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Methane emissions monitoring and abatement > Coal mine methane use for energy supply
tech_0338_coal-mine-methane-use-for-ener.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 甲烷排放監測與減量 > 煤礦甲烷能源利用

tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.technology_name: Coal mine methane use for on-site heating or coal drying
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.technology_name_zh: 煤礦甲烷用於現場供熱或煤炭乾燥
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.technology_status_summary_zh: 除氣井與甲烷抽放鑽孔可捕捉煤層或周圍岩層中的甲烷，降低採煤期間的洩漏風險。回收的甲烷可在鍋爐中作為礦場內供熱的熱源，也可供煤炭乾燥系統使用。礦井通風排放甲烷若具有足夠的濃度與流量，也可作為能源，從而減少礦場進行這些作業時的煤炭用量。
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少煤礦甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.technology_status_summary_en: Degasification wells and drainage boreholes can capture methane in coal reservoirs (coal seams or strata), reducing the potential of leaks during production. This methane can be used as a heat source either in boilers (for in-mine heating) or coal drying systems. Ventilation air methane at high enough concentrations and flows can also serve as an energy source. This allows mines to use less coal for these activities.
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.description: Degasification wells and drainage boreholes can capture methane in coal reservoirs (coal seams or strata), reducing the potential of leaks during production. This methane can be used as a heat source either in boilers (for in-mine heating) or coal drying systems. Ventilation air methane at high enough concentrations and flows can also serve as an energy source. This allows mines to use less coal for these activities.
tech_0339_coal-mine-methane-use-for-on-s.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.

tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.technology_name_zh: 礦井通風排放甲烷氧化裝置
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.technology_status_summary_zh: 地下煤礦利用通風系統將新鮮空氣送入礦井，稀釋採煤時釋放至作業區的甲烷，以維持安全的作業條件。當甲烷濃度介於 0.25% 至 1.25% 時，熱氧化或觸媒氧化技術在技術上均可行，可分解礦井通風排放甲烷，降低其對氣候的影響。
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少煤礦甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.technology_status_summary_en: Underground coal mines use ventilation systems to move fresh air into the mine, dilute methane released into the mine workings as coal is extracted, and maintain safe working conditions. Thermal or catalytic oxidation technologies are technically feasible at low methane concentrations, between 0.25% and 1.25%, and enable the destruction of ventilation air methane to reduce its climate impact.
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.description: Underground coal mines use ventilation systems to move fresh air into the mine, dilute methane released into the mine workings as coal is extracted, and maintain safe working conditions. Thermal or catalytic oxidation technologies are technically feasible at low methane concentrations, between 0.25% and 1.25%, and enable the destruction of ventilation air methane to reduce its climate impact.
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.id: Fossil fuels > Coal > Methane emissions monitoring and abatement > Ventilation air methane oxidisers
tech_0340_ventilation-air-methane-oxidis.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 煤炭 > 甲烷排放監測與減量 > 礦井通風排放甲烷氧化裝置

tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.technology_name: Operational and continuous monitoring in coal facilities
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.technology_name_zh: 煤礦設施操作與持續監測
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.technology_status_summary_zh: 透過監測與維修，可辨識潛在排放源、防止產生新的排放源、密封逸散源，例如封閉停用的礦井入口或鑽孔，並將甲烷導入現有減排系統，以避免排放。監測範圍包括露頭、採掘區上方破裂地層及未密封礦井入口的排放，也包括礦場甲烷利用專案之氣體基礎設施的非預期排放。操作監測亦包括額外的設備維護與作業規劃，以避免設備停機，以及例行操作造成不必要的甲烷排放。
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少煤礦甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.technology_status_summary_en: Monitoring and repair can avoid methane emissions by identifying potential sources of emissions and avoiding new sources, sealing fugitive sources (e.g. closing unused mine entries or boreholes) and directing them to available abatement systems. This includes emissions from outcrops, fractured ground above workings and unsealed mine entries or unintentional emissions from gas infrastructure of methane projects installed on a mine. Operational monitoring includes supplementary equipment maintenance and planning to avoid equipment downtime and unnecessary methane venting related to routine operations.
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.description: Monitoring and repair can avoid methane emissions by identifying potential sources of emissions and avoiding new sources, sealing fugitive sources (e.g. closing unused mine entries or boreholes) and directing them to available abatement systems. This includes emissions from outcrops, fractured ground above workings and unsealed mine entries or unintentional emissions from gas infrastructure of methane projects installed on a mine. Operational monitoring includes supplementary equipment maintenance and planning to avoid equipment downtime and unnecessary methane venting related to routine operations.
tech_0341_operational-and-continuous-mon.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce coal mine methane emissions.

tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_name: Post-combustion: chemical absorption (natural gas with CCUS)
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_name_zh: 燃燒後捕捉：化學吸收（天然氣搭配 CCUS）
sector: Power generation from natural gas, with CCUS
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.sector_en: Power generation from natural gas, with CCUS
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_status_summary_zh: 在採用燃燒後碳捕捉的天然氣電廠中，使用胺類等化學溶劑從煙道氣中移除二氧化碳。二氧化碳與溶劑反應形成弱鍵結化合物，之後加熱使高濃度二氧化碳釋出，並使溶劑再生以供重複使用。
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 此技術可加裝至既有電廠。
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.technology_status_summary_en: At a natural gas power plant with post-combustion carbon capture, CO2 is removed from the flue gas using a chemical solvent such as an amine. The CO2 reacts with the solvent to form a weakly bound compound, which is then heated to release concentrated CO2 and regenerate the solvent for reuse.
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.market_dynamics_summary_en: Technology can be retrofitted to existing plants.
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.description: At a natural gas power plant with post-combustion carbon capture, CO2 is removed from the flue gas using a chemical solvent such as an amine. The CO2 reacts with the solvent to form a weakly bound compound, which is then heated to release concentrated CO2 and regenerate the solvent for reuse.
tech_0342_post-combustion-chemical-absor.NZErationale: Technology can be retrofitted to existing plants.

initiatives.description: MAIRE, through its subsidiaries NEXTCHEM and KT, has completed Italy’s first carbon capture facility at Eni’s Casalborsetti natural gas treatment plant near Ravenna, which started operations in September 2024. The post-combustion system, part of the Ravenna CCS Phase 1 project, captures about 25,000 tCO2 per year using NEXTCHEM’s NX Decarb™ chemical absorption technology. Developers report the plant could achieve over 90 % capture efficiency at CO2 concentrations below 3 %, with the captured CO2 processed and stored within the Ravenna CCS hub.

In December 2024, the Northern Endurance Partnership announced a final investment decision on the Net Zero Teesside Power project, an 860 MW/2 Mt CO2 per year gas combined-cycle gas turbine (CCGT) facility equipped with CO2 capture, targeting operations in 2028. This marks a significant step toward decarbonising the United Kingdom energy sector by integrating carbon capture technology into a large-scale gas power plant.

Entropy and Advantage Energy reached FID on Phase 2 of the Glacier CCS project at the Glacier gas plant in Alberta. The post-combustion system, using Entropy’s modular MCCS™ amine-based technology, could capture about 160 000 tCO2 per year from gas-fired turbines and engines. Developers report capture efficiencies above 90% and heat of regeneration of 2.5–2.9 GJ/tCO2. Construction started in 2024, with commercial operation planned for 2026.

KEPCO and Korea East-West Power have commissioned a 1 MW carbon capture demonstration plant at the Ulsan gas-fired power station, capable of capturing about 3 000 tCO2 per year. The facility uses a wet chemical absorption process with an amine solvent developed specifically for gas power generation, which developers say could achieve over 90 % capture efficiency and 99.9 % CO2 purity. Results will inform the design of a future commercial-scale system targeting 500 000 tCO2 per year.

Mitsubishi Heavy Industries and KEPCO have started operating a five-ton-per-day CO2 capture pilot at the Himeji No. 2 gas-fired power plant in Hyogo Prefecture. The facility uses MHI’s amine-based Advanced KM CDR Process™ and will test next-generation capture technology co-developed with ExxonMobil. Developers note the system could improve regeneration efficiency and lower operating costs compared with previous solvent formulations.

Landmark Power Holdings has achieved first CO2 capture at its 10 MW Rhodesia gas-fired power plant in Nottinghamshire. The facility, using the patented FLEXPOWER PLUS® configuration and ASCO Carbon Dioxide’s liquid CO2 capture and purification system, has captured and stored its first pure CO2 at a rate of 1.3 t/h from two MTU 12V engines. The project supplies low-carbon power while producing high-purity CO2 for industrial use, marking a major milestone in commissioning.

Landmark Power Holdings is developing the 35 MW Mill Hill gas-fired power plant in Peterlee, County Durham. The project will use the patented FLEXPOWER PLUS® configuration, combining high-efficiency generation with ASCO Carbon Dioxide’s liquid CO2 capture system to produce low-carbon electricity. Construction is expected to start in early 2026 following completion of pre-financing and design activities.

VPI has received the UK’s first environmental permit for amine-based carbon capture technology, approving Shell’s Cansolv system for its Immingham Combined Heat and Power Plant. The retrofit project could capture up to 3.3 million tCO2 per year, supporting the Viking CCS transport and storage network. Planning permission has also been granted, with final investment decision targeted before 2026.

Tampa Electric Company and partners completed a FEED study in 2024 to retrofit ION Clean Energy’s ICE-31 solvent-based carbon capture system at the 1,190 MW Polk Power Station in Florida. The post-combustion facility will be designed to capture at least 95 % of CO2 emissions, equivalent to about 3 million tCO2 per year.

GE Vernova, together with Linde, BASF, and Kiewit, completed a DOE-funded FEED study for a carbon capture retrofit at the James M. Barry natural gas power plant in Alabama. The design integrates BASF’s amine-based post-combustion system with exhaust gas recirculation, which developers report could capture up to 1.6 million tCO2 per year and reduce project costs by about 6 % through improved efficiency.

Google has signed a first-of-its-kind offtake agreement to purchase most of the electricity from Broadwing Energy’s planned 400 MW natural-gas-fired power plant with carbon capture and storage in Decatur, Illinois. The project, developed by Low Carbon Infrastructure, will capture about 90 % of its CO2 emissions for permanent storage in Archer Daniels Midland’s Class VI wells. Google’s long-term power-purchase deal marks the first corporate offtake supporting a gas-with-CCS facility.

tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.technology_name: Supercritical CO2 cycle (natural gas with CCUS)
tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.technology_name_zh: 超臨界二氧化碳循環（天然氣搭配 CCUS）
sector: Power generation from natural gas, with CCUS
tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.sector_en: Power generation from natural gas, with CCUS
tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.technology_status_summary_zh: 傳統電廠使用煙道氣或蒸汽驅動渦輪機，超臨界二氧化碳（sCO₂）循環則以處於極高溫高壓、兼具液體與氣體性質的二氧化碳驅動渦輪機。此類循環可提高效率、降低排放與成本，並達到較高的二氧化碳捕捉率；部分系統也可減少用水。為實現此循環，sCO₂ 系統通常以近乎純氧燃燒燃料，使煙道氣主要由二氧化碳及水蒸氣組成。
tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 目前對多項操作挑戰所掌握的資訊仍有限，包括燃燒行為與火焰動力學。隨著資料中心用電需求成長，天然氣與燃煤電廠可能為資料中心的特定供電需求而新建或改裝，並配置此類捕捉系統，因此其重要性日益提高。
tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.technology_status_summary_en: In conventional power plants, flue gas or steam is used to drive turbines. In supercritical CO2 (sCO2) cycles, turbines are instead driven by CO2 at very high temperature and pressure, where it behaves as both a liquid and a gas. These cycles can offer higher efficiency, lower emissions, lower costs, high CO2 capture rates, and in some cases reduced water use. To enable this, sCO2 systems usually burn fuel with nearly pure oxygen, producing a flue gas made mainly of CO2 and water vapor.
tech_0343_supercritical-co2-cycle-natura.market_dynamics_summary_en: There is currently limited information on several operational challenges, including on combustion and flame dynamics. These systems are especially relevant with the growth of data centre demand and the potential for Ng and coal plants to be built or retorfitted for bespoke data centre usage with these types of capture systems.

In supercritical CO2 (sCO2) cycles, turbines are instead driven by CO2 at very high temperature and pressure, where it behaves as both a liquid and a gas. These cycles can offer higher efficiency, lower emissions, lower costs, high CO2 capture rates, and in some cases reduced water use. To enable this, sCO2 systems usually burn fuel with nearly pure oxygen, producing a flue gas made mainly of CO2 and water vapor.

tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.technology_name: Improved oil and gas combustion (methane slips)
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.technology_name_zh: 改良油氣燃燒（甲烷逸散）
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.technology_status_summary_zh: 甲烷逸散是燃燒不完全所造成的未燃甲烷排放。透過改善火炬、引擎、渦輪機、加熱爐及鍋爐的操作，例如減少啟動次數、最佳化流量與壓力，以及將空燃比控制自動化，可降低甲烷逸散。
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少油氣產業甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.technology_status_summary_en: Methane slip refers to the release of unburned methane due to incomplete combustion. It can be reduced at flares, engines, turbines, heaters, and boilers by improving operations, such as reducing start-ups, optimizing flow and pressure, and automating air-to-fuel ratio controls
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce oil and gas methane emissions.
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.description: Methane slip refers to the release of unburned methane due to incomplete combustion. It can be reduced at flares, engines, turbines, heaters, and boilers by improving operations, such as reducing start-ups, optimizing flow and pressure, and automating air-to-fuel ratio controls
tech_0344_improved-oil-and-gas-combustio.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce oil and gas methane emissions.

initiatives.description: A 2025 CIMAC study on an LNG-fuelled vessel showed that combining engine modifications (including exhaust‑gas recirculation) with a methane oxidation catalyst cut total methane slip by 97–99%, with 93.8% reduction across the catalyst alone

A 2025 ship trial using a plasma‑catalytic abatement unit reported methane slip reductions down to roughly 4 ± 2 g/kWh, illustrating that non‑thermal plasma combined with catalysts can substantially lower residual methane from marine gas engines.

tech_0349_electric-motors-and-pumps.technology_status_summary_zh: 以加壓天然氣作為動力來源的氣動泵浦，在正常運轉過程中也會排放天然氣。改用由太陽光電、其他發電設備供電或連接電網的電動泵浦，即可消除這些排放。以天然氣驅動的氣動裝置，也可改用電力操作的「零排氣」技術，取代加壓天然氣驅動方式。鑽井與完井期間在場址使用的柴油或燃氣引擎，也可由電動馬達取代。

tech_0349_electric-motors-and-pumps.technology_status_summary_en: Pneumatic pumps that use pressurised natural gas as a power source also vent natural gas in the ordinary course of their operation: these emissions can be eliminated through replacement with electrical pumps powered by solar or other generators, or connected to the grid. Gas-driven pneumatic devices  can be replaced with "zero-bleed" technologies that operate using electrical power, instead of pressurised natural gas. An electric motor can also replace a diesel or gas engine used onsite during drilling and well completion.

tech_0351_flare-gas-recovery.technology_status_summary_zh: 當產出的天然氣無法在油氣田內處理、其處理量受到限制，且沒有其他可行方式利用其能量時，便會以火炬燃燒天然氣，以減少直接排放至大氣的量。然而，火炬可能無法有效燃燒，使部分甲烷未完全氧化；天然氣中原本含有的二氧化碳也會作為廢氣排放。

Flares may be not burn efficiently and some methane may not be completely combusted. Also note that any naturally occurring CO2 will also be emitted as a waste product..

initiatives.description:
Continuous Emissions monitoring with lagarangian stochastic data processiing and Gradient indicator makes a substantial improvement to methodology. Gradient Indicator
(GI) tool was designed to identify the location of point source emissions (localization) using TERRAFEX (R)
maps. Together, TERRAFEX and the GI represent a model system to automatically establish emission
115 source locations.

tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.technology_name: Periodic methane emission monitoring in oil and gas facilities
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.technology_name_zh: 油氣設施定期甲烷排放監測
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.technology_status_summary_zh: 利用光學氣體成像攝影機、雷射感測器等移動式設備，定期監測油氣設施的甲烷排放，以偵測洩漏、安排修復，並支援排放量申報。監測方式包括航空載具量測，但不包括衛星監測。
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在 2030 年前將能源部門的甲烷排放削減 75%，是近期限制全球暖化成本最低的機會之一；此技術是減少油氣產業甲烷排放的可用方案之一。
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.technology_status_summary_en: Monitoring of methane emissions in an oil and gas facility through mobile devices such as optical imaging cameras or laser sensors to detect leaks, enable repairs and support emissions reporting. Includes airborne approaches but not satellite
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.market_dynamics_summary_en: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce oil and gas methane emissions.
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.description: Monitoring of methane emissions in an oil and gas facility through mobile devices such as optical imaging cameras or laser sensors to detect leaks, enable repairs and support emissions reporting. Includes airborne approaches but not satellite
tech_0353_periodic-methane-emission-moni.NZErationale: Cutting methane emissions from the energy sector by 75% by 2030 is one of the least cost opportunities to limit global warming in the near term. This is one of the technologies available to reduce oil and gas methane emissions.

tech_0355_plasma-catalytic-processes-for.technology_name_zh: 電漿觸媒甲烷減排製程
tech_0355_plasma-catalytic-processes-for.technology_status_summary_zh: 電漿觸媒技術在多種氣體轉化應用中日益受到重視，例如將二氧化碳轉化為高附加價值化學品與燃料、將甲烷活化轉化為氫氣、高碳數碳氫化合物或含氧化合物，以及合成氨。其他應用已較為成熟，包括空氣污染控制，例如揮發性有機物處理、粒狀污染物及氮氧化物（NOₓ）去除。此技術亦可處理甲烷逸散，也就是 LNG 燃料船舶的雙燃料船用引擎所排放之未燃甲烷。
tech_0355_plasma-catalytic-processes-for.technology_status_summary_en: Plasma catalysis is gaining increasing interest for various gas conversion applications, such as CO2 conversion into value-added chemicals and fuels, CH4 activation into hydrogen, higher hydrocarbons or oxygenates, and NH3 synthesis. Other applications are already more established, such as for air pollution control, e.g. volatile organic compound remediation, particulate matter and NOx removal. it can also be used to address Methane slip, the unburned methane released from dual-fuel marine engine s for LNG-fueled vessels.
tech_0355_plasma-catalytic-processes-for.description: Plasma catalysis is gaining increasing interest for various gas conversion applications, such as CO2 conversion into value-added chemicals and fuels, CH4 activation into hydrogen, higher hydrocarbons or oxygenates, and NH3 synthesis. Other applications are already more established, such as for air pollution control, e.g. volatile organic compound remediation, particulate matter and NOx removal. it can also be used to address Methane slip, the unburned methane released from dual-fuel marine engine s for LNG-fueled vessels.

initiatives.description: Approval in Principle (AiP) by Lloyd's Register (LR) for its Plasma-Catalytic technology after Pilot project - first shipboard plasma-catalytic methane abatement system deployed by Daphne Technology and Maran Gas in late October 2025

tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.technology_name_zh: 燃燒後碳捕捉（製程加熱爐）
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.technology_status_summary_zh: 製程加熱爐、鍋爐及公用設施約占煉油廠二氧化碳總排放量的 30% 至 60%；從這些設備的煙道氣捕捉二氧化碳，所需製程與發電部門使用的技術相似。製氫則約占煉油廠二氧化碳總排放量的 5% 至 20%。天然氣製氫設施的二氧化碳捕捉已完成商業規模示範，但尚未實際應用於煉油廠。
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.market_dynamics_summary_zh: 在既有煉油廠加裝燃燒後捕捉設備，是處理二氧化碳排放的可行途徑，但仍取決於場址可用空間，以及能否使用二氧化碳封存設施或銜接潛在利用端。RECAP 計畫估計，不同煉油廠配置與捕捉情境的二氧化碳避免成本約為 160 至 210 美元／tCO₂。
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.technology_status_summary_en:
Process heaters, boilers and utilities account for around 30-60% of the total CO2 emissions of a refinery. Processes needed to capture CO2 from the flue gas of these processes is similar to those in power generation.

Hydrogen production is responsible for around 5-20% of the total CO2 emissions of a refinery. CO2 capture from natural-gas based hydrogen production has been demonstrated on a commercial scale, but not yet been applied to a refinery.
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.market_dynamics_summary_en: Retrofitting with post-combustion capture is an opportunity to address CO2 emissions in existing refineries, but also depends on available space and access to CO2 storage or potential CO2 users; the RECAP project estimated the avoidance costs of CO2 from different refinery configurations and capture cases to be in the range of USD 160-210/tCO2.
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.description:
Process heaters, boilers and utilities account for around 30-60% of the total CO2 emissions of a refinery. Processes needed to capture CO2 from the flue gas of these processes is similar to those in power generation.

Hydrogen production is responsible for around 5-20% of the total CO2 emissions of a refinery. CO2 capture from natural-gas based hydrogen production has been demonstrated on a commercial scale, but not yet been applied to a refinery.
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.NZErationale: Retrofitting with post-combustion capture is an opportunity to address CO2 emissions in existing refineries, but also depends on available space and access to CO2 storage or potential CO2 users; the RECAP project estimated the avoidance costs of CO2 from different refinery configurations and capture cases to be in the range of USD 160-210/tCO2.

initiatives.description: Prax Lindsey Oil Refinery has joined the Viking CCS cluster, led by Harbour Energy, to capture and store around 1.1 MtCO2 per year from refinery heaters and process units. The captured CO2 will be transported via pipeline to the depleted Viking gas fields in the North Sea for permanent storage. The project will be implemented in two phases, with the first phase targeted for 2027 and the second for 2029.

tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.id: Fossil fuels > Oil and Gas > Refining, transport and storage > Post-combustion carbon capture (process heater)
tech_0356_post-combustion-carbon-capture.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 石油與天然氣 > 煉製、運輸與儲存 > 燃燒後碳捕捉（製程加熱爐）

tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.technology_name_zh: 純氧燃燒碳捕捉（流體觸媒裂化）
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.technology_status_summary_zh: 流體觸媒裂化（FCC）裝置約占典型煉油廠二氧化碳總排放量的 20% 至 55%，其煙道氣中二氧化碳的體積濃度約為 8% 至 20%。採用純氧燃燒可濃縮 FCC 裝置煙道氣中的二氧化碳，便於後續捕捉。
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.market_dynamics_summary_zh: FCC 裝置採用燃燒後捕捉時，二氧化碳避免成本低於純氧燃燒；但純氧燃燒具有提高 FCC 處理量的優勢。
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.technology_status_summary_en: The fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit is responsible for 20-55% of total CO2 emissions from a typical refinery. CO2 concentration in the flue gas is around 8-20% (volumetric). Oxy-combustion enables the concentration and capture of CO2 in the flue gas from FCC units.
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.market_dynamics_summary_en: Post-combustion capture at an FCC has lower CO2 avoidance costs than oxy-fuelling combustion, but oxy-fuelling combustion has the advantage of increasing the throughput of the FCC
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.description: The fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit is responsible for 20-55% of total CO2 emissions from a typical refinery. CO2 concentration in the flue gas is around 8-20% (volumetric). Oxy-combustion enables the concentration and capture of CO2 in the flue gas from FCC units.
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.NZErationale: Post-combustion capture at an FCC has lower CO2 avoidance costs than oxy-fuelling combustion, but oxy-fuelling combustion has the advantage of increasing the throughput of the FCC
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.id: Fossil fuels > Oil and Gas > Refining, transport and storage > Oxy-fuelling carbon capture (cracking)
tech_0357_oxy-fuelling-carbon-capture-cr.id_zh: 化石燃料 > 石油與天然氣 > 煉製、運輸與儲存 > 純氧燃燒碳捕捉（流體觸媒裂化）

tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.technology_name_zh: 燃燒後碳捕捉（流體觸媒裂化）
tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.technology_status_summary_zh: 流體觸媒裂化（FCC）裝置約占典型煉油廠二氧化碳總排放量的 20% 至 55%。目前已有燃燒後捕捉技術，可從二氧化碳體積濃度為 10% 至 20% 的煙道氣中捕捉二氧化碳，但尚未在煉油廠應用情境中完成示範。
tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.market_dynamics_summary_zh: FCC 裝置採用燃燒後捕捉時，二氧化碳避免成本低於純氧燃燒；但純氧燃燒具有提高 FCC 處理量的優勢。
tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.technology_status_summary_en: The fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit is responsible for 20-55% of total CO2 emissions from a typical refinery. Post-combustion technology to capture the CO2 from the flue gas, with a volumetric CO2 concentration of 10-20% is available, but has not yet been demonstrated in a refinery context.
tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.market_dynamics_summary_en: Post-combustion capture at a fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit has lower CO2 avoidance costs than oxy-fuelling combustion, but oxy-fuelling combustion has the advantage of increasing the throughput of the FCC.
tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.description: The fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit is responsible for 20-55% of total CO2 emissions from a typical refinery. Post-combustion technology to capture the CO2 from the flue gas, with a volumetric CO2 concentration of 10-20% is available, but has not yet been demonstrated in a refinery context.
tech_0358_post-combustion-carbon-capture.NZErationale: Post-combustion capture at a fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit has lower CO2 avoidance costs than oxy-fuelling combustion, but oxy-fuelling combustion has the advantage of increasing the throughput of the FCC.

initiatives.description: EET Fuels is developing an Industrial Carbon Capture (ICC) facility at the Stanlow refinery, integrating Topsoe’s SNOX™ flue gas treatment system, combined with MHI’s capture technology. The plant could capture about 1 MtCO2 per year from the refinery’s full-residue fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit, with permanent storage planned in depleted gas fields in Liverpool Bay via the HyNet cluster. Toyo Engineering India is conducting the FEED phase, with start-up targeted for 2028.

Svante Technologies will deploy its solid sorbent-based carbon capture system at Delek US’s Big Spring refinery in Texas. Supported by up to $95 million in DOE cost-shared funding, the project will capture around 145 000 tCO2 per year from the refinery’s fluid catalytic cracking (FCC) unit. The first-of-a-kind commercial-scale plant will demonstrate Svante’s solid sorbent filter technology for CO2 capture, with startup planned for 2027–2028.
